* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift


**Det är meriterande om du har:**
* Erfarenhet från bank, PSP eller andra miljöer med höga transaktionsvolymer
* Erfarenhet av arbete i miljöer med PCI DSS Level 1‑krav eller motsvarande regulatoriska krav


**Om Svea**
*Svea är en finansiell koncern med över 2000 anställda och verksamhet i flertalet europeiska länder. Med mer än 40 års erfarenhet är vi stolta över att erbjuda innovativa och hållbara finansiella lösningar till våra kunder. Svea präglas av en familjär företagskultur där varje medarbetare bidrar med sin unika kompetens och engagemang. Vår företagskultur betonar gemenskap, handlingskraft, och balans mellan arbete och privatliv. Välkommen att följa med oss på vår spännande resa!*
**Ansökan**
 Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via mail. Urval och intervjuer sker löpande och vi önskar att tillsätta tjänsten så snart som möjligt så skicka in din ansökan redan idag. Har du frågor kring tjänsten är du varmt välkommen att höra av dig till rekryterare Fredrika Engelin på fredrika.engelin@svea.com
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Data Manager Global Manufacturing & Supply
description:
**Company Description**
***Statistics show that women and underrepresented groups tend to apply to jobs only if they meet 100% of the qualifications. Sobi encourages you to change that statistic and apply. Rarely do candidates meet 100% of the qualifications. We look forward to your application!***
 At Sobi, the work we do every day redefines the standards of care and transform the lives of people living with rare diseases.
   

  

 As a diverse team of entrepreneurial people, we are passionate about our growth journey towards becoming a global leader, making a difference for rare disease patients, moving quickly and always challenging the status quo.
   

  

 We are committed to an inclusive, sustainable and flexible workplace that fosters growth and development.
   

  

**Job Description**
 As a Data Manager within Global Manufacturing and Supply (GMS) you will be the key person to build and manage the processes, governance and system landscape for our data. In other words, you shape the vision of our future data management set up and will be the driver of the data journey within GMS.
   

  

 In our view, good data needs to enable correct and on time supplies to patients and create positive business impact. You will be accountable that all key data of respective systems (e.g. ERP, APS) are created timely, are correct, maintained, synchronized among systems, and communicated to internal and external stakeholders at a high standard and that data quality is reported regularly to stakeholders.
   

  

 You will also partner with functions outside GMS and participate in projects that aim to enhance Sobi’s data management environment.
   

  

 This position is based at our Global Headquarters in Stockholm, Sweden or Global hub in Basel, Switzerland, reporting directly to Head Global Manufacturing & Supply Excellence.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Define, implement, and further develop cross-functional processes and RACI (incl. governance) to create and update Master Data.
* Manage the identification, collection, consolidation and cleansing of master data from various sources.
* Create and update data points and ensure that data sharing among systems works uninterrupted.
* Ensure accurate and timely communication of master data to e.g. 3PL partners and/or Sobi affiliates.
* Define and map source system and user systems of each data point.
* Develop and coordinate / implement data integration strategies to ensure data consistency across systems.
* Collaborate well with various stakeholders within and outside GMS to define and implement ways of working.
* Develop and implement concepts to regularly report data quality, data sharing, and next improvement steps.
* Proactively initiate and potentially lead improvements on processes, systems and roles & responsibilities to enhance data management within GMS, TechOps and Sobi. E.g. Collaborate with IT and software teams to design and implement data solutions including data models, data structures and data interfaces.
* Visualize data points, working processes and systems to business impact (Sobi-TechOps-GMS strategy/value creation plan) and explain / train stakeholders on a) the importance of accurate and timely data management and b) how to collaborate in an efficient and effective way to forester a data-driven culture.
* Be accountable for data related chang controls, respective SOP updates and training / guiding documentation as applicable and set an efficient governance for updating documentation.
* Define a framework for self-inspection on data accuracy to ensure continuous data quality improvement.


**Qualifications**
**About you**
 You are a collaborative, patient-focused professional who thrives in a global, multicultural environment. You enjoy connecting the dots between functions, translating complexity of data into clear direction, and building alignment among diverse stakeholders. You model Sobi’s values through your positive mindset, flexibility, and willingness to go the extra mile to support our mission.
   

  

 Your experience in similar roles allows you to navigate complexity with confidence and deliver results that help ensure continued access to treatments for rare disease communities.
   

  

**Key Qualifications**
* 5 – 10 years of experience in data management, Information Technology, and supply chain functions.
* Minimum 5 years’ GMP/GDP experience in the pharmaceutical or biotech industry.
* Experience working effectively in intercultural and highly matrixed environments.
* Proven ability to build, influence and embed data strategies / process re-designs across cross-functional and remote teams.
* University degree in Data Analytics, Computer science, Information systems, Supply Chain Management, or a related field.
* Strong presentation and communication skills.
* Excellent written and verbal English.
* Strong proficiency in MS Office, ERP systems, Advanced Planning Systems (APS) and Data Management Tools.


**Nice to Have**
* Experience in Data analytics and system implementation
* Project management qualification
* Lean Six Sigma qualification / experience
* Knowledge on IFS and Kinaxis Maestro
* AI experience
* Additional langue skills such as Swedish or German


 Here at Sobi we live by our core values: Care, Ambition, Urgency, Ownership and Partnership!
   

  

**Additional Information**
**How to apply**
 We have an ongoing selection process in this recruitment and ask you to send your application as soon as possible. Click apply and include your resume in English.
   

  

**Why Join Us?**
 Here At Sobi, Our Mission And Culture Get Us Excited To Come To Work Every Day, But Here Are a Few More Reasons To Join Our Team
   

  

* Emphasis on work/life balance
* Collaborative and team-oriented environment
* Opportunities for professional growth
* Diversity and Inclusion
* Competitive compensation for your work
* Making a positive impact to help ultra-rare disease patients who are in need of life saving treatments


 We are a global company with over 1,900 employees in more than 30 countries and are committed to the societies where we operate. With a deeply skilled management team directing our day-to-day wins, and a Board with a stellar track record, we’re ready to take on the world’s diseases, ailments and adversity. Our people believe they have the power to make a positive impact in others’ lives because that’s exactly what we do here. If you’re seeking a career that taps into your talents in a way that makes the world a better, healthier place, we just may have a job for you.
   

  

 We know our employees are our most valuable asset, and our culture conveys that. We offer a competitive benefits package, to support the health and happiness of our staff.
   

  

**Sobi Culture**
 At Sobi, we refuse to accept the status quo. This is because we have witnessed first-hand the challenges facing those affected by rare diseases and have used this knowledge to shape our business to find new ways of helping them.
   

  

 As a specialized biopharmaceutical company, we are dedicated to rare diseases. And we see this focus as a strength. By effectively turning our research into ground-breaking treatments, we help make medicine more accessible and open up more possibilities for patients and more opportunities for those caring for them. This has been our approach since day one, but we know we can’t change the world of rare diseases on our own. Accomplishing this requires strong partnerships with patients, partners and stakeholders across the entire value chain. Together, we define how our business can create solutions that serve the needs of those affected by rare diseases while facilitating sustainable growth.

title: Teknisk projektledare IT
description:
Vill du ta dig an energiutmaningen och vara med och jobba för ett lysande Sverige i en samhällskritisk verksamhet? I rollen som Projektledare IT blir du en del av vår samhällsviktiga och ständigt växande organisation på Svenska kraftnät.
   

  

**Om tjänsten**
 Vi söker en erfaren teknisk IT‑projektledare som, förutom att leverera resultat, också aktivt kommer att vara med och forma framtidens digitala IT‑landskap. Här kommer du att arbeta med verksamhetskritiska projekt i en organisation där IT utgör en avgörande faktor för verksamhetens leveransförmåga och som i förlängningen även utgör en bidragande aktör i elektrifieringen av Sverige.
   

  

 Du kommer att tillhöra enheten Kraftsystemapplikationer B inom Sektion IT för kraftsystemdrift, där du arbetar både inom den egna enheten och tvärfunktionellt tillsammans med interna resurser samt konsulter inom IT och verksamhet. I rollen kommer du att driva IT-projekt relaterade till Svenska kraftnäts kontrollrumsnära IT-stöd, ansvara för framdriften i projekt med IT-påverkan, samt löpande rapportera till projektägare och styrgrupp. Som stöd finns projektmodellen PPS som i delar är anpassad till Svenska kraftnäts behov. Utöver PPS styrs vi som statligt affärsverk av riktlinjer, anvisningar och instruktioner.
   

  

 Arbetsuppgifterna utgörs i huvudsak av att:
   

  

* Planera, leda, samordna och administrera projektet genom alla projektfaser.
* Uppnå projektets målsättning och delmål i enlighet med beslutad tidplan och budget.
* Förankra i organisationen.
* Överlämna projekts leverabler till utpekad förvaltningsorganisation.
* Stötta projektägare/beställare i att ta fram projektdirektiv och nödvändiga underlag enligt Svenska kraftnäts anvisningar samt styr- och projektmodeller.
* Driva aktiviteter och löpande rapportera framdrift och risker till styrgrupp.
* Ansvara för projektets budget och resursallokering.
* Kommunicera effektivt med ledning, tekniska team och externa leverantörer.
* Vid behov upphandla ny lösning enligt Svenska kraftnäts direktiv och processer (till exempel LOU).
* Leda interna projektresurser på ett tydligt och positivt sätt enligt Svenska kraftnäts värdegrund.


 Vi söker dig som vill göra skillnad och verka långsiktigt – här blir du en nyckel i en komplex miljö där ditt bidrag kommer att ge stor effekt för verksamheten på Svenska kraftnät.
   

  

**Om dig**
**Skallkrav:**
 För att trivas i rollen ser vi att du är strukturerad och resultatorienterad med förmåga att arbeta enligt en tydlig process, organisera och planera ditt arbete väl och göra det som krävs för ett gott resultat. Vi söker dig som är samarbetsorienterad det vill säga anpassar dig till andra och hittar lösningar genom ett prestigelöst fokus mot det gemensamma målet. Du är också stabil med förmåga att hantera stress på ett konstruktivt sätt och bibehålla ett gott humör vid press och motgångar. Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 Vidare har du en relevant akademisk examen inom till exempel IT, systemvetenskap, datateknik, industriell ekonomi eller motsvarande kompetens förvärvad på annat sätt. Du har även:
   

  

* Minst 7–10 års erfarenhet av projektledning inom IT, varav flera år med komplexa projekt i större organisationer med höga säkerhetskrav.
* Aktuell erfarenhet (senaste 3 åren) av arbete med säkerhetskänsliga/samhällskritiska IT-system med höga krav på informationssäkerhet i en komplex IT-organisation.
* Erfarenhet av och kompetensen att formulera funktionella och icke-funktionella krav.
* Förståelse för IT-arkitektur och IT-infrastruktur.
* Erfarenhet av att navigera i organisationer med många intressenter och höga krav på säkerhet och informationssäkerhet.
* God förmåga att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på svenska och engelska.


 Vi ser det som
 **meriterande** 
 om du har:
   

  

* Arbetslivserfarenhet av att driva IT-/OT-projekt inom elbranschen.
* Erfarenhet av att leda upphandlingar enligt LOU där du har deltagit i framtagandet av upphandlingsunderlag.
* Certifieringar inom projektledning till exempel PPS, PRINCE2, SAFe eller annan agil certifiering.


**Bra att veta**
* Tjänsten är placerad i Sundbyberg
* Möjlighet till distansarbete upp till 50 %
* Sista ansökningsdag 2026-04-17, vi använder urvalsfrågor istället för personligt brev.
* Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning
* Förmåner | Svenska kraftnät


**Intresserad av att ansöka eller få veta mer?**
 I denna rekrytering samarbetar Svenska kraftnät med Computer Sweden Recruitment. För frågor kring tjänsten och rekryteringsprocessen, välkommen att kontakta huvudansvarig rekryteringskonsult, Johanna Nordberg, 070-33 43 159,
 **johanna.nordberg@csrecruitment.se** 
 eller rekryterare hos Svenska kraftnät, Maria Sahlén. Fackliga representanter är Annika Ingeborn, SACO, 010 475 87 72 och Erica Midfjäll ST, 010 475 87 31. Du når oss också via e-post:
 **fornamn.efternamn@svk.se**
 Jobba här – bli en viktig del av vår energiframtid | Svenska kraftnät
   

  

 Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare i samband med rekrytering, vi har upphandlade avtal som gäller för Svenska kraftnät som statlig myndighet.
   

  

 Övrig information
   

  

 Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Innan ett beslut om anställning fattas kommer en säkerhetsprövning enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) att genomföras i de fall befattningen innebär hantering av säkerhetsskyddsklassificerade uppgifter eller deltagande i säkerhetskänslig verksamhet. Om anställningen avser befattning i säkerhetsklass kommer säkerhetsprövningen även att innefatta en registerkontroll och, i vissa fall, en särskild personutredning. För anställning på Svenska kraftnät kan det vara ett krav på svenskt medborgarskap i vissa befattningar. Med anställningen följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. För mer information om säkerhetsprövning Svenska kraftnät arbetar för att främja mångfald och motverka diskriminering och ser gärna sökanden med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter till våra rekryteringar. Lär känna Svenska kraftnät och hur det är att arbeta hos oss: Lär känna oss på Svenska kraftnät

title: Sustainability Intern
description:
**Internship - Sustainability** 




**Location: Stockholm** 
**Sweden** 




**Start Date: 15th May** 




**Duration:** 
 6-12 month paid internship
 



**This is a Paid Internship** 




  





 Shape your Business-IT consulting career at Tata Consultancy Services!
 



 As a strategic partner with more than 600,000 experts, we help companies across industries achieve their business goals and lead digital transformations to the finish line. Our customers include more than 30 Swedish companies across multiple sectors.
 



 TCS follows the Tata Group philosophy of building sustainable businesses that are rooted in the community and committed to the environment. Corporate sustainability is part of our triple aim: people, planet and purpose. Our focus is on reducing carbon emissions, using renewable energy and focusing on a regenerative approach to business. How do we make this possible? By creating greater awareness of the environment in which we live through collaboration with our employees, suppliers, customers and society at large.
 




 https://www.tcs.com/who-we-are/tcs-sustainable-business-carbon-neutrality
 




  





**Your perspectives** 



* Support the team in reviewing sustainability reports and regularly developing related approaches to advance corporate sustainability reporting and management
* Analyze the regulatory framework and standards for sustainability in the country and understand their impact on the business
* Develop and implement sustainability initiatives for the region related to the relevant SDGs.
* Coordinate various country initiatives
* Support country functions in the collection and analysis of reporting processes for non-financial information
* Collaborate with the sustainability team on research and advisory services related to strategy, organization and processes for sustainable value chains, impact measurement and data analysis
* Gain experience and insights from real-world projects in corporate and customer environments
* Study industry-specific initiatives and assist team with market development
* Prepare research papers and business presentations
* Participate in conferences to deepen understanding of topics such as energy transition, circular economy, food and biodiversity, etc.



  





**Your Qualifications** 



* Enrolled or just finished a bachelor’s or master’s program, at least in the 5th semester.
* Previous experience in the field of sustainability gained through seminar or project work, internships or extracurricular activities
* Understanding of key sustainability issues in the marketplace
* Passion for personal and professional development related to the SDGs and a strong sense of purpose.
* Strong research and analytical skills
* Ability to track and leverage industry, business and technology knowledge
* Enthusiasm for digital technologies
* Strong proficiency in the use of Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word).
* Organizational talent and coordination skills
* Openness to an international working environment
* Structured and independent way of working
* International experience is an advantage
* Business fluent in English and Swedish
* Availability from five to twelve months



  





**Does that sound interesting?** 




  





 You are welcome to submit your application consisting of your CV, personal letter, relevant degrees or certifications details, professional references, etc. We work with ongoing recruitment so send in your application as soon as possible.
 



  





 We look forward to receiving your application via LinkedIn or mail to
 **aswini.ranganathan@tcs.com** 




  





**Privacy Note: https://ibegin.tcs.com/iBegin/privacy-notice**

title: Founding Engagement Manager
description:
**Motorica is at a breakthrough moment.** 




  





 We are revolutionizing the game animation industry with products rooted in our proprietary AI models, delivering AAA quality character animations to game studios at a fraction of the traditional cost and time. We are scaling rapidly due to early demand from major game studios.
 



  





 Combining our proprietary motion capture data with state of the art diffusion models, Motorica lets teams generate dynamic, lifelike motion in minutes instead of weeks. We remove one of the biggest bottlenecks in game and cinematic production and empower studios to focus on creativity, iteration and building truly living worlds.
 



  





**The Role** 




 As our Founding Engagement Manager, you will be the architect of our customer journey and the driving force behind how we scale our most critical accounts. This is a critical, high-impact, "player-coach" role designed for a high-performer who thrives on building functions from scratch while maintaining a heavy operational presence.
 



  





 You will lay the blueprint and execute on building a customer engagement engine in a fast-growing startup; establishing GTM processes and engagement models that will define Motorica’s future.
 



  





 You’ll also act as our primary strategic partner to large enterprise customers, ensuring they achieve maximum long term success with Motorica.
 



  





**What You Will Do** 



* **Establish the Blueprint:** 
 Design and implement the frameworks for customer engagement, monitor customer health using metrics to proactively mitigate churn risk and drive retention.
* **Manage High-Stakes Relationships:** 
 Build and own deep, multi-threaded relationships with senior stakeholders at large enterprises, acting as their trusted advisor.
* **Drive Customer Engagement Excellence:** 
 Combine high-level strategy with a hands-on approach—you are just as comfortable defining a process to better our customers’ success as you are executing it.
* **Cross-functional Leadership:** 
 Work closely with Product, Go-to-market and ML teams to ensure the "Voice of the Customer" directly influences our GTM-engine, roadmap, technical development, and our company voice.
* **Commercial Growth:** 
 Identify and develop new opportunities within existing accounts: leading upsell conversations, expanding use cases, and partnering with customers to scale their adoption of our platform.
* **Scalability:** 
 Help shape scalable post-sales processes that blend high-touch relationships with data-driven operational excellence.



  





**Who You Are** 




 We believe the right person and mindset are more important than an exact career path. You are a high-performer with demonstrable growth one (or more) of the following backgrounds:
 


* GTM, CS, or Customer-facing roles where you have successfully driven and established new processes.
* Fast-growing Start-ups/Scale-ups where you’ve been a key player in building models from the ground up.
* Management Consulting with a focus on large enterprise clients and complex project delivery.



  





**Key Qualifications:** 



* **Limitless Curiosity:** 
 The love of learning is in your DNA, you seek not to merely acquire information, but obtain and teach knowledge.
* **Relationship Driven:** 
 You are genuinely motivated by building and managing high-stakes, complex relationships.
* **Strategic & Structural:** 
 You have the mental model to see the big picture and the discipline to build the structures needed to get there.
* **Driven Personality:** 
 You have a strong internal drive and a "get things done" attitude.
* **Comfortable with metrics:** 
 Data driven decisions , customer health, and outcomes over process.
* **Bonus:** 
 Experience from a SaaS company or the gaming industry is a plus, but not a requirement.
* **Bonus:** 
 Enterprise account management experience.



  





**Why Join Us?** 




 This is a truly unique chance to join a deep-tech AI company at a pivotal moment. You will have the autonomy to shape your own role and the future of the Engagement function. As we scale globally, you will be the one leading the way, working with the world’s most creative game studios to define a new era of generative animation.

title: It-arkitekt infrastruktur till digitala plånboken
description:
**Professional Galaxy** 
 är ett IT- och teknikkonsultbolag som tillhandahåller högspecialiserad kompetens inom IT, mjukvaruutveckling, SAP, inköp, elektronik och mekanisk konstruktion. Vi samarbetar med erfarna seniora experter och levererar strategiskt värdeskapande kompetens till några av Sveriges mest komplexa och analytiskt krävande projekt. Vårt fokus ligger alltid på hög kvalitet, professionalism och tydliga, mätbara resultat.
   

  

 Vi söker en
 **It-arkitekt infrastruktur till digitala plånboken**
**Kravprofil**
 Vi söker en It-arkitekt (nivå 3) med erfarenhet av infrastruktur och drift för tekniskt avancerade tillämpningar med höga krav på säkerhet. Rollen innebär ansvar för utformning av infrastruktur och driftsmiljöer som är robusta, resilienta och säkerhetsklassade.
   

  

**SKALL-KRAV**
 Konsulten ska ha:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av roller med stort ansvar för leverans inom infrastruktur
* Erfarenhet av att driva arbete med it-arkitektur inom infrastruktur, självständigt och i team
* Erfarenhet av att utforma infrastruktur och driftsmiljöer för tekniskt avancerade tillämpningar
* Erfarenhet av att tillämpa standarder, ramverk och best practices för säkerhet inom infrastruktur, t.ex. ISO 2700X, NIST
* Erfarenhet av att utforma infrastrukturer med höga krav på robusthet och resiliens
* Erfarenhet av infrastrukturer för geografiskt distribuerade driftsmiljöer
* Tala och skriva svenska och engelska obehindrat


**MERITERANDE**
 Konsulten bör ha:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av hybridlösningar (on-prem + moln)
* Erfarenhet av certifikathantering, nycklar och HSM
* Erfarenhet av behörighetslösningar för åtkomst och auktorisation (IAM)


**Övrigt**
* Omfattning: 100%
* Avtalslängd: 2026-06-01 – 2027-05-31, med möjlighet till förlängning upp till 2028-05-31
* Stationeringsort: Stockholm eller Sundsvall, minst 2 dagar/vecka fram till 2026-12-31, därefter 3 dagar/vecka eller mer vid behov
* Uppdragsstart: 2026-06-01
* Distansarbete: Nej
* Uppdragslängd: 12 månader


 Svar önskas senast
 **2026-04-19**
 Är du rätt person för uppdraget, eller vill du rekommendera en stark kandidat? Tveka inte att kontakta oss.
   

  

 Ansök gärna redan idag, urval och intervjuer sker löpande.
   

  

 Ansök genom att bifoga ditt CV (vi vill inte ha något personligt brev) och besvara urvalsfrågorna. Frågorna utgår från kravprofilen för den här rekryteringen och dina svar ligger till grund för det urval som sker i processen. Att besvara frågorna är en förutsättning för att din ansökan ska anses komplett.
   

  

 Vänligen notera att krav och eventuella meriter ska vara uppfyllda vid ansökningstillfället.

title: Upphandlings-och avtalsjurist inom it och digitalisering
description:
Stockholm – vår huvudstad med miljoner drömmar, förväntningar och ambitioner. Vi jobbar för alla som lever här idag och i framtiden. Nu söker vi dig som vill tänka stort, nytt och annorlunda med oss – för stockholmarna.
   

  

 Stadsledningskontoret är kommunstyrelsens förvaltning. Vi ansvarar för styrning, uppföljning och utveckling av stadens verksamheter utifrån den vision och budget som kommunfullmäktige har beslutat om. Vi är drygt 350 anställda som i huvudsak arbetar med strategiska frågor som har stor betydelse för stadens verksamheter.
   

  

**Välkommen till oss**
 Stadens strategiska it-verksamhet leds och styrs av stadsledningskontorets avdelning för it och digitalisering. Vi förvaltar och utvecklar en ändamålsenlig it-miljö och skapar förutsättningar för morgondagens digitalisering. Vi upphandlar och förvaltar även några av Sveriges största it- och outsorcingavtal, med fokus att hitta effektiva och hållbara lösningar i en avtalsmässigt komplex situation. Vi strävar efter att uppnå hög kvalitet i våra it-leveranser genom att utforma avtal som säkerställer verksamheternas behov samtidigt som de är affärsmässiga, kostnadseffektiva och hållbara.
   

  

**En Hälsning Från Din Blivande Chef**
 Jag heter Emma Wahlin och det är jag som är din blivande chef. Som chef är jag engagerad, tydlig och har stort förtroende för mina medarbetare. Jag vill att vår enhet ska vara en plats där vi hjälps åt att nå våra gemensamma mål samtidigt som vi kan ha roligt tillsammans. För mig är det viktigt att du som medarbetare ständigt utvecklas i din roll och ditt uppdrag.
   

  

**Vi erbjuder**
* stora möjligheter till att bidra till samhällsnytta och vara med och skapa morgondagens Stockholm
* en kreativ arbetsplats där kompetens och samarbete är en viktig grund för arbetsglädje och goda resultat.
* tydliga mål och ansvarsområden där ett stort eget ansvar råder
* goda kompetensutvecklingsmöjligheter
* stort nätverk inom Stockholms stad med många samarbetsytor.
* flexibel arbetstid och friskvårdsbidrag, med träningslokaler i nära anslutning till arbetsplatsen. Läs mer om våra förmåner här.


**Din roll**
 Som upphandlings- och avtalsjurist kommer du att ha en nyckelroll inom avdelningen och arbeta med såväl stora och komplexa upphandlingar inom it och digitalisering som kommersiella förändringar, genomföra förhandlingar, skriva avtalstexter och vara rådgivande överlag kring upphandlingsjuridiska frågor. Du kommer även ta fram mallar och stöttande dokument inom området. Vidare kommer du att samverka och arbeta tätt tillsammans med andra expertkompetenser inom staden, till exempel upphandlare, avtalsjurister, informationssäkerhetsexperter, objektledare och andra relevanta roller kring it-inköp.
   

  

**Din kompetens och erfarenhet**
 Vi söker dig som har
   

  

* juristexamen (jur.kand.) eller motsvarande akademisk utbildning inom juridik som vi bedömer likvärdig
* flera års aktuell och relevant erfarenhet av LOU
* dokumenterad erfarenhet av att ge juridisk rådgivning och kvalitetssäkra upphandlingsdokument
* god förståelse för immaterialrättsliga och avtalsrättsliga frågor inom it-området
* mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och i skrift.


 Det är meriterande om du har
   

  

* erfarenhet av att upprätta, granska och förhandla it-avtal i större organisationer, myndighet eller offentlig sektor
* erfarenhet av att ha jobbat som upphandlingsjurist på upphandlande myndighet eller enhet
* erfarenhet av avtalsförhandling i offentlig eller privat sektor
* kunskaper om pm3 och ITIL.


 Vi lägger stor vikt vid nedan personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 Du har förmåga att se till
 *helheten* 
 och förstår hur upphandlingar påverkar verksamheten i stort och väger samman verksamhetsmässiga perspektiv för att bidra till långsiktigt hållbara lösningar. Du trivs i en roll med många kontaktytor och
 *samarbetar* 
 effektivt med kollegor, beställare och leverantörer. Genom ett prestigelöst förhållningssätt bygger du förtroende och bidrar till ett gott arbetsklimat. Du är
 *modig* 
 , vågar stå för dina bedömningar och driva frågor framåt även i komplexa eller utmanande situationer. Du kan förklara juridiska resonemang på ett lättförståeligt sätt och anpassar din
 *kommunikation* 
 efter mottagare och situation.
   

  

**Övrigt**
 Vi rekryterar utan det personliga brevet i denna rekrytering för att stärka fokus på de kompetenser och erfarenheter som efterfrågas för denna roll. Vid bedömningen av din ansökan kommer vi endast att utgå ifrån ditt CV och ett antal frågor du får besvara i samband med att du söker tjänsten. Vi önskar att du svarar konkret och kortfattat på frågorna, och att det finns en tydlig koppling mellan dina svar och ditt CV.
   

  

 Intervjuer kommer preliminärt hållas vecka 18-20.
   

  

 Vi ser mångfald som berikande och välkomnar alla sökande.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

 Stockholms stad arbetar med kompetensbaserad rekrytering som syftar till att se till varje persons kompetens och därmed motverka diskriminering.
   

  

 Anställningsform Tillsvidareanställning Anställningens omfattning Heltid Tillträde Enligt överenskommelse Löneform Månadslön Antal lediga befattningar 1 Sysselsättningsgrad 100% Ort Stockholm Län Stockholms län Land Sverige Referensnummer 2026/1467 Kontakt Flora Trast, Rekryteringskonsult, flora.trast@stockholm.seEmma Wahlin, Rekryterande chef, emma.wahlin.2@stockholm.se Facklig företrädare Andreas Meschke, SACO, 08-50829589, andreas.meschke@stockholm.seKatina Staf, Vision, 08-50829192, katina.staf@stockholm.seJan Svensson, DIK, 0850829321, jan.svensson@stockholm.se Publicerat 2026-04-07 Sista ansökningsdag 2026-04-23

title: Konsult – Workplace Technician Windows, Stockholm
description:
**Bli Workplace Technician hos vår kund i Stockholm och jobba med ny klienthantering och bidra till en stabil digital arbetsplats!**
 I rollen som Workplace Technician – Windows & Device Management för vår kund i Stockholm kliver du in i ett viktigt konsultuppdrag där dina färdigheter inom klienthantering, device management och Windows-miljöer verkligen kommer till sin rätt. Du blir en nyckelperson där du arbetar med att stötta både drift och projekt inom Modern Workspace, med särskilt fokus på Windows-baserad Device Management i en 3rd line-kontext.
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig**
 Som Workplace Technician Får Du Ansvar För Att Hantera Och Vidareutveckla Lösningar Inom SCCM (MECM) Och Intune, Säkerställa Klienternas Säkerhet Och Funktion Samt Bidra Till Effektiva Och Hållbara Arbetsplatslösningar. Här Får Du Utvecklas Tekniskt, Bygga Djup Kompetens Inom Moderna Klientplattformar. Du Erbjuds Också
   

  

* En betydelsefull roll i en modern arbetsplatsmiljö där dina kunskaper inom klienthantering och device management gör skillnad.
* En kultur som värderar samarbete, lärande och teknisk utveckling – som Workplace Technician blir du del av ett kompetent team.
* Möjlighet att växa och bredda dig inom Intune, SCCM, säkerhet och automation.
* Flexibla arbetsformer och moderna verktyg som stödjer dig i rollen som Workplace Technician.


**Det här gör du hos oss**
* Tar ägarskap för klientrelaterade ärenden och projekt som Workplace Technician – Windows & Device Management.
* Arbetar med Windows-baserad Device Management i Intune och SCCM (MECM) i rollen som Workplace Technician.
* Hanterar applikationsdistribution, OS deployment, patchning och rapportering som Workplace Technician.
* Säkerställer klienternas säkerhet, konfiguration och efterlevnad i rollen som Workplace Technician.
* Arbetar med Azure tenant, OS images och driver packs för att optimera klientmiljöer som Workplace Technician.
* Hanterar och administrerar Active Directory, konton och grupper som Workplace Technician.
* Arbetar med GPO-hantering och bidrar till standardisering av klientplattformen som Workplace Technician.
* Samarbetar med andra tekniska team i drift och projekt för att säkerställa stabila leveranser som Workplace Technician.


**Ditt team och arbetsplats**
 Du blir en del av ett 3rd line-team med fokus på Modern Workspace och klienthantering i en komplex och verksamhetskritisk IT-miljö. Du arbetar nära både drift- och projektorganisationen samt samarbetar med andra specialistteam inom infrastruktur och applikation. Basplatsen är i Stockholm – möjlighet till viss distans eller hybridarbete kan förekomma.
   

  

**Mer om dig**
* Goda kunskaper inom Intune, Azure tenant, OS image, driver packs och klient­säkerhet.
* Erfarenhet av SCCM (MECM), särskilt inom applikationsdistribution, OS deployment, patchning och rapportering.
* Erfarenhet av arbete med Windows klientmiljöer.
* Kunskap inom GPO-hantering.
* Förståelse för paketering och applikationshantering.
* Erfarenhet av Active Directory och hantering av konton och grupper.
* Proaktiv, strukturerad och lösningsorienterad med god samarbetsförmåga.
* Flytande svenska och engelska.


 Vi söker konsulter som är tillgängliga omgående, men vi ser också att vi kommer ha behov framåt så hör gärna av dig eller gör en ansökan om du också kommer vara tillgänglig längre fram. Vi har dig gärna i vårt nätverk för framtida uppdrag!
   

  

**Så här får vi kontakt**
 Detta är ett konsultuppdrag där du antingen blir anställd av oss på Ada Digital eller anlitas som underkonsult, beroende på vilken lösning som passar dig bäst. I tillsättningen strävar vi efter att ge dig en transparent, inkluderande och snabbrörlig rekryteringsupplevelse. Och vi vill veta mer om dig och din potential! För att ansöka behöver du inte bifoga några dokument. Skriv istället en kort motivering och bifoga din LinkedIn-profil. Urval kommer sker löpande och uppdraget kan bli tillsatt före sista ansökningsdatum. Är du nyfiken och vill veta mer innan du söker? Hör av dig till ansvarig rekryterare. Vi ser fram emot att få kontakt med dig!

title: Growth & Marketing
description:
We are building Eijra, a new way for people to see, understand, and manage their insurance. We are now looking for someone who wants to take ownership of growth from day one. This is a hands-on role where you will work directly with the founders and shape how the company acquires users and builds momentum.
 


  

 Tasks
   


 You will drive the day-to-day execution of growth. This includes creating and distributing content, running outreach across channels such as LinkedIn and email, and testing different acquisition strategies. A central part of the role is identifying what works, doubling down on it, and continuously iterating. You will also contribute to positioning, messaging, and how the product is presented externally.
 


  

 Requirements
   


 You are comfortable operating without a predefined structure and can take initiative in an ambiguous environment. You have a strong interest in startups, growth, and user acquisition, and you think in terms of experimentation and iteration. Execution speed, judgment, and ownership matter more than formal credentials or years of experience.
 


  

 Benefits
   


 You will be part of a small, focused team with high ambition and direct access to decision-making. The role offers significant responsibility from the start and the opportunity to shape both the growth engine and the brand of the company. You will gain first-hand experience of how an early-stage company is built and scaled.

title: Electrical Project Manager
company: GEDON™ | Commercial & Executive Search for the Built Environment
description:
**COMPANY OVERVIEW** 




 Our client is a leading international contractor with an established and growing reputation for delivering complex, large-scale data centre and mission-critical projects across Europe. The business has built deep expertise in the electrical and mechanical engineering aspects of hyperscale data centre construction, working alongside some of the world's most active technology clients and developers to bring major programmes to completion on time and to the highest technical standards.
 



  





 With a strong footprint across multiple European markets, the company has positioned itself as a contractor of choice for clients operating at the very top end of the data centre sector. Their work is characterised by technical depth, commercial rigour and a consistent focus on quality and programme — qualities that have driven long-standing client relationships and a sustained pipeline of repeat business.
 



  





 The business is currently in an active phase of growth, with a significant number of projects at various stages of delivery across the continent. This expansion is creating strong demand for experienced project professionals who can operate at a senior level and contribute immediately to live project delivery. It is a business where high performers are recognised, supported and given the platform to grow their careers in a genuinely international environment.
 



  





  





  





**WORKING ENVIRONMENT & PROJECTS** 




 You will be embedded within the project delivery team on a major hyperscale data centre programme in Sweden, taking ownership of the electrical package from pre-construction through to final commissioning and handover. These are complex, fast-moving projects with significant technical and commercial scope, requiring close coordination between electrical, mechanical, civil and commissioning teams throughout the build.
 



  





 The working culture is delivery-focused and collaborative, with strong emphasis on quality, safety and programme adherence. You will be working alongside experienced engineers and project managers, and will have direct access to senior leadership who are actively engaged in project delivery. It is an environment that rewards technical capability and ownership, and where you will be given genuine responsibility from day one.
 



  





 Sweden has emerged as one of the most active data centre markets in Europe, driven by its energy infrastructure, connectivity and climate advantages. Working here offers excellent professional exposure and the opportunity to be involved in projects that are shaping the next generation of digital infrastructure across the continent. For the right candidate, this is a role that offers both immediate impact and long-term career development.
 



  





  





  





**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES** 



* Manage the delivery of electrical packages on hyperscale data centre projects from pre-construction planning through to commissioning and handover
* Oversee and coordinate electrical subcontractors, ensuring works are delivered on programme, within budget and to the required quality standards
* Develop and maintain detailed construction programmes, look-ahead schedules and resource plans for the electrical scope
* Manage the interface between electrical and other trades including mechanical, civil and commissioning teams
* Monitor and report on programme, cost and quality performance, escalating risks and issues as required
* Ensure all electrical works are carried out in full compliance with health, safety and technical standards
* Manage RFIs, technical submittals, change control and site instructions relating to the electrical package
* Engage with clients, design teams and key stakeholders, maintaining strong working relationships throughout delivery



  





  





  





**WHAT YOU NEED** 



* Proven experience as a Project Manager or Electrical Project Manager on mission-critical, data centre or complex MEP projects
* Strong electrical engineering background with a solid understanding of HV/LV systems, power distribution and data centre electrical infrastructure
* Experience managing subcontractors and multidisciplinary teams on large, fast-paced construction programmes
* Solid commercial awareness with the ability to manage budgets, programmes and change processes effectively
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills across both technical and non-technical audiences
* Comfortable working on international project sites and operating within multicultural team environments
* Relevant engineering qualification or equivalent professional experience



  





  





  





**WHAT YOU'LL GET IN RETURN** 




 This role offers a competitive package of circa £120,000 alongside a strong suite of benefits suited to international project work. Beyond the financials, you will gain unrivalled exposure to hyperscale data centre delivery at a European level, working on projects that are among the most technically complex and commercially significant in the sector. For a driven electrical project professional looking to advance their career on the international stage, this is an exceptional opportunity.
 



  





  





  





**HOW TO APPLY** 




 To apply for this role, please submit an updated CV via the Apply Now button, or contact Mick Donaghy directly on email mick@gedonexecutive.com or 0452 549 639 for a confidential discussion about the opportunity.

title: OT/IT Security Service Manager Smelters
description:
**Boliden is a high-tech metals company with its own mines and smelters that works long-term to guarantee society's access to base and precious metals. For a century, our work has been part of the value chains that have shaped modern society. At Boliden, we know that the metals we mine and make available will continue to play a crucial role in the future – what matters is how we produce them. Become a part of us and drive change for generations to come.**
**Your opportunity:**
 We are looking for a driven and skilled OT/IT Security Service Manager to join our team at Boliden. In this role, you will play a vital part in safeguarding, improving, and maintaining a high level of security across our smelters and related OT/IT environments. By combining your technical expertise with close collaboration across operations and security, you will help identify risks and implement effective, sustainable protective measures. You will work in a dynamic environment where you can influence how security is developed and strengthened within Boliden’s smelters.
   

  

**Who you will work with:**
 You will act as a bridge between operational needs and security requirements, working closely with mine operations as well as local and central IT Security and Infrastructure teams and external partners. Together you ensure that solutions fit seamlessly into our overall OT/IT landscape while upholding standards for reliability, safety and performance. The role is based at the office with regular presence at our sites as needed.
   

  

**What you will do:**
* Work with a talented team of IT professionals dedicated to delivering a high level of service and support.
* Identify, assess and prioritize security risks within OT systems and networks.
* Troubleshoot OT network/security issues and provide timely resolutions to minimize downtime and disruptions.
* Collaborate in cross-functional projects and take a key role in identifying improvement areas and implementing enhancements.
* Stay up to date with relevant security trends, threats and best practice and keep documentation current.
* Develop and implement risk-based security strategies, standards and protocols.
* Conduct or coordinate security audits/assessments and participate in a security task force/incident repsonse when needed.
* Collaborate with external partners and suppliers to ensure compliance with our security standards and secure integrations.


**What you bring:**
 We are looking for a proactive and solution-oriented professional who thrives in a collaborative environment, has a high level of integrity and takes ownership of responsibilities. You combine analytical thinking with communication skills and you have the ability to adapt to changing environments and manage multiple priorities.
   

  

 We believe you have:
   

  

* Relevant education in OT/IT security or related field or equivalent practical experience.
* Experience working with IT related security solutions, tools and frameworks.
* Broad experience in security patch management and vulnerability remediation.
* Hands-on experience with network security, encryption technologies, and firewalls.
* Ability to work independently and collaboratively in cross-functional teams.
* Experience with agile working methods and project participation.
* Analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail.
* A passion for learning and staying updated on emerging technologies and best practices.
* Communication skills and the ability to explain technical concepts to stakeholders.
* Proficiency in English written and spoken, Swedish is an advantage.
* Driving license


**Preferred:**
* Experience in industrial/OT environments
* Familiarity with frameworks such as NIST or ISO 27001
* Experience working in agile or project-based environments


**Success in this role**
 In this role, you will:
   

  

* Reduce vulnerabilities and improve the security posture across IT/OT environments
* Strengthen collaboration between IT, security, and operations
* Contribute to faster and more effective incident response
* Help establish scalable and sustainable security practices


**Why work with us:**
 We believe in promoting a workplace where care, courage, and responsibility are central to everything we do. We offer a workplace where we believe in collaboration and where what you contribute will have a direct impact on future generations. We are a company made up of responsible and creative people all working towards the same vision; to become the most sustainable and respected metal supplier in the world.
   

  

**Apply today to be part of something truly meaningful!**
 At Boliden, diversity and inclusion are drivers of innovation. We know that different perspectives and experiences strengthen us and help us stay at the forefront of an important and exciting industry. Therefore, we encourage applications from people with diverse backgrounds and viewpoints. Together, we have built a workplace where everyone can feel safe and inspired to reach their full potential.
   

  

 Want to know more about the position? Contact hiring manager, Yalda Hosseini at Yalda.Hosseini@boliden.com
   

  

 Questions about applying are answered by our Talent Acquisition Partner, Jessica Grönwall at jessica.gronwall@ext.boliden.com
   

  

 For union information contact Mats Lindblom, SACO, +46 73 350 04 19, Andreas Mårtensson, Unionen, +46 70 541 83 93 or Peter Markström, Ledarna, +46 910 77 40 09.
   

  

**Submit your application by the 4th of May 2026**
*If you are a representative of a recruiting company, please refrain from contacting us about this advertisement. We appreciate your consideration.*
 Important! If you are a current employee within Boliden you shouldn't complete the application at this site, please log on to your Workday account and apply through "Find Jobs".

title: Technical Team Lead
description:
TECH LEAD
 



  





 We have invented a solar cell technology that enables endless energy, Powerfoyle. Not only will it change the world, but it also means you will work with leading technology, science, and machines – all under the same roof in our urban factories. We are passionate about the potential of our technology to make products better and easier to use. We build the next generation of clean green industry and unite in the vision of touching the lives of a billion people.
 



  





 WHO WE ARE
 



 We are on an exciting journey to bring our groundbreaking solar cell technology to the world. A novel technology means that most of what we do has never been done before. It’s challenging to create something new, and at Exeger we embrace that challenge with grit and passion, because we know that what we do matters.
 



  





 YOU WILL DO
 



 You will join the Software and Mechatronics team within the Industrialization department that provides machines for manufacturing the unique Exeger material. Hands-on the department works with acquiring machines, modifying off-the shelf machinery, and developing tailormade machines, measurement devices and other technical solutions. Our processes cover a wide field of areas, from lasers to high vacuums.
 



  





 You will develop software and own the architecture to collect data and interact with our production machinery as well as have an higher level oversight of all software activities in the company. This is a hands-on role that combines personal delivery with people management, so we believe you’ve previously mentored or lead individuals or small development teams. You will act as the glue between lower-level development (PLCs) and the higher-level software architecture (.NET).
 



 Please note that this role requires on-site availability.
 



  





 WHAT WILL YOU OWN
 



 The full software platform: front-end, back-end and data pipelines.
 



 Technical architecture and tooling decisions: you choose how software should be built.
 



 Team decisions: you get to build and develop the team and help them with day-to-day operations.
 



  





 WHO ARE WE LOOKING FOR?
 



 Our Software and Mechatronics team within the Industrialization department is now looking for a Tech Lead. We believe you like working independently in a fluid environment, in cooperation with colleagues from many different fields. You exercise sound judgement as well as initiative. You like making things work and are comfortable with delegate responsibility. Personality wise you are alert, inquisitive, positive, self-motivated, and entrepreneurial.
 



  





 We are looking for someone who combines deep industrial knowledge in the field of mechatronics, expertise in modern software development and a passion for people.
 



  





 We focus as much on personality/cultural fit as on your merits but know that you will have a better chance at succeeding in this role if you have experience from:
 



 – Engineering degree in the field of Mechatronics, Software development or equivalent
 



 – Experience designing and building production machinery, including the use of industrial AI for automation, optimization, or monitoring in industrial settings.
 



 – Experience working with PLCs. Either programming PLCs directly or building software to interact with PLCs.
 



 – Strong .NET experience (or at least willingness to work in it)
 



 – Experience with Data pipelines and data analytics
 



 – Experience with industrial communication protocols such as OPC-UA, ModBus, MQTT, etc.
 



 – Strong people skills and previous experience in leading or mentoring other developers.
 



 – Professional fluency in written and spoken English
 



  





 If you also have any of the experiences below it is considered meriting:
 



 – Familiar with volume manufacturing and industry
 



 – Experience with modern IIoT -concepts
 



 – Experience with robotics and robot controllers such as ABB, Yaskawa, Staubli, etc.
 



 – Experience with machine vision systems
 



 – Experience with both SQL and noSQL solutions (Elastic, MongoDB, postgre)
 



 – Project management
 



  





 EXEGERIANS
 



 At Exeger we are many things, innovators and industrialists, visionaries and doers. By combining different perspectives and skills, we push the boundaries of science and technology while always focusing on the common goal and vision. Our behavior expectations support and boost the Employeeship which is all about acting curious, determined, responsible and being yourself.
 



  





 WHAT NOW
 



 Please send your application via Exeger’s career page. When you have applied, an automized confirmation e-mail will be sent to you. The hiring team will then review all applicants and if selected to the next step, you will be invited for interviews together with hiring manager and/or team. Cases or scenarios might be used during the process. Reference- and background check is mandatory.
 



  





 EXEGER & POWERFOYLE
 



 Exeger is a Swedish company with a unique solar cell technology that converts all forms of light into electrical energy. This material, Powerfoyle, is the world’s only fully customizable solar cell. With its superior design properties, it can be integrated seamlessly into any electronic device. Powerfoyle enhances every product it is integrated into with extended or even unlimited battery life, putting the power of cutting-edge solar cell technology directly in the hands of people. Exeger is leading the way to energy independence through more sustainable and user-friendly products.

title: Senior Engineering Manager
description:
**Craft:**
**Job Description:**
**Senior Engineering Manager | Game Production – Infrastructure**
**Your role within our Kingdom**
 We are looking for a
 **Senior Engineering Manager** 
 to lead our
 **Infrastructure / Developer’s Platform** 
 group within Game Production. This organization provides the platforms and services that hundreds of King developers rely on every day to build, test, ship, and operate games at scale for hundreds of millions of players around the world.
   

  

 You will be combining strong people leadership with the ability to drive multi-team outcomes across a complex stakeholder landscape. The scope includes our
 **Build & CI platform** 
 and critical developer services such as
 **code repositories (GitHub Enterprise)** 
 ,
 **artifact repositories (Artifactory)** 
 ,
 **asset repository workflows (Perforce)** 
 , and other developer productivity services.
   

  

 Your mission is to make engineering work faster, safer, and more reliable: reducing cycle time and failures, increasing developer self-service, and driving standardization that scales across studios. You should be proactive and self driven.
   

  

 Skills to create thrills
   

  

 People leadership and team health
   

  

* Lead, coach, and develop a high-performing organization; grow managers and senior engineers into strong leaders.
* Build a strong hiring and onboarding pipeline; retain talent through clear career paths and meaningful growth opportunities.
* Create a culture of ownership, psychological safety, accountability, and continuous improvement.


 Platform strategy and delivery
   

  

* Set a clear vision and roadmap for Infrastructure / Developer Platforms aligned with game production needs and company priorities.
* Work with the team on creating a strategy to consolidate old legacy systems and unify our platforms across game studios.
* Translate strategy into executable plans: milestones, resourcing, delivery cadence, and measurable success criteria.
* Drive convergence through platform standards and “golden paths,” reducing fragmentation and long-term maintenance cost.


 Ownership of core developer services
   

  

* Own the reliability, security, and scalability of core developer systems.
* Improve service operations: availability, performance, access controls, compliance, cost efficiency, and user self-service.
* Partner with Security/IT/IAM and other platform teams to ensure strong governance with low friction for developers.


 Modernization and operational excellence
   

  

* Lead modernization initiatives across CI/build tooling and developer services, including migrations and deprecation of legacy solutions.
* Strengthen operational practices: observability, incident management, post-incident learning, and preventative reliability work.
* Reduce developer toil by eliminating recurring pain points and investing in automation and self-service capabilities.


 Outcomes, metrics, and stakeholder leadership
   

  

* Be proactive and self-driven: continuously identify opportunities, propose improvements, and run lightweight experiments to validate impact and drive change.
* Define and track KPIs that reflect real developer impact (e.g., cycle time, failure rate, flakiness, MTTR, satisfaction, service availability).
* Communicate clearly with leadership and stakeholders; align priorities, manage trade-offs, and deliver predictable outcomes.
* Build strong partnerships with game teams, ensuring the platform roadmap reflects real needs and adoption is successful.


**About King**
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.

title: Sales Intern
description:
**Role: Internship – Sales** 




**Location: Stockholm, Sweden** 




**Start Date: As soon as possible** 




**Duration: 6-12 month paid internship** 




**Employment Type: Fixed term Paid Internship** 




  









**Shape your Business** 




  





 IT consulting career at an exceptional company:
 **Tata Consultancy Services** 
 (TCS). With more than 600,000 employees globally, we work with leading companies across industries helping them achieve their business goals and lead their digital transformation.
 



  





**Your perspectives** 




  





 As Sales Intern, be a member of a high performing team that works closely to grow profitable business in the Sweden. You will support the Sweden Sales team with sales activities in, for example:
 


* Conduct market research and create perspectives on sales opportunities in Sweden
* Maintain summary on key business transactions across sectors in Sweden
* Follow business and technological publications and newspapers that cover TCS’ target industries
* Understand TCS’ Business & Technology solutions, platforms, frameworks and tools
* Help the sales team develop tailored value propositions for target customers
* Participate in tenders, prepare research papers and business presentations
* Help to develop TCS’ business with new and existing customers across sectors
* Gain hands-on experience and insights from real-world sales projects in corporate and customer environments
* Understand what it means to create customer delight and earn industry leading CSAT scores
* Drive marketing & branding initiatives jointly with TCS marketing colleagues and regional leadership
* Support to build and establish new business partnerships.



  





**Your Qualifications:** 



* Enrollment in a Bachelor's degree program (at least in the 5th semester), or in a Master's degree program.
* Strong research and analytical skills. Ability to analyse data and create meaningful inferences. Ability to create future scenarios based on current data sets.
* Previous experience in the field of IT, business operations or corporate strategy, gained through project work, internships or extracurricular activities is beneficial.
* Understanding of B2B sales process, especially in the IT industry
* Ability to track and leverage business and technology trends
* Strong research and analytical skills
* Business fluent in English and Swedish languages
* Proficiency in the use of Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word).
* Strong communication skills
* Strong interest in an international working environment
* Structured and independent way of working
* Availability for the position from six to twelve months



  





**Does that sound interesting?** 




 You are welcome to submit your application consisting of your CV, personal letter, relevant degrees or certifications details, professional references, etc. We work with ongoing recruitment so send in your application as soon as possible.
 



 We look forward to receiving your application via LinkedIn
 







**About TCS** 




  





 TCS ranks amongst global top 3 technology consulting companies across multiple parameters: revenues, employees, market valuation and brand value. In Sweden we work with more than 50 companies who are leaders in their own space. With them we have long term and trustful relationships. TCS in Sweden and Nordics has been ranked as a Top Employer for 12 consecutive years that reflects the organization’s commitment to an inclusive, empowered and entrepreneurial work culture.
 



  





 At Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) Europe, we believe in the power of technology to build a better future for Europe. Our Corporate Affairs division plays a key role in shaping this future by promoting strong relationships with governments, institutions, and communities across the continent. We are committed to responsible business practices, thought leadership, and active engagement in policy discussions that impact our industry and the communities we serve within the European Union.
 



  





 With a history of over 45 years in Europe, TCS is a transformation partner for companies in industries that range from banking and retail to insurance and travel. Our agile and diverse workforce is distributed in 62 offices across Europe.
 


* TCS has been ranked number 1 in Customer Satisfaction in Europe for 12 consecutive years.
* TCS has been named Top Employer in Europe for 13 consecutive years
* TCS has been recognized as one of the world’s Top 50 Brands by Kantar BrandZ in 2025
* 80,000 associates are supporting clients in Europe.



 For more information, visit
 **www.tcs.com** 




  





  





**Privacy Note:** 




**https://ibegin.tcs.com/iBegin/privacy-notice**

title: DevOps Engineer - Tieto Caretech (m/f/d)
description:
**Job Description**
**At Tieto Caretech you’ll get a chance to provide patients and end users with product offerings that help them in their life, reinventing the world for good. If that sounds interesting, please keep on reading.**
**About Us**
 Tieto Caretech is modernizing the Nordic health and social care sector with modular, open, and interoperable software. We develop and deliver high quality software solutions and services that enable healthcare and welfare professionals to do their work even better and with higher efficiency - have more time to care.
   

  

 We are a global team of professionals working on providing products and services to different sectors from intensive care to laboratory and social care. In addition to working closely with our customers, we also have our own products that we build and develop for various fields in society. From enabling healthcare professionals to spend more valuable time with their patients to providing data for professional athletes to achieve even better results, we make all that possible. With us you can build technology for the good of society and make your mark on the health and wellbeing of people in need.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We work in an agile, multinational organization that develops cutting-edge products and services for both public and private sectors across the Nordic countries. Our teams are committed to creating, supporting, and delivering modern solutions used by healthcare and social care professionals throughout the region.
   

  

 We are now looking for DevOps Engineers for our Lifecare Open Platform and Clinical Core Solution Operations team to work on our OpenEHR products. Your daily work consists of delivering and deploying our solutions to our customers and providing support in case of needed.
   

  

**In this role you will**
* Participate in delivering and deploying our products to different customers
* Participate in supporting our customers in case needed


**We are looking for someone with**
* Strong understanding of containerization technologies (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes)
* Experience with infrastructure automation and orchestration tools (e.g., Terraform, Ansible, Helm)
* Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and version control systems (e.g., Git, Jenkins, GitLab, Azure DevOps)
* Proficiency in scripting and automation (e.g., Python, Bash, PowerShell)
* Familiarity with monitoring, logging, and alerting tools (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack, OpenTelemetry)


**We expect you to have a**
* Strong understanding of customer needs and expectations
* Ability to troubleshoot and resolve issues across infrastructure and application layers
* Ability to document and present complex solutions to stakeholders
* Capability to analyze complex systems with an end-to-end approach


**It would be beneficial if you also have**
* Proven experience working directly with customers
* SW development experience


**As a person you are**
* Eager to develop yourself and learn
* Good team player, attention to detail and you have ability to work well with others
* Able to support and consulting clients or internal teams


**What’s in it for you?**
 With us you will be part of the important and meaningful work of developing healthcare for all of us. You have an important mission to make a difference that really matters. In addition, as a company we offer you professional growth, open and friendly culture, and an outstanding work-life balance! We believe that our organizational culture is an important part of enabling you to be successful. We provide a flexible hybrid work model as part of our culture and way of working.
   

  

 Finally, we also believe in curiosity and learning as a lifestyle. We want to encourage you to keep up that curiosity and deepen your knowledge on topics you’re interested in. For example, we host a ‘Keep Learning Week’ twice a year, a week where everyone at Tieto has the possibility to join different training courses in a truly global setting.
   

  

**Could you be our new colleague?**
 We look forward to hearing from you! We will fill the position as soon as we find the right person, so we encourage you to apply today. If you have any questions regarding this role, please contact the hiring manager Timo Heikkilä (timo.j.heikkila@tieto.com)
   

  

*We perform background checks on all final candidates.*
*Tieto declines calls from recruitment companies.*
 Additional Information
   

  

 At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.
   

  

 Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)

title: Business Analyst - Banking
description:
**The Company**
 Cognizant (NASDAQ:CTSH) is a leading provider of information technology, consulting, and business process outsourcing services, dedicated to helping the world's leading companies build stronger businesses. Headquartered in Teaneck, New Jersey (U.S.), Cognizant has over 340,000 employees as of January 2025. Cognizant is a member of the NASDAQ-100, the S&P 500, the Forbes Global 1000, and the Fortune 500 and is ranked among the top performing and fastest growing companies in the world.
   

  

**About Cognizant Consulting**
 To be digital, companies today must have organizational velocity approaching speed of light while providing individualized offerings that result in fanatical levels of customer satisfaction—all with laser-focused cost control. And from applications to infrastructure, processes to operational models and interfaces to experiences—there are digital forces driving change in every part of our clients’ organization. At Cognizant, our consultants orchestrate the capabilities to truly change the game—across strategy, design, technology and industry/functional knowledge to deliver insight at speed and solutions at scale. Our approach is built around elevating business understanding of the aspirations and unique abilities of customers and employees and by building these relationships based on trust and value.
   

  

 More information? Please visit https://www.cognizant.com/consulting
   

  

**Job Description**
 Join our dynamic team as a Consulting Analyst where you will leverage your expertise in business analysis to drive impactful solutions. With a hybrid work model you will collaborate with cross-functional teams to enhance business processes and strategies. Your contributions will play a vital role in achieving organizational goals and fostering innovation.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Analyze business requirements to develop effective solutions that align with organizational objectives
* Collaborate with stakeholders to gather and document detailed business needs and specifications
* Provide insights and recommendations to optimize business processes and improve efficiency
* Utilize technical skills in Capture to design and implement business models that support strategic initiatives
* Conduct thorough research and analysis to identify trends and opportunities for business growth
* Facilitate workshops and meetings to ensure clear communication and understanding of project goals
* Develop comprehensive reports and presentations to communicate findings and recommendations to management
* Monitor project progress and ensure timely delivery of solutions that meet business requirements
* Support the implementation of new systems and processes ensuring seamless integration with existing operations
* Evaluate the effectiveness of implemented solutions and suggest improvements for continuous enhancement
* Collaborate with IT teams to ensure technical solutions are aligned with business needs
* Provide training and support to team members and stakeholders on new processes and systems
* Maintain up-to-date knowledge of industry trends and best practices to drive innovation and improvement. Qualifications
* Demonstrate proficiency in business analysis techniques and methodologies
* Possess strong analytical skills to interpret complex data and derive actionable insights
* Exhibit excellent communication skills to effectively convey ideas and solutions to diverse audiences
* Have experience in hybrid work environments showcasing adaptability and collaboration skills
* Show expertise in Capture technology to design robust business models
* Display a proactive approach to problem-solving and decision-making
* Hold a degree in Business Administration Information Systems or related field
* Have a minimum of 8 years of experience in business analysis with a focus on strategic initiatives
* Demonstrate ability to work independently and manage multiple projects simultaneously
* Show commitment to continuous learning and professional development
* Possess strong organizational skills to manage project timelines and deliverables
* Exhibit a customer-centric mindset to ensure solutions meet client needs
* Have experience in facilitating workshops and training sessions.


**Certifications Required**
* Certified Business Analysis Professional (CBAP)

title: Tekniska produktägare till Sveriges Radio
description:
När du lyssnar på Sveriges Radio är det 100 års konstant teknikutveckling du hör. Bakom varje program och sändning, i varje kanal och på varje plattform, finns ett kraftfullt fundament av innovativ teknologi som verkar tyst i bakgrunden – dygnet runt, året om – med höga krav på precision, tillgänglighet och robusthet.
 


  


 Nu söker vi
 **tre tekniska produktägare till olika produktområden som Ljudplattform och Automation & Observabilitet.** 



  


**Observabilitet** 



  


 Observabilitetsplattformen är byggd på Kubernetes och vi använder system som Prometheus, Grafana, Loki och Mimir. Här arbetar man användarcentrerat och utvecklar verktyg som gör skillnad för våra användare. Vår användargrupp är en blandning av seniora utvecklare, systemtekniker och driftpersonal som alla har olika förutsättningar men samma grundbehov av att kunna förstå om fel uppstår och hur våra system mår.
 


  


**Ljudplattform** 



  


 Ljudplattformen ansvarar för att ljudet kommer hela vägen från produktion till publicering – med särskilt fokus på realtid, robusthet och kvalitet. Det är ett uppdrag med både teknisk höjd och tydlig nytta, där du får arbeta med samhällsviktig teknik som hörs över hela landet.
 


  


**Tjänsten och ansvarsområden** 



  


 Som teknisk produktägare leder du det operativa arbetet inom ett av våra produktområden genom att forma våra tekniska produkter, ta fram vision tillsammans med produktledningen, strukturera arbetet och leda utvecklingen i våra team av skickliga utvecklare och ingenjörer. Det är en roll för dig som gillar teknik, men ännu mer hur teknik skapar värde genom effektiv samverkan.
 


  


 Våra team ansvarar för hela kedjan inom sina respektive områden – från utveckling och integration till tillgängliggörande av funktionalitet och data. Vi arbetar i agila, tvärfunktionella team där varje kollega är lika viktig. I rollen får du ett stort ansvar och inflytande. Du leder det operativa arbetet inom ditt produktområde, tar plats i produktledningen och rapporterar till ansvarig chef.
 


  


**Vad du bland annat kommer att göra** 



  

* Leda det operativa arbetet inom ett tekniskt produktområde och utveckla produkter som stärker verksamheten och användarnas möjligheter att arbeta effektivt.
* Forma vision, roadmap och arbetssätt tillsammans med produktledning.
* Äga, samordna och prioritera teamens backloggar i dialog med utvecklare, Product Manager och intressenter.
* Följa teknikutvecklingen inom området och ta in nya perspektiv.
* Bidra till produktledning och delta i såväl strategiska som operativa beslut.
* Facilitera och äga en del scrumevent.
* Stötta och coacha kollegor, både tekniskt och genom att bidra till en god samarbetskultur.


  

  

**Kvalifikationer**

**Vi tror att du** 



  

* Har en yrkesmässig bakgrund inom teknik, systemutveckling, data eller analys.
* Har minst 2 års erfarenhet som produktägare eller i en riktgivande teknisk roll.
* Har relevant eftergymnasial utbildning.
* Har förmåga att kommunicera och förankra – både med team, intressenter och ledning.
* Är strukturerad, prestigelös, lösningsfokuserad och van att fatta beslut under osäkerhet.
* Håller dig uppdaterad om teknik och trender.


  


**Vad vi erbjuder dig** 



  


 På Sveriges Radio får du jobba med teknik som gör verklig skillnad. Vi är ett teknikintensivt bolag med ett starkt samhällsuppdrag, där du får möjlighet att utvecklas, påverka och bygga nytt. Vi erbjuder kompetensutveckling genom kurser, konferenser och lärande i vardagen. För att fortsätta bredda våra perspektiv och utvecklas som organisation ser vi varje rekrytering som en chans att växa.
 


  


**Ansökan och anställning** 



  


 Sök med CV och svara på några korta frågor om rollen – urval sker löpande.
 


  


 Vi erbjuder en tillsvidareanställning på heltid med inledande provanställning på sex månader. Arbete sker på plats i något av våra radiohus runtom i Sverige. Tillträde så snart som möjligt eller enligt överenskommelse. Vi välkomnar alla att söka våra tjänster – men vill särskilt uppmuntra dig som är kvinna eller icke-binär att söka denna roll, då vi i dag har en överrepresentation av män inom IT-enheten. Vi kombinerar det med distansarbete en dag i veckan.
 


  


**För frågor om tjänsten** 



  


 Frågor hanteras av Marja.doerr@sr.se, Balazs.bodor@sr.se och Ragnar.schon@sr.se. Vill du komma i kontakt med facket så hittar du alla fackliga kontakter här.
 


  


*Sveriges Radio är en del av Sveriges kritiska infrastruktur och har en viktig roll inom totalförsvaret. Vår verksamhet omfattas bland annat av regler om säkerhetsskydd och på grund av det genomförs en kontroll av kandidaten för många av tjänsterna i vår verksamhet innan anställning sker. För de tjänster som leder till deltagande i säkerhetskänslig verksamhet eller placering i säkerhetsklass innebär denna kontroll att säkerhetsprövning genomförs i enlighet med säkerhetsskyddslagen.* 



  


**Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: Full stack developer to shape SEB’s Private Internet Bank | SEB, Solna
description:
Ready to innovate the private internet bank experience? Join our agile team as a Full Stack Developer, focusing on frontend to shape the future of banking.
   

  

 SEB is more than just a bank with an IT function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fueled by collaboration. From Java to AI and everything in between, we offer you a modern tech stack and several technology paths. Together we’re innovating a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone.
   

  

 Are you ready to take on a new challenge? If so, you’ll be interested in this opportunity!
   

  

**About the role:**
 Join our dynamic agile team to elevate the private internet bank experience. You’ll be a Full Stack Developer, primarily focusing on frontend development with Typescript and React, while contributing across the stack with .Net and other modern web technologies. We are looking for someone with around 5 years of relevant experience in web development. Experience in a Scrum Master role is a valuable merit.
   

  

**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* Around 5 years of relevant experience in web development.
* Strong proficiency in Typescript, React or similar for frontend development.
* Experience with modern .Net and other backend technologies.
* Demonstrated ability to contribute across the entire agile team.
* Experience as a scrum master is a meritorius.


**What we offer:**
* Agile and modern ways of working.
* A flat hierarchy and openness to share ideas, opinions and points of views.
* Extensive training and learning opportunities.
* Innovative company at the forefront of technology.


**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success.
