title: Founding GTM Engineer
description:
**THE ROLE**
 This is the foundational GTM engineering role at Arcline. You will build the revenue operating system from scratch — the tooling, automation, and data infrastructure that powers how we find, win, and retain customers.
   

  

 You will work directly with both founders to design systems that make our GTM motion faster, smarter, and more scalable than our headcount would suggest. This is not a Salesforce admin role. It is an architect role — you will decide what we build, how it connects, and how it compounds over time.
   

  

 If you are energized by turning a messy sales process into a machine that runs itself, this is the role for you.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
**GTM Infrastructure & Automation**
* Build and own the systems that power our revenue execution: pipeline workflows, lead routing, enrichment, sequencing, and CRM architecture
* Automate manual GTM work so the team operates with far more leverage than our size would suggest
* Integrate and orchestrate the full GTM tech stack — from outbound tooling to post-sale handoffs — into a coherent, reliable system
* Build and maintain data pipelines that keep every decision grounded in clean, trustworthy information


**AI-Native Workflows**
* Design and deploy AI-forward automations that improve deal velocity: next-best-action surfacing, intelligent follow-up triggers, account prioritization, and enrichment
* Experiment continuously with agents and new tooling — you stay ahead of what is possible and bring it back to the team
* Build lightweight AI-powered demos and proof-of-concept environments tailored to enterprise prospects


**Measurement & Iteration**
* Instrument the funnel end-to-end so we always know where deals stall and why
* Own GTM system metrics: conversion by stage, deal velocity, forecast accuracy, rep productivity
* Run experiments, measure impact, and iterate — you care about the metric moving, not just the system working


**What We're Looking For**
* 2–5 years in GTM engineering, sales engineering, or a technical role with a heavy automation and systems component doing sales or marketing
* Comfortable writing production-quality code: Python and SQL are the most common needs; light scripting and API work come naturally to you
* Hands-on experience with tools like Clay, Apollo, HubSpot or Salesforce, Zapier/Make/n8n, and similar
* Strong systems thinker — you see the downstream consequences of every design decision before you make it
* Genuine interest in AI and legal tech; you want to understand the product deeply, not just support it from the outside
* Builder mindset: you ship something useful today and improve it tomorrow; you do not wait for a perfect brief
* High integrity — you will have access to sensitive pipeline data, customer information, and business strategy


**Who You Are**
 You see a broken workflow and immediately start mapping the fix in your head. You would rather deploy something useful this week and iterate than spend a month designing the perfect solution nobody has seen yet. You measure your own success by whether the metric moved, not whether the code was elegant. When things are ambiguous, you make a call and move — unclear priorities energize you rather than paralyze you. You build with the team, not just for them: you can sit with a founder on a customer call and walk away knowing exactly what to automate next.
   

  

**What Success Looks Like**
* Outbound runs faster and with better targeting because enrichment, routing, and sequencing are automated and reliable
* The founders spend less time on pipeline admin and more time in front of customers
* Every GTM decision is grounded in clean data — no more spreadsheet reconciliation before a board call
* AI-forward workflows handle the repetitive work so the team's attention goes where it creates the most value
* We scale revenue without scaling headcount linearly


**WHY ARCLINE**
* Direct access to both founders from day one — you will see how a fast-moving YC startup makes real decisions in real time
* We are building the defining AI-native legal firm in a $1 trillion market — the GTM problem here is genuinely hard and genuinely interesting
* Your systems will have an outsized, visible impact on revenue at a stage where every deal matters
* High performers grow into GTM leadership, head of revenue operations, or solutions engineering as the company scales
* Backed by YC: the best network in startups for hiring, partnerships, and customer introductions

title: Integration Automation Architect
description:
**For a Sustainable Future Together**
 Coop is Sweden's largest cooperative and a leading player in the grocery retail sector, with over 4 million members. We focus heavily on sustainability and work to create a greener and more just future by offering sustainable products and services.
   

  

 We believe that a diversity of perspectives and experiences is key to creating a more inclusive and successful workplace. Therefore, we welcome everyone, regardless of gender, age, background, or ethnic origin.
   

  

**Join Coop – Together, we make Sweden's food landscape sustainable!**
**About The Position**
 We are seeking an experienced Integration and Automation Architect to join our central IT Integration and automation Team, which is responsible for designing, developing, and supporting integration and automation solutions across the entire organization.
   

  

 In this role, you will lead the design, development, and optimization of automations, low-code integrations and CI/CD pipelines using various platforms. You will collaborate closely with business stakeholders, vendors, and integration architects to deliver scalable, secure, and efficient automation and integration solutions.
   

  

**Your Role And Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, and maintain low-code integrations/automation using RPA, low-code integration tools/platforms (e.g. Microsoft Power Automate, Workato, Microsoft Logic Apps etc.)
* Create end-to-end automation solutions that enhance operational efficiency and reduce manual work.
* Identify low-code integrations and automation opportunities across business domains and drive solution proposals.
* Develop, implement, and maintain CI/CD pipelines to support automation and integration delivery processes.
* Implement best practices for automation governance, security, monitoring, and documentation.
* Establish governance for automation and low-code integrations development and operations.
* Ensure automated deployments, quality checks, and version control best practices are followed.
* Coordinate with vendors for platform improvements, licensing, and escalations.
* Lead and mentor offshore developers.


***Who are you?***
 You are an experienced integration and automation professional with a strong technical foundation and a passion for building scalable, reliable solutions that simplify complex processes. You enjoy working at the intersection of business and technology, translating needs into practical automation and integration solutions that create real impact across an organization.
   

  

 You are comfortable working in a collaborative environment where you engage with both technical teams and business stakeholders, and you take ownership of solutions from design through implementation and continuous improvement
   

  

**To Succeed In This Role, We Believe You Have**
* Several years of experience in IT, with at least 5 years focused on automation, system integrations, and CI/CD delivery.
* Hands-on experience with low-code integration platforms such as Workato (preferred), Microsoft Power Automate, or Microsoft Logic Apps.
* Strong understanding of APIs, integration patterns, event-driven architecture, and cloud-native integration design.
* Practical experience working with Microsoft Azure services, including Logic Apps, Azure DevOps, and API Management.
* Solid knowledge of DevOps and CI/CD practices, including automated testing, version control (Git), and pipeline development.
* Experience leading or mentoring offshore or distributed development teams.
* Fluency in English.


**It Is a Plus If You Also Have**
* Experience with RPA platforms such as Power Automate Desktop, UiPath, or Blue Prism.
* Knowledge of cloud security, identity management (OAuth, Azure AD), networking fundamentals, and performance optimization.
* Experience integrating with SAP S/4HANA environments.
* Proficiency in Swedish.


**What We Offer You**
 We offer you a workplace where you will have the opportunity to grow and develop in an inclusive and inspiring culture. At Coop, you will be part of a dedicated, innovative and skilled integration team and contribute to a more sustainable future. We also offer competitive benefits, flexible working hours, and a healthy work–life balance.
   

  

 We work in a hybrid model where you’ll spend around three days per week at our Solna headquarters.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 If you have questions about this assignment, you are welcome to contact Head of IT Security and Integration Amit Kumar Gupta (amitkumar.gupta@coop.se).
   

  

 We will perform interview continuously so please apply in English with your CV, and some words why you feel you’re a good fit for this role at Coop.

title: Engineering Manager
description:
Dedicated to powering entrepreneurs, Qred is a profitable, fast-growing fintech scale-up bank. In just 10 years, we’ve grown from a startup to hitting 1 billion SEK in annual revenue supporting over 50,000 entrepreneurs and helping create 10,000+ jobs every year. We combine smart tech with real-world experience to make funding simple, fast, and fair for entrepreneurs who need it most. With strong backing, a flat organization, and bold growth plans, we’re now looking for an
 **Engineering Manager** 
 to join us and shape the future of small business owners.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As an Engineering Manager at Qred, you'll play a crucial role in shaping our organizational design, people management, and way of working. You'll be acting as one of two Engineering Manager in our
 **Revenue Domain** 
 reporting to the CTO
 **,** 
 leading and supporting two development teams with one Tech Lead per team. Your focus will be to ensure alignment with our methodologies, foster collaboration, and lead a group of talented engineers. This role calls for a visionary leader with a technical background and a passion for building high-performing teams in a fast-paced, scaling environment.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* People Management: Oversee performance & staff management of our engineering teams consisting of ~10 engineers. You will support and grow a group of already very talented people.
* Efficient Way of Working: Champion methodologies like Agile, Lean, Continuous Delivery, and DevOps. Drive and align our Qred Engineering Maturity Model (QEMM) to enhance the efficiency of our processes.
* Collaboration and Cross-Functional Work: Foster strong collaboration between Engineering, Product Management, and UX Design to deliver a seamless product experience.
* Organizational Design: Define team structures, optimize resource allocation, and match personalities to ensure scalability and productivity as we expand in Europe.
* Recruitment and Retention: Lead the recruitment strategy for the domain, attracting top talent and building a world-class team.
* Enable Qred: You will have tight collaboration with the CTO, Architects, Product Managers and Chief Revenue Officer to make sure we take decisions that are in line with Qred’s growth strategy.


**Requirements**
* A passion for mentoring and developing engineering talent.
* A technical background with broad full-stack experience; preferred language is Javascript (Node.js / React / React Native). While we don't expect you to code, you must understand the challenges of a Serverless-first and Event-driven architecture.
* Minimum two years of experience in a Head of Engineering or five years of experience in a Engineering Manager role in a sizable organization, preferably in a domain-structured organization.
* A university engineering degree.
* Deep understanding of Agile methodologies, DevOps practices, and modern software development principles.
* Excellent communication skills with the ability to build strong relationships across functions.
* An office-first approach: You enjoy meeting your department and getting to know the people. We believe in non-formal meetings and chats, which is why you’ll be based in our Stockholm HQ.
* Experience with Claude code for automating tasks and streamline agentic way of working. We expect you to have good technical understanding and a strong interest.


**We highly value**
* AI-SDLC: If you have previously implemented an AI-SDLC / agentic way of working it’d be really valuable to us.


**Why join us?**
 This is the place to be if you’re looking for a place to grow. Qred is growing fast, and our Qredsters along with it. With a non-bureaucratic organization and delegated responsibilities, we make sure there’s a short path from idea to action. In addition to our great culture, you get to work with the latest cutting-edge techniques, responsibility for the whole development chain, and last but not least a bunch of great competent colleagues to learn from!
   

  

**One last thing**
 This is a full-time, permanent position based in our headquarters in Stockholm. While we encourage a hybrid setup, we do expect you to be at least three days per week at the office. We review applications on a rolling basis and while the start date is flexible, the right candidate can join us immediately.
   

  

*Qred celebrates diversity and does not discriminate based on ethnicity, religion, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability status, or any other applicable characteristics protected by law.*
 Qred is an international FinTech scale-up that specializes in digital financing solutions for small businesses, with operations in the Nordics, Benelux, Germany and Brazil. We are passionate about helping small businesses thrive and grow, by providing them with business loans and credit cards. Right now we’re in an exciting phase of our journey that focuses on growth through smart product development and technology fueled by international expansion.

title: Vi behöver förstärka vår systemtest-avdelning
description:
*Vill du påverka och göra skillnad på riktigt? Här bidrar du till att skapa trygghet för människor och samhällen. Det du gör spelar roll.*
 Din roll
   

  

 Inom affärsområdet Surveillance utvecklar vi bl.a. telekrigssystem och motmedel för stridsflygplan. Du kan se mer vad vi gör här: https://youtu.be/71SjjxKK0Z0
   

  

 Som System Verification Engineer kommer du arbeta med integration och verifiering av telekrigsystem till stridsflygplan. Arbetsuppgifterna omfattar hela processen från kravanalys, där produktens behov kartläggs, till testdesign och testexekvering i verklig målmiljö. Vidare ingår felsökning, verifiering samt rapportering och dokumentation av resultat.
   

  

 Som en del av vårt verifieringsteam får du lära dig om och jobba med hela systemet. Du blir genom ditt arbete djupt och brett kunnig på vår teknik och får möjlighet till kontakter med experter och kunder.
   

  

 Tjänstens placering är i Järfälla till en början, men under 2026 kommer vi att flytta till nya lokaler i Solna Strand.
   

  

 Din profil
   

  

 Som person är du noggrann och har en förmåga att vara detaljorienterad samtidigt som du klarar av att se helheten. Du är nyfiken och det faller sig naturligt för dig att driva ditt eget arbete framåt, både självständigt och i samarbete med dina kollegor. Du trivs med att arbeta med integration och test av komplexa system i målmiljö. Vi ser att du har erfarenhet av att analysera krav och omvandla till testfall samt att automatisera lämpliga testfall och exekvera samt analysera resultat av automatisk testning. Du kommunicerar flytande på svenska och engelska, både skriftligt och muntligt.
   

  

 För att lyckas i denna roll har du:
   

  

* Högskole-eller civilingenjörsutbildning i teknisk fysik, elektronik eller likvärdigt
* Grundläggande erfarenhet av Java, Python eller likvärdigt
* Minst 5 års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet


 Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av:
   

  

* Signalteori
* RF eller mikrovågsteknik
* ISTQB (Certified Tester Foundation Level)


 Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.
   

  

 Vad du blir en del av
   

  

 Upptäck oändliga möjligheter. Anta utmaningar, skapa smarta innovationer och uppgradera dina förmågor. Det här är en plats för kluriga tänkare, modiga pionjärer och alla däremellan. Tillsammans uppnår vi det extraordinära, var och en tar med sitt unika perspektiv. Varje bidrag räknas.
   

  

 Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidrar till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 26,100 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.
   

  

 Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här.

title: Javautvecklare
description:
Att välja Capgemini innebär att välja en arbetsplats där du ges möjlighet att forma din karriär på det sätt du själv önskar, där du ingår i en stödjande och inspirerande gemenskap med engagerade kollegor världen över, och där du får chansen att omdefiniera vad som är möjligt. Våra Cloud & Custom applications-team fokuserar på att utveckla skräddarsydda cloudapplikationer, integrera IT-system och driva affärstransformation, med leverans av affärskritiska cloudlösningar i hög kvalitet och hastighet, möjliggjort av Generative AI. Bli en del av oss och hjälp världsledande organisationer att frigöra teknikens värde och bygga en mer hållbar och inkluderande framtid!
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Hos oss på Capgemini får du inte bara jobba med Java – du får forma framtiden. Vi ligger i framkant när det gäller Generative AI, Data Engineering och skalbara molnplattformar. Våra projekt ger dig möjlighet att utvecklas inom cutting-edge teknologier som Java, Spring, AWS, GCP, Azure, AliCloud, OpenShift, Kafka, GraphQL, React, Angular och Android. På vårt Stockholmskontor trivs vi i rymliga, ljusa lokaler med daglig frukost, nybryggt kaffe och en fantastisk utsikt över kanalen vid Barnhusbron.
   

  

*I denna roll kommer du att spela en nyckelroll i att:*
* Arbeta som Java Developer i spännande konsultuppdrag tillsammans med ett supporterande team omkring dig.
* Främja samarbete, proaktiv problemlösning och högkvalitativ leverans av Java-baserad programvara.
* Utnyttja din erfarenhet av Java, Spring och relaterade teknologier för att designa och utveckla robusta, skalbara och effektiva backend-system.
* Handleda andra utvecklare, genomföra kodgranskningar och driva bästa praxis.


**Din profil**
* Minst 4 års erfarenhet av Java-utveckling
* Flytande kunskaper i svenska och engelska
* Erfarenhet av molnplattformar som AWS, GCP eller Azure är meriterande
* Kunskap inom Data Pipeline, Data Visualization eller Generative AI är ett stort plus


**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas:**
* Konkurrenskraftig lön, förmånliga tjänstepensioner och kollektivavtal som ger trygghet, samt fokus på din hälsa och ditt välmående, med initiativ för att skapa balans mellan jobb och fritid.
* En arbetsmiljö med kollegor som stöttar och inspirerar varandra, och chefer som har ditt bästa i fokus, samt ett brett utbud av karriärmöjligheter och tillgång till Capgeminis stora utbildningskatalog, särskilt inom den senaste teknologin för generativ AI och data engineering.
* En företagskultur där mångfald och inkludering värdesätts högt, samt möjligheter till internationella karriärer och ett fantastiskt nätverk av 420,000 kollegor globalt


**Ansökan**
*Redo att starta ett nytt kapitel i karriären? Vi kan knappt vänta på att få höra från dig! Ansök redan idag – vi hanterar ansökningarna löpande. Under processen får du chansen att kika in på vårt kontor, prata med vår rekryterande chef och självklart ställa alla dina nyfikna frågor till vår rekryterare. Vi lovar att göra din resa mot jobbet så smidig och givande som möjligt. Är det dig vi letar efter? Vi ser fram emot att ses!*
*Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov.*
**Om Capgemini**
 Capgemini är en AI-driven global partner för affärs- och tekniktransformation som levererar konkret verksamhetsnytta. Vi formar framtiden för organisationer och förverkligar den med hjälp av AI, teknik och människor. Med vår starka historia på nästan 60 år är vi en ansvarsfull och mångsidig koncern med över 420 000 medarbetare i över 50 länder. Genom vår expertis inom strategi, teknik, design, ingenjörstjänster och affärsverksamhet levererar vi heltäckande tjänster och lösningar, baserade på vår djupa branschkunskap och vårt omfattande partnernätverk. Koncernen rapporterade globala intäkter på 22,5 miljarder euro för 2025.
   

  

**Make it real** 
 | www.capgemini.com

title: Software Engineer
description:
**Craft:**
 Technology & Development
   

  

**Job Description:**
**Purpose of the role**
 We are looking for a C++ Software Engineer to join the team behind Candy Crush Saga within the Gameplay area. Gameplay teams in this area work on features that support player progression, competitive and cooperative challenges, and other systems that keep the game evolving for millions of players around the
   

  

 world. Our engineers are at the heart of our game development. In this role, you will work closely with designers, producers, artists, and other engineers to bring new gameplay ideas to life. You will join a collaborative and experienced engineering organization, where you’ll have opportunities to learn from more senior engineers while contributing to a large and evolving codebase.
   

  

 We are looking for someone who is curious, eager to learn, and enjoys collaborating with others to solve problems. As the Candy Crush client is a mature and continuously evolving codebase, being comfortable exploring new systems and picking up new concepts will be important
   

  

**Your role within the kingdom**
 As a software engineer you will:
   

  

* Develop and maintain gameplay systems and features in C++ within the Candy Crush Saga client
* Work closely with designers, artists, and producers to transform gameplay ideas into polished player


 experiences
   

  

* Contribute to systems that support player progression, challenges, and evolving gameplay


 experiences
   

  

* Participate in technical discussions, design reviews, and code reviews with your team
* Collaborate with other engineers to improve code quality and development practices
* You follow and participate in the investigation and mitigation of live incidents.
* Share progress, ideas, and challenges openly with your team
* Continuously learn and grow while working in a large and evolving codebase


**Skills To Create Thrills**
 We believe great engineers come from many backgrounds, but you will likely have:
   

  

* Experience programming in C++
* Strong problem-solving skills and curiosity about how complex systems work
* A collaborative mindset and good communication skills
* A strong sense of quality and pride in the work you deliver
* Interest in learning and growing as part of an experienced engineering tea


 Experience with games, gameplay systems, or large codebases is a plus, but not required.
   

  

**Life at King**
 At King, we’re serious about fun. Our games are played by millions of people around the world and Candy
   

  

 Crush Saga continues to evolve years after its launch.
   

  

 You’ll work alongside experienced engineers, designers, and creatives to build gameplay systems that shape
   

  

**How Players Progress And Experience The Game.**
 Not sure you meet all the skills required? Let us decide! Research shows that women and members of other
   

  

 under- represented groups tend to not apply to jobs when they think they may not meet every qualification,
   

  

 when, in fact, they often do! We are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive environment and strongly
   

  

 encourage you to apply.
   

  

**About King**
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.

title: Principal Platform Security Engineer - 10 Month FTC
description:
**Craft:**
 Technology & Development
   

  

**Job Description:**
 FTC 10 Months - Principal Security Engineer, Platform Security
   

  

 We are looking for a skilled Principal Security Engineer to protect our Kingdom and join our security team in London, Stockholm, Malmö, Dublin or Berlin.
   

  

 Your role within our Kingdom
   

  

 As our Principal Security Engineer, you will be part of our Platform Security group, and will build, improve and maintain our security platform, protecting our cloud environments as well as code, games, and the platforms that keep them up and running.
   

  

 You will participate in the definition, implementation and support of security in the SDLC, and you will define procedures for how to handle security issues and integrate security in the entire building process of our games.
   

  

 Skills To Create Thrills
   

  

 You have a learner and self-starter attitude so you’re able to take direction and execute tasks on your own while working in a team. We will appreciate much more the ability to learn and the interest in growing as an expert in the role than any previous experience.
   

  

 Other skills include:
   

  

 Technical experience in any security field, ideally integrating security tooling, scripting, devops, or solving security problems.
   

  

 Specific knowledge deploying and integrating Static application security testing (SAST) tools such as Sonarqube into SDLC pipelines
   

  

 Experience with Github Actions
   

  

 Experience in cloud environments, AWS, Azure, or ideally, GCP.
   

  

 Knowledge of container solutions like Docker
   

  

 Experience automating processes, developing tools and scripting, ideally in Python.
   

  

 Experience with SQL queries and/or data analytic tools (Looker, Tableau, or others).
   

  

 Experience on SIEM platforms, like Splunk or Bigquery.
   

  

 Experience in patch management, vulnerability scanning and reporting in SDLC or cloud could come in handy.
   

  

 Must know what JSON is.
   

  

 Experience working, deploying and integrating SDLC security tools.
   

  

 Familiarity with terms such as SAST, SCA or SBOM.
   

  

 Solid knowledge about security concepts.
   

  

 Must be willing to do occasional traveling.
   

  

 Excellent written and verbal communication skills. Fluent in English.
   

  

 Tasty Bonus Skills
   

  

 Experience being the technical lead of a wider team, defining the evolution and roadmap of security products.
   

  

 If you maintain your own open source security project or have contributed to a project we would love to see it.
   

  

 Security certifications won’t be evaluated, but skills in the right areas will.
   

  

 Making games is fun. Especially when you do it with people that share the same idea of what makes a good workplace great. No matter where you’re from, it’s all about what we can achieve together when creating truly magical moments for all our players. That’s why we hire all sorts of talent - because a great saga needs all sorts of heroes.
   

  

 Our Kingdom
   

  

 King is a leading interactive entertainment company for the mobile world, with people all around the world playing one or more of our games. We have developed more than 200 fun titles, and our games are played and enjoyed all around the world. King has game studios in Barcelona, Berlin, London, Malmö, Seattle, and Stockholm along with offices in Bucharest, Malta, San Francisco, New York and Tokyo. King is an independent unit of Activision Blizzard Inc. (Nasdaq: ATVI), which acquired King in February 2016.
   

  

 Want to join our Kingdom?
   

  

 Application needs to be in English.
   

  

 Apply now!
   

  

**About King**
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.

title: Embedded Linux Field Engineer for Devices/IoT
description:
**Job Description**
 Canonical is a leading provider of open source software and operating systems to the global enterprise and technology markets. Our platform, Ubuntu, is very widely used in breakthrough enterprise initiatives such as public cloud, data science, AI, engineering innovation and IoT. Our customers include the world's leading public cloud and silicon providers, and industry leaders in many sectors. The company is a pioneer of global distributed collaboration, with 1000+ colleagues in 70+ countries and very few office based roles. Teams meet two to four times yearly in person, in interesting locations around the world, to align on strategy and execution.
   

  

 The company is founder led, profitable and growing.
   

  

 We are hiring an
 **Embedded Linux Field Engineer for Devices/IoT** 
 to expand our reach in mission-critical industries such as Automotive, Medical Devices, Industrial Systems, Robotics, and Telco, as well as Consumer Electronics. We are looking for candidates who are accomplished Linux plumbers. If you are someone passionate about Linux, who knows the plumbing of the OS inside and out, who is proficient with distribution packaging, software design, system debugging, and bringing customer's ideas to life, then please keep on reading - this may be a uniquely exciting opportunity for you.
   

  

 The server edition of Ubuntu is already very widely used in connected devices and industrial PC's. Our edition of Ubuntu tailored for IoT, called Ubuntu Core, represents the state of the art in security and resilience for high end appliances and equipment. Our customers include global brands in consumer and industrial electronics as well as automotive and robotics. We continue to expand our range of offerings to bring our security, management and developer experience to the smallest Linux environments and devices. We recently added a real-time Linux capability and are working towards a range of certifications for these offerings. Together, this portfolio is Linux reinvented for optimal reliability, security, developer productivity and footprint.
   

  

 This career opportunity requires a unique blend of skills. Successful candidates will know Linux well and be proficient coders and scripters. They will have experience of low-level Linux boot, BIOS, EFI, Secure Boot, firmware, OS Distribution packaging and generally speaking embedded software development methodologies. They also enjoy the pace of change and diversity of client engagements with driven and ambitious technology entrepreneurs. Competitive, business-focused technologists at heart, they are also dedicated team players that take pride in team and company wins.
   

  

 We often say that our field engineers have 'the hardest job at Canonical' because customers can ask about any aspect of our solutions and products and expect a thoughtful, well-informed answer. We always want to do the best thing for our partners and customers, regardless of our company interests, and field engineers are the people we trust to ensure that is true.
   

  

 What your day will look like
   

  

* Engage customers during presales to gather requirements and explain our technology
* Elaborate solutions to be proposed to prospective clients
* Participate to the delivery of select projects related to Embedded Linux
* Convey market requirements to key stakeholders in our organization, and sometimes participate to the development or refining of generic solutions to unlock market potential
* Be both a customer advocate and a trusted advisor to Canonical


 What we are looking for in you
   

  

* Bachelors degree in Computer Science or related technical field
* Extensive Linux experience - Debian or Ubuntu preferred
* Distribution / Packaging experience (deb, rpm, ...)
* Solid embedded Linux experience (Yocto, Buildroot...)
* Fluency in at least one of Golang, Python, C, C++, or Rust
* Professional written and spoken English in addition to the local language
* Excellent communication and presentation skills
* Result-oriented, ability to multi-task
* A personal drive to meet commitments
* An humble learner and quick study
* Albeit many projects can be done remotely, the successful candidate will be willing to travel up to 30% of the time for customer meetings, company events, and conferences
* For positions in Japan and Korea, the successful candidates will also be able to speak and write the local language at a professional level.


**Additional Skills That You Might Also Bring**
* Experience with customer engagements a plus, but not a requirement


 What we offer colleagues
   

  

 We consider geographical location, experience, and performance in shaping compensation worldwide. We revisit compensation annually (and more often for graduates and associates) to ensure we recognise outstanding performance. In addition to base pay, we offer a performance-driven annual bonus or commission. We provide all team members with additional benefits, which reflect our values and ideals. We balance our programs to meet local needs and ensure fairness globally.
   

  

* Distributed work environment with twice-yearly team sprints in person
* Personal learning and development budget of USD 2,000 per year
* Annual compensation review
* Recognition rewards
* Annual holiday leave
* Maternity and paternity leave
* Employee Assistance Programme
* Opportunity to travel to new locations to meet colleagues
* Priority Pass, and travel upgrades for long haul company events


**About Canonical**
 Canonical is a pioneering tech firm at the forefront of the global move to open source. As the company that publishes Ubuntu, one of the most important open source projects and the platform for AI, IoT and the cloud, we are changing the world of software. We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence - in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do. Most colleagues at Canonical have worked from home since its inception in 2004. Working here is a step into the future, and will challenge you to think differently, work smarter, learn new skills, and raise your game.
   

  

**Canonical is an equal opportunity employer**
 We are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background create a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.

title: Senior SAP DMS Expert (Quality Assurance)
description:
**Juanes@RED Senior SAP DMS Expert (Quality Assurance) - Sweden** 




  





 On behalf of one of our key partners, we have a new contract opportunity for a Senior SAP DMS Expert (Quality Assurance) to join a long-term S/4HANA migration programme for a leader in the energy sector.
 



  





 The role is based in Sweden and supports the "Wave 2" transformation, with a focus on the Document Management System stream
 



  





 Ideal specific skills/experience required:
 


* Senior SAP DMS Expertise: Deep functional knowledge of Document Management System processes, including document creation, linking, and cross-functional integration with modules like MM, PM, or FI.
* S/4HANA Migration Specialist: Proven track record in ECC to S/4HANA transformations.
* Test Factory Leadership: Expertise in designing and executing complex System Integration Testing and User Acceptance Testing.
* Technical Tooling: Strong proficiency in Azure DevOps for scenario mapping, GAP analysis, and end-to-end test case management.
* Language & Location: Fluency in Swedish and English is a big bonus. Availability to attend the client's office in Stockholm occasionally is a must.

title: Microsoft D365 FSCM (O2D) Senior Functional Consultant
description:
**HCLTech’s Microsoft Business Applications Practice - (MBAP) is seeking a Microsoft D365 FSCM (Order To Delivery) Senior Functional Consultant to join our award-winning and growing team.** 




  





**The ideal candidate will have worked on multiple Microsoft D365 F&SCM projects with experience in Finance, Procurement, Sales & Order To Delivery (O2D) + Annata (or similar industry solutions** 
 )
 **, and will have good knowledge of implementation life cycles from end-to-end.** 




  





**You should be a confident communicator, able to engage stakeholders at all levels within an organisation. You should also have experience of managing teams of Consultants, and will be used to owning elements of the functional design and delivery.** 




  





**Role & Responsibilities:** 




 · Take ownership of all aspects of Financial Management module, working with the business stakeholders and successful delivery of the programme
 



 · Assist with kick-offs, requirement gathering and knowledge transfer sessions; evaluate the client business processes and provide Business requirement document
 



 · Analyse client requirements and objectives, suggest Business Re-Engineering processes, eliminate non-value addition processes and derive how best the software can address clients’ business process
 



 · Perform Fit-gap analysis, convert requirements to functional specs and functional design documents
 



 · Configure and showcase Financial Management processes/systems as to how the solution meets client business requirements like Chart of Accounts, Consolidation of Accounts, Financial Reporting per Business unit/department, Exchange Rates, Intercompany Accounting, Ledger Accruals and Allocations, Accounts Receivable and Accounts Payable, Fixed Assets, Cash and Bank Management
 



 · Experience in handling SIT, End user training, UAT and Go Live
 



 · Experience in data migration activities and the approach for it
 



 · Mentor other consultants in delivering according to client expectations; take ownership and deliver successful completion of projects including documents, user manuals
 



 · Participate in the development of functional design documentation and technical specifications, unit and system test scripts, and deployment plans, perform SIT testing
 



 · Facilitate functional sessions and weekly status meetings with clients, including the ability to drive a client to decisions
 



 · Conduct functional testing of modifications and sub-processes during the implementation process
 



 · Ensure delivery of high-quality services and products to customers
 



 · Work with customer to identify/resolve all issues that could impact project scope and/or timeframe
 



  





**Skills Required** 




 · Extensive experience in Microsoft Dynamics AX2012/Dynamics 365 F&SCM Implementations
 



 · Experience on at least 3 end to end implementation projects and awareness of typical implementation methodologies for Dynamics projects
 



 · Experienced in Order-To-Delivery (O2D) and/or Workshop / Aftermarket processes, and Annata (or similar industry solution for automotive/heavy equipment)
 



 · Strong end-to-end process understanding
 



 · Ability to drive standardization and challenge non-scalable requirements
 



 · Structured and analytical mindset
 



 · Comfortable working in complex, multi-stakeholder environments
 



 · Experience operating as a Global Finance Process Owner (Commercial Finance) for D365 Finance & Procurement rollouts
 



 · Proven experience in process design and global harmonization.
 



 · Experience embedding internal controls into end‑to‑end processes.
 



 · Proven understanding of and primary responsibility for solutions in Financial and Project Management Accounting and also multi-country and multi- currency AX implementations in Dynamics 365 F&O or other AX versions
 



 · Expertise knowledge & experience on Asset Management (Production), Fixed Assets, AP/AR, General Ledger, Supply chain, Taxation, Project accounting and Audit
 



 · Excellent communication skills along with good analysis and documentation skills
 



 · A positive and can-do approach
 



 · Advanced use of Microsoft Project, Excel, Word, and Visio
 



 · Ability to work remotely and on customer site; some travel expected
 



 · Appropriate Microsoft Dynamics 365 certifications
 



 · Experience using DevOps for tracking deliverables, risks, and issues
 



 · Have led a team to deliver a project module solution and deliverable

title: Senior System & Economy Designer - Minecraft Blast, New Games
description:
**Craft:**
 Games Design & Production
   

  

**Job Description:**
 Join our New Games Studio and help build the next generation of King experiences. We’re developing Minecraft Blast, a new casual puzzle adventure set in a playful interpretation of the Minecraft universe and we’re looking for a talented System & Economy Designer to shape its economy, progression, and meta systems.
   

  

 As a Senior System & Economy Designer, you will play a pivotal role in defining how players engage with the game over time. You will form the bridge between game design and our Data Scientists and Product Managers to help craft the systems, loops, and economies that drive retention, progression, and monetisation while ensuring the player experience feels fair, delightful, and distinctly Minecraft.
   

  

****Your Role Within Our Kingdom****
 In this role, you will champion systems and economy design across the team collaborating closely with Creative Leadership and our Business Unit.
   

  

 You will:
   

  

* Support the development of the holistic casual game economy, meta systems, and feature frameworks for Minecraft Blast.
* Help in the building, balancing, and game economy modelling of our meta game to predict player behaviour and feature impact.
* Alongside DS and PMs, use quantitative and qualitative insights to help tune progression, rewards, sinks, sources, pacing and difficulty curves.
* Design new systems including meta features, events, and monetisation mechanics balancing retention, engagement, and revenue in a player centric, casual mobile appropriate way.
* Partner with Art, Product, Data Science, Engineering, and other Designers to align features with the creative vision and business goals.
* Perform regular market research and deconstruct competitor titles to identify opportunities and emerging trends in free to play puzzle games.
* Communicate clearly with senior leaders, building alignment around proposals, models, decisions, and expected outcomes.
* Contribute to King’s economy design community by sharing knowledge, reviewing peers’ work, and helping evolve our craft.


****Skills to Create Thrills****
* Enthusiastic about casual mobile games, systems design, and the craft of game economies.
* Proven experience building, tuning, and operating casual economies in mobile free to play games both in production and live operation.
* Strong analytical skills with fluency in modelling tools, data-driven decision making, and player behaviour analysis.
* Experience collaborating with multidisciplinary teams and reconciling creative, technical, and business perspectives.
* Strong planning and organisational skills, capable of driving strategic game economy initiatives to completion.
* Clear and effective communicator — verbally, visually, and in written documentation.
* Comfortable in a fast-moving, collaborative environment where responsibilities evolve as the game grows.
* A team player who enjoys working closely with designers, analysts, and product partners from diverse backgrounds.


**About King**
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.

title: Network Specialist Consultant
description:
Har du ett öga för nätverkslösningar och gillar att jobba nära kund? Drivs du av att arbeta med stora, spännande projekt där din insats verkligen gör skillnad? Då vill jag gärna lära känna dig!


Jag heter Annelie Sandström och ansvarar för vår fantastiska konsultgrupp i Jönköping. Vi söker en ny kollega i rollen som **Nätverkskonsult** som vill vara med på vår gemensamma resa mot framtidens digitala infrastruktur!


**Är det här din nästa möjlighet?**

I rollen som Nätverkskonsult hos oss blir du en viktig spelare i allt från planering och design till installation, konfiguration och felsökning av nätverks- och säkerhetslösningar.


Du kommer att jobba både självständigt och i nära samarbete med andra specialister inom våra tre fokusområden: nätverk, säkerhet och hybrid IT. Här får du chansen att dyka djupt ner i tekniken, utforska nya lösningar och samla inspiration från både Cloud och on-prem. Och vet du vad? Om du på sikt vill certifiera dig inom fler områden så står vi redo att stötta dig hela vägen!


**Är det här du?**

Du är en person som gillar att arbeta i ett högt tempo och har en naturlig förmåga att engagera både kunder och kollegor. Du älskar att brainstorma idéer och har en förmåga att förvandla krav till konkreta, genomförbara lösningar. Dessutom är du nyfiken på att växa och utvecklas i din karriär – och vi är här för att hjälpa dig på den resan!


Vi ser gärna att du har:


* Erfarenhet inom routing och switching
* Erfarenhet inom Cisco
* Erfarenhet av installation, konfiguration och felsökning i komplexa IT-miljöer
* CCNA ses som meriterande
* Flytande svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift

**Varför Telia Cygate?**

På Telia Cygate är vi inte bara experter på nätverk, säkerhet och olika slags moln – vi är också ett gäng som tycker att det ska vara kul att gå till jobbet! Som en del av Telia Company har vi styrkan att skapa verklig påverkan i stor skala, bidra till samhällsnytta och hjälpa våra kunder att navigera i digitaliseringens värld. Vi gör det alltid med värme, omtanke och ett leende. Här är det idéerna och våra olika perspektiv som gör oss starka, och tillsammans ser vi till att teknikens värld blir en plats där alla trivs – och där du hör hemma.


Hos oss är din utveckling viktig. Vi uppmuntrar till kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och ser till att just du och dina intressen är i fokus. Vi vet att det är människorna som utgör vårt företag, och därför värdesätter vi glädje, kreativitet och olika perspektiv i allt vi gör.


Välkommen att växa tillsammans med oss, där vi gör teknik mänsklig och skapar verklig påverkan **!**

**Telia Cygate är stolta över att vara certifierade som Great Place to Work!**

Hos oss står människor i centrum – här får du utvecklas, utmanas och trivas tillsammans med engagerade kollegor. Vi bygger en kultur där trygghet, gemenskap och möjligheter går hand i hand. Vill du vara med på resan? Välkommen till en arbetsplats som verkligen gör skäl för namnet.


**Låter det intressant?**

Ta chansen och bli en del av vårt härliga team! Tveka inte att skicka in din ansökan – vi ser fram emot att höra från dig. Sista ansökningsdag är **2026-04-19.**

Placeringsort: Jönköping


Har du frågor om tjänsten? Kontakta mig gärna, Annelie Sandström på annelie.sandstrom@cygate.se eller via LinkedIn.


Bakgrundskontroll är en del i våra rekryteringsprocesser.


I samband med våra rekryteringar undanber vi oss kontakter från rekryteringsföretag och andra annonsörer.


**Välkommen till Telia Cygate – Home of Experts**

title: Microsoft Alliance Manager, Nordics
description:
Pax8 is looking for a **Microsoft Alliance Manager (Nordics)** to own and grow our strategic partnership with Microsoft across the Nordic region  



  

Based in **Stockholm (hybrid)** , you’ll lead the end-to-end alliance motion, from joint business planning and performance rhythms through to hands-on **GTM execution** with Sales and Marketing. You’ll act as the central conduit between Pax8 and Microsoft in-region, helping shape priorities, unlock funding and incentives, and drive mutual growth across **Azure, Security, and Copilot** .


This is not a passive relationship management role. You’ll be expected to actively influence, execute, and accelerate joint GTM initiatives that deliver measurable impact.


 **Life at Pax8**  

Pax8 is redefining the cloud marketplace — and we’re just getting started. Our culture blends high performance with genuine care, giving people the freedom to think big, move fast and do the best work of their careers. Learn more about our people and purpose on Pax8.com and explore our EMEA growth story through our blog.


 **What you’ll be doing**

 **Own the Microsoft relationship across the Nordics:** build trusted relationships with senior Microsoft stakeholders and ensure Pax8 remains a strategic partner of choice in-region.


**Lead GTM execution:** partner closely with Sales, Marketing and GTM teams to activate joint campaigns, co-sell motions, events and programmes that drive pipeline and consumption.


 **Run the partnership cadence:** lead monthly performance/KPI rhythms and support/drive quarterly business reviews with Microsoft


 **‍****Joint business planning:** align on regional priorities, shared goals and growth plays, focusing time and investment where it will generate the greatest return.


 **Coordinate cross-functional delivery** : bring together Sales, GTM, Marketing and relevant technical teams to execute against agreed plans.


**Report progress and insights** : share clear updates, performance metrics, risks, and opportunities with internal leadership and Microsoft stakeholders.


 **Your impact**  

You’ll directly influence regional growth, deepen Pax8’s Microsoft partnership, and help partners accelerate adoption of next‑generation cloud and AI solutions across the Nordics.


 **What you bring**

* **Proven experience** within the Microsoft ecosystem, ideally across alliance, channel, vendor or GTM roles
* **Strong relationship‑building capability** , comfortable engaging and influencing senior stakeholders
* **Commercial acumen** , with a clear understanding of co‑sell, incentives and joint planning
* **Demonstrated GTM execution strength** , turning strategy into measurable results
* **Clear communication skills** , able to simplify complexity and drive alignment
* **Comfort navigating change** , adapting as priorities and strategy evolve

️ **Trust and how we hire**  

At Pax8, we care deeply about building genuine, trust-based relationships, starting with how we hire.


To protect our business, our teams, and our customers, we use a range of measures throughout the recruitment process to help confirm authenticity and prevent fraud. These safeguards are designed to be fair, respectful, and proportionate, and may evolve as risks change. By applying, you acknowledge that we take steps to verify identity and representation during hiring. If you're applying as your authentic self, you have nothing to worry about, we're excited to meet you.


We also use thoughtfully applied AI‑enabled tools to support our hiring process. These tools may assist with tasks such as reviewing or prioritising applications, but hiring decisions are made by our people. More information is available in our Recruitment Privacy Notice. If you have questions about how we hire or would prefer not to have your application supported by these tools, you can opt out at any part of our process.


 **Inclusivity matters**  

We encourage you to apply even if you don't meet 100% of the criteria. We're committed to diverse perspectives, inclusive hiring and sharing your transferrable skills. To fulfil this role, you must hold valid right to work in Sweden.


 **Salary & benefits**  

**Salary:** 891,000 SEK gross per annum


Annual performance bonus
  

Long‑term incentive plan (share options) after qualifying period
  

Generous holiday allowance in line with Swedish regulations
  

Pension scheme aligned with local market requirements
  

Dedicated time for training and personal development
  

Unlimited access to LinkedIn Learning
  

Health & wellbeing support
  

Fun and frequent company and team socials
  

Hybrid working model with tech set‑up to support home working


If you struggle to get “time out” we’re happy to accommodate early/late conversations and interview times or if you have any queries, you can ring the talent partner Dan managing this role on +44 117 457 8923 (No Agencies Please)


 **Our offices**  

At Pax8, our offices are built with our people in mind and reflect how we work best. They are open, welcoming spaces that fuel collaboration, encourage creativity, and make it easy to connect, contribute, and have a little fun along the way.


 **Your growth at Pax8**  

There's extensive room for a talented individual to grow at pace, whether that's advancing quickly in this role or exploring one of the many opportunities across our global organisation. You'll have access to our internal development hub designed to accelerate your skills and stretch your potential. Alongside specialist Learning & Development trainers, you'll also tap into AI powered tools, "born in the cloud" mentors, and cross continent collaboration that broaden your perspective and sharpen your expertise. We'll give you the space, trust, and the right projects to help you thrive, and full visibility of what it takes to reach your next level.


 **About Pax8**

Our mission is to build the managed intelligence marketplace and empower small businesses to do more with smarter technology. We are a fast‑growing, dynamic, and high‑energy organisation with a start‑up feel, allowing you to make a meaningful impact on the business. Culture is also important to us, and at Pax8, it's business, and it IS personal. We are passionate, creative, and unconventional. We work hard, keep it fun, and expect the best! We Elev8 each other. We Advoc8 for our partners. We Innov8 continuously. We Celebr8 life.


*Learn more about our journey and achievements by checking out these articles:*

* For all you tech minded people: discover the Pax8 Marketplace
* Our EMEA 2025 journey: Pax8 2025 Year in Review
* The FOMO is Real: Pax8 Beyond 2025
* Pax8 becoming the disruptor: Become the disruptor or be the disrupted
* Our amazing Partners and Vendors: Pax8 Partners and Vendors in EMEA Honoured as Award Recipients at Beyond 2025
* EU website: Pax8 EU

 **Pax8 Values**  

Our mission is to be the world’s favourite place to buy cloud products. We are a fast-growing, dynamic, and high-energy organisation with a start-up feel, allowing you to make a meaningful impact on the business. Culture is important to us, and at Pax8, it’s business, and it IS personal. We are passionate, creative, and unconventional. We work hard, keep it fun, and expect the best! We Elev8 each other. We Advoc8 for our partners. We Innov8 continuously.
   

  

We Celebr8 life. We embody our core values — **We before Me** fostering teamwork and collaboration; **Compassionate Candor** , promoting open and honest communication with kindness; **Light Up Learning** continuously growing and sharing knowledge; Seek to Understand valuing diverse perspectives and thoughtful engagement; **Do What You Say** ✅ ensuring trust and accountability


 **Background checks**  

As part of our hiring process, we are required to undertake pre‑employment checks on all candidates that are successful in their application with Pax8. As part of these checks Pax8 will request ID verification, reference requests and qualification checks (additional checks may be completed for certain countries, such as criminal and financial). All checks are completed by our third‑party provider, First Advantage. Once checks have been completed all candidates will receive a copy for their records.


 **️** **Equal opportunities**

Pax8 are an equal opportunities employer and welcome individuals who are in possession of the appropriate requirements to work within the country you have applied for. Offered individuals will be asked to undertake identity, security compliance and reference checks. Your privacy is important to us. Your data will be held in accordance with local best practices and processed only in accordance with our recruiting processes. Privacy notice: https://www.pax8.com/en-us/terms/job-applicant-privacy-notice/


**#LI-Hybrid**

**#LI-DT1**

title: Account Executive, Expansion, SMB | Nordics
description:
**Who we are is what we do.**


Deel is the all-in-one payroll and HR platform for global teams. Our vision is to unlock global opportunity for every person, team, and business. Built for the way the world works today, Deel combines HRIS, payroll, compliance, benefits, performance, and equipment management into one seamless platform. With AI-powered tools and a fully owned payroll infrastructure, Deel supports every worker type in 150+ countries—helping businesses scale smarter, faster, and more compliantly.


Among the largest globally distributed companies in the world, our team of 7,000 spans more than 100 countries, speaks 74 languages, and brings a connected and dynamic culture that drives continuous learning and innovation for our customers.

**Why should you be part of our success story?**


As the fastest-growing Software as a Service (SaaS) company in history, Deel is transforming how global talent connects with world-class companies – breaking down borders that have traditionally limited both hiring and career opportunities. We're not just building software; we're creating the infrastructure for the future of work, enabling a more diverse and inclusive global economy. In 2024 alone, we paid $11.2 billion to workers in nearly 100 currencies and provided healthcare and benefits to workers in 109 countries—ensuring people get paid and protected, no matter where they are.


Our momentum is reflected in our achievements and customer satisfaction: CNBC Disruptor 50, Forbes Cloud 100, Deloitte Fast 500, and repeated recognition on Y Combinator’s top companies list – all while maintaining a 4.83 average rating from 15,000 reviews across G2, Trustpilot, Captera, Apple and Google.


Your experience at Deel will be a career accelerator. At the forefront of the global work revolution, you'll tackle complex challenges that impact millions of people's working lives. With our momentum—backed by a $17.3 billion valuation and $1 B in Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) in just over five years—you'll drive meaningful impact while building expertise that makes you a sought-after leader in the transformation of global work.

**What you’ll do at Deel**

* Communicate with clients to understand their needs and explain product value
* Manage the full sales cycle for renewals, upsell and cross-sell using cross-departmental expertise as primary resources
* Collaborate with internal departments to facilitate client needs fulfilment
* Proactively engage cross-functionally to bring new product development, client engagement and competitive intelligence strategies to the larger team
* Meet or exceed monthly and yearly revenue targets
* Maintain accurate SFDC data: accounts, opportunities, pipeline and forecasts
* Resolving complaints and preventing additional issues by improving processes
* Acting as a client advocate with a focus on improving the buyer experience
* Ability to build rapport and collaborate with others within the company and externally

**Some key qualifications**

* Located in EMEA
* 3+ years of closing sales experience, with a minimum of 2 year selling into the Nordics market
* A proven track record of developing a greenfield territory and expanding business
* SFDC proficiency
* Experience in cross-functional teams to ensure Customer Success and satisfaction
* Desire to work for a fast-paced startup and take on increasing levels of responsibility
* Excellent written and spoken communication skills in English and Swedish

**Total Rewards**


Our workforce deserves fair and competitive pay that meets them where they are. With scalable benefits, rewards, and perks, our total rewards programs reflect our commitment to inclusivity and access for all.

**Some things you’ll enjoy**

* Stock grant opportunities dependent on your role, employment status and location
* Additional perks and benefits based on your employment status and country
* The flexibility of remote work, including optional WeWork access


At Deel, we’re an equal-opportunity employer that values diversity and positively encourage applications from suitably qualified and eligible candidates regardless of race, religion, sex, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability status, pregnancy or maternity or other applicable legally protected characteristics.

*Unless otherwise agreed, we will communicate with job applicants using Deel-specific emails, which include @**deel.com* *and other acquired company emails like @**payspace.com* *and @**paygroup.com**. You can view the most up-to-date job listings at Deel by visiting* *our careers page**.*  

  

Deel is an equal-opportunity employer and is committed to cultivating a diverse and inclusive workplace that reflects different abilities, backgrounds, beliefs, experiences, identities and perspectives.


Deel will provide accommodations on request throughout the recruitment, selection and assessment process for applicants with disabilities. If you require accommodations, please inform our Talent Acquisition Team via this link and a team member will be in touch to ensure your equal participation. If you have difficulty accessing the form, please email at recruiting@deel.com.


As part of our hiring process, we primarily rely on interviews and role-related assessments. In limited cases, we may also consider informal background information relevant to the role, in line with our privacy and fairness obligations.


This application process does utilise Automated Employment Decision Tools (AEDT) and AI systems to assist in evaluating candidates based on experience level, technical skills and qualifications. As a fully remote company, we also utilise AI-powered deepfake and fraud detection technologies to verify the authenticity of candidate identities and interactions during assessments and interviews. This processing is conducted in compliance with applicable Data Protection, AI Governance and Labour Laws. We ensure human oversight is maintained in all final hiring decisions. Your personal data is not used to train AI models. For more information on how we process your personal data, please see our Privacy Policy.

* **For NYC Residents:** In accordance with NYC Local Law 144, an independent bias audit has been conducted on AEDT; results are available at Ashby, Covey.

title: Senior Analytics Engineer
description:
TL;DR
  
We’re looking for a Senior Analytics Engineer with strong SQL skills and experience in building data pipelines and models for analytics. You’ll design data models, build ELT pipelines in BigQuery, ensure data quality, to drive product and business decisions.
  
Why Alva?
  
At Alva Labs, we’re redefining how companies hire — replacing gut feeling with science. We’re building an AI-first Hiring System — the only platform companies need to define roles, assess candidates, make confident decisions, and continuously improve their hiring. It replaces fragmented tools with one cohesive system designed to make hiring accurate, fair, and scalable. Leading companies across Europe trust us to make hiring more accurate, inclusive, and scalable.
  
We’re a small, ambitious team building from Stockholm, Sweden. We value ownership, velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We care deeply about our craft and each other — and we’re driven to build something that lasts.
  
Joining now means being part of the growth journey as we scale our product, explore new AI-powered capabilities, and bring fair hiring to millions more people.
  
What we’re looking for
  
Strong technical background in data architecture, ETL processes, and data modeling
  
  

Proficiency in SQL and experience with Python
  
  

Experience in implementing data governance practices and monitor data quality
  
  

Strong problem-solving skills
  
  

Collaborative — you enjoy working across functions with product, design, engineers, and researchers.
  
  

**The following qualifications are considered a plus:**  

A track record of successfully leading data-driven projects and initiatives
  
  

Experience in developing and executing data strategies aligned with business objectives
  
  

Most importantly, we're looking for someone who is passionate about driving data-driven decision making and continuously improving our data infrastructure and processes.
  
What you’ll do
  
**In one sentence:** Build data pipelines to power high-quality analytics
  
Build scalable data models and optimize ELT pipelines to power dashboards and self-serve analytics.
  
  

Ensure data quality through testing, governance, and documentation.
  
  

Collaborate closely with engineers, analysts, and business stakeholders.
  
  

Continuously improve tools and processes for a scalability, performance and reliability
  
  

Our tech stack
  
**Data Pipelines & Models:** BigQuery, dbt, synq, dlt
  
  

**Dashboards & Visualization:** Metabase, Lightdash
  
  

**Data Platform:** Google Cloud Platform, Cloud run, Docker, terraform
  
  

How we hire
  
Fill out a short application.
  
  

Objective screening with Alva’s own tests (your first interaction with the product we're building!).
  
  

Quick intro call with our Talent team.
  
  

Technical Interview with additional logic assessment and case.
  
  

**Final Loop:** Culture: You'll have a close-out chat to discuss Alva’s vision and culture.
  
  

Background & ID check.
  
  

About your application
  
Please apply in English — it’s our company language.
  
  

If you need adjustments at any stage of the process, let us know — we aim to make our hiring accessible and fair.

title: Extrapersonal Kundtjänst
description:
Studerar du på universitet och vill ha ett jobb på helger och möjlighet till sommarjobb. Då kanske det här jobbet är perfekt för dig.
  
Onslip
  
Onslip utvecklar digitala kassa- och restaurangsystem för restauranger och affärer runt om hela Sverige. Med den senaste tekniken hjälper vi restaurangägare att förenkla deras vardag med minskad administration och ökad lönsamhet. Vårt kontor ligger i centrala Linköping och vi är ett tight team om 15. Läs mer om oss på onslip.com och spana in oss på facebook.
  
Jobbet
  
Vår kundtjänst vårdar det viktigaste vi har, våra kunder. Du kommer att hjälpa restauranger, caféer och andra företag med frågor och tekniska problem. Arbetet sker via telefon eller online när kunden tar kontakt med Onslip men du tar även proaktivt kontakt med kunder för att säkerställa att kunderna är nöjda och att dom har allt dom behöver för att bedriva en effektiv verksamhet. Du hanterar även frågor om avtal, fakturor och andra kundtjänstrelaterade ärenden.
  
Våra kunder
  
Vi har passionerade företagare som kunder över hela Sverige, framför allt inom restaurang. Våra kunders framgång är vår framgång och därför jobbar vi outtröttligt med att ha Sveriges nöjdaste kunder.
  
Vem är du?
  
Du är ansvarsfull, driven, serviceinriktad, gillar att jobba i team och har ett intresse för teknik. Vi ser att du har en gymnasial utbildning men utöver det finns inget krav på utbildning, på Onslip kommer du att få all utbildning som du behöver.
  
Arbetstider
  
Vi kommer tillsammans fram till ett schema under supportens öppettider. Goda möjligheter finns även för utökat arbete under sommaren. OB-ersättning tillkommer för obekväm arbetstid.
  
  

Supportens öppettider
  
Vardagar 09:00-18:00
  
Helger 11:00-15:00
