title: Platform Engineer with AI experience
description:
**Providing Value & Impact – SwedQ.**
-------------------------------------


SwedQ är ett konsultbolag som har byggt en modell för människor som vill växa, skapa något som håller över tid och ta sig an uppdrag som faktiskt gör skillnad. Vi har år efter år hjälpt kunder i flera olika branscher, samtidigt som vi vuxit i omsättning, teamstorlek och effekt i våra leveranser. Vi väljer aktivt bort vissa branscher, som gambling och vapen.


Nu söker vi enPlatform Engineer med AI-erfarenhet som vill vara med och bygga robusta, skalbara och smarta plattformar för nästa generations produkter och interna utvecklingsmiljöer.


Det här är inte en roll för någon som bara vill “förvalta”. Vi söker dig som vill bygga, förbättra, automatisera och utmana hur moderna plattformar ska fungera – från infrastruktur och developer experience till AI-stöd i verkliga produktionsmiljöer.


Hos oss får du vara en del av bolaget i ordets verkliga bemärkelse. Det innebär att du inte bara löser tekniska problem, utan också får möjlighet att påverka riktning, erbjudande och på sikt ta del av värdet du hjälper till att skapa. Har du egna idéer? Bra. Vi gillar människor som driver saker framåt.

### **What’s in it for you?**


Det beror på vem du är och vad du vill ha ut av nästa steg.


Vissa prioriterar trygghet, tydlighet och stabilitet. Andra vill ha mer uppsida, större påverkan och är beredda att bära lite mer risk för att få det. Vi är öppna för båda – men vi är ärliga med vad som krävs.


Vi formar gärna rollen utifrån rätt person, så länge du också tillför något som flyttar oss framåt. Hos SwedQ kommer du jobba nära tekniskt starka personer, både internt och ute hos kund. Det betyder att du får stora möjligheter att både lära ut, lära dig och vara med och sätta standarden för hur bra plattformsarbete faktiskt ska se ut.

### **Vem är du?**

* Du har minst 5 års erfarenhet av att bygga, drifta och vidareutveckla plattformar, molninfrastruktur eller interna utvecklarplattformar i produktionsmiljö
* Du har stark erfarenhet av cloud-plattformar som AWS, Azure eller GCP
* Du har jobbat hands-on med Kubernetes, containrar och moderna deploymentsflöden
* Du är bekväm med Infrastructure as Code, exempelvis Terraform, Pulumi eller liknande
* Du har erfarenhet av CI/CD, automation och att bygga utvecklarvänliga plattformar som faktiskt används
* Du förstår att plattformsarbete inte handlar om teknik för teknikens skull, utan om att skapa hastighet, stabilitet, säkerhet och bättre developer experience
* Du har praktisk erfarenhet av observability, loggning, metrics och incidentnära arbete
* Du har jobbat med säkerhet i plattformar, exempelvis secrets management, IAM, policy enforcement eller compliance-nära krav
* Du har erfarenhet av att stötta eller bygga lösningar kring AI/ML workloads, till exempel:


	+ drift av AI-tjänster eller modeller i molnet
	+ plattformsstöd för LLM-applikationer
	+ vektor-databaser, inference pipelines eller GPU-relaterade miljöer
	+ MLOps, modellhantering eller deployment av AI-komponenter
* Du har ett pragmatiskt mindset och kan avgöra när något behöver vara elegant – och när det bara behöver fungera ordentligt
* Du tar ägarskap hela vägen från design till drift och kontinuerlig förbättring
* Du kommunicerar väl och fungerar bra med utvecklare, arkitekter, produktfolk och stakeholders
* Du behärskar **svenska och engelska** i tal och skrift

### **Extra plus om du också har:**

* Erfarenhet av plattformsteam eller Internal Developer Platforms
* Byggt självbetjäningslösningar för utvecklingsteam
* Erfarenhet av LLM integrationer, RAG-arkitektur eller AI-stöd i produktionssystem
* Jobbat i konsultmiljö eller i flera olika tekniska miljöer med hög förändringstakt
* Intresse för open source, utvecklarverktyg eller tekniskt ledarskap

### **SwedQ culture**


SwedQ började med människor som kände människor. Duktiga personer drog in andra duktiga personer. Därifrån växte bolaget vidare – först genom nätverk, sedan genom medveten rekrytering. Idag består vi av ett team med olika bakgrunder, erfarenheter och perspektiv.


Vi tror på frihet under ansvar, höga ambitioner och arbete som skapar verkligt värde. Men vi tror också på att ha kul längs vägen – med fotbollsturneringar, resor, middagar och ett gäng människor som faktiskt gillar att jobba med varandra. Den kulturbeskrivningen ligger i linje med hur SwedQ presenterar sitt arbetssätt och sin arbetsplats på karriärsidan.

### **Perks & Benefits**

* Konkurrenskraftig lön – du väljer den modell som passar dig bäst
* Budget för träning och hälsa
* Generös kompetens- och utvecklingsbudget
* Månatliga inbetalningar till extra pensionsfond
* Privat sjukförsäkring
* Privat sjukvård
* Centralt kontor i Stockholm
* Frukost på kontoret varje dag
* Stöd för open source-projekt och community-engagemang
* Vassa kollegor och mentorer runt hörnet
* Tjänstebil eller bilersättning
* Förmåner som förenklar livet – exempelvis städhjälp, barnomsorg och annat


Flera av dessa förmåner finns också återkommande i SwedQ:s nuvarande platsannons och karriärsida.

### **Låter det intressant?**


Bra.


Du behöver inte passa in i en perfekt mall. Men du behöver vara skicklig, nyfiken och ha rätt nivå av driv. Vi söker inte någon som vill gömma sig bakom processer. Vi söker någon som vill bygga plattformar som gör skillnad – på riktigt.

title: Fullstack Engineer
description:
### **Who we are**


Here at Waitwhile we're on a mission to eliminate the 1 trillion hours people spend waiting in lines every year. Our platform combines virtual waitlists, scheduling, real-time updates, messaging, and analytics to make access to places, services, and events seamless, online or in person. Trusted by 10,000+ companies, Waitwhile has already helped over 150 million people enjoy a radically better waiting experience. Our clients include IKEA, Louis Vuitton, Costco, Delta Airlines, and thousands more. We’re just getting started, and we need your help.

### **The role**


As a member of our Guest Journey team you’ll focus on building the user-facing product experiences that customers interact with daily. You’ll work closely with our VP of Engineering and our cross-functional engineering teams, contributing to scalable, high impact features that improve both our platform and user experience.


Our tech stack includes TypeScript and JavaScript, NodeJS, Firebase, Firestore, BigQuery, Angular and React, running on Linux in Google Cloud Platform.


While engineers may specialize deeply, Waitwhile increasingly values end-to-end product ownership and cross-stack collaboration as the organization scales. We're open to different backgrounds, whether you have a passion for backend, or if frontend holds a special place in your heart. What matters most is your drive, problem-solving acumen, and ambition to level up your skills while building something that truly makes a difference.

*This position is based in Stockholm at our offices on Kungsgatan 32. We’re a hybrid company and prefer that you work from the office at least 2 days per week, as we believe the best product gets built together, live.*

### **What you’ll do**

* Full engineering lifecycle including technical design, implementation, automated testing, deployment, and production monitoring.
* Drive improvements to engineering best practices, tooling, and code quality.
* Scalability, reliability, observability, and compliance across services and internal platforms.
* Ensure systems can scale sustainably while maintaining uptime and performance under enterprise load.
* Improve monitoring, logging, deployment systems, and operational tooling to support long-term platform health.

### **What skills you need**

* 5+ years of experience building web applications
* Solid programming skills in JavaScript/TypeScript, React or Angular and Node.js.
* Cloud hosting and operations in GCP
* Comfort in collaborating across the stack to support complete product experiences
* Great communication skills, comfortable explaining complex concepts to cross-functional teams
* A bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field

 **Bonus Skills & Attributes:**

* Previously worked at a startup or on a SaaS product
* Exposure to Firebase, Firestore and/or BigQuery
* Familiarity with distributed systems, performance tuning, and infrastructure tooling

### **A great place to work️**


We want Waitwhile to be an incredible place to work. We offer great benefits and perks, flexible working hours and lots of interesting challenges. We believe in making work fun and rewarding and care about your development and are committed to your success. Join Waitwhile at this exciting stage and help shape both our future and your own.  

  

*Waitwhile has a positive, diverse, and supportive culture—we look for people who are curious, inventive, and work to be a little better every single day. We aim to be smart, humble, hardworking and, above all, collaborative. If this sounds like a good fit for you, what are you waiting for? Apply for this job!*

title: Application Support Specialist
description:
**Role: Java Application Support Engineer** 




**Location: Stockholm, Sweden** 




**Type: Permanent** 




  





**Required Skills & Experience:** 



* Strong experience in Java and Spring Boot for building microservices.
* Hands-on experience with Camunda BPMN/DMN for workflow and decision automation.
* Experience in resource order orchestration using BPMN workflows.
* Proficiency in integrating services using REST APIs and Kafka (producers and consumers).
* Knowledge of External Task Worker patterns in Camunda.
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines and automated deployment processes.
* Hands-on experience with containerization using Docker and Kubernetes.
* Understanding of observability practices, including:
* Logging (JSON, ELK, Splunk)
* Metrics (Prometheus, Grafana)
* Experience in L2/L3 support, including troubleshooting workflow issues, debugging failed jobs, handling retries, and managing error paths.
* Ability to work in SLA-driven environments with on-call or rotational support.
* Experience working in Agile/Scrum teams.
* Strong communication skills for collaboration across development, QA, SRE, and operations teams.



  





**Preferred / Nice-to-Have Skills:** 



* Experience with telecom order/resource orchestration.
* Knowledge of Camunda 8 (Zeebe) and related tools (Operate, Optimize, Tasklist).
* Familiarity with cloud-native architectures and distributed tracing tools (OpenTelemetry, Jaeger).
* Understanding of microservices reliability patterns such as circuit breakers, retries, and compensation mechanisms.
* Knowledge of networking concepts and protocols, including BGP, OSPF, VLANs, and STP.

title: Information Technology Service Delivery Manager
description:
At TechBiz Global, we are providing recruitment service to our TOP clients from our portfolio.
 



 We are currently looking for a highly proactive and detail-oriented
 **IT Service Manager** 
 to join one of our
 **clients** 
 ' teams. If you're looking for an exciting opportunity to grow in an innovative environment, this could be the perfect fit for you.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




  





**-** 
 Ensure the consistent delivery of IT services across various platforms, including network infrastructure, hardware, software, cloud solutions, and internet connectivity.
 



 - Implement and monitor service management tools (e.g., HALO) for optimal ticket handling and resolution processes.
 



 - Provide exceptional technical support to clients or users through various channels (phone, email, chat) to resolve issues promptly.
 



 - Address client complaints within agreed SLAs (Service Level Agreements).
 



 - Manage a service desk team to handle routine and complex technical inquiries efficiently.
 



 - Monitor for unusual activities that may indicate potential security breaches.
 



 - Track the performance of IT systems and infrastructure using monitoring tools to identify bottlenecks or inefficiencies.
 



 - Regularly analyse data to ensure optimal resource allocation and system uptime.
 



 - Oversee the incident response plan, including the timely escalation of issues to higher levels if necessary.
 



 - Ensure that all incidents are logged accurately and resolved within agreed SLAs.
 



 - Identify areas for improvement in service delivery processes and implement changes to enhance efficiency and reduce costs.
 



 - Provide training and support to staff to improve service quality and client satisfaction.
 



 - Monitor and manage IT service budgets, ensuring that services are delivered within financial constraints while maintaining quality standards.
 



 - Collaborate with other departments (IT, operations, sales) to align service goals with organisational objectives.
 



 - Build strong partnerships with clients to understand their needs and ensure the delivery of tailored solutions.
 



  





 Job requirements
 


* Relevant Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related field. Additional certifications such as CompTIA, Cisco, or Microsoft Certified can be advantageous.
* Extensive experience in managing IT services within a senior or managerial role. Proven track record of successfully delivering high-quality IT support across various industries.
* Technical Expertise: In-depth knowledge of current technologies, including ticketing systems (e.g. HALO), automation tools, and monitoring platforms. Familiarity with cloud-based solutions and virtualisation environments is a plus.
* Strong interpersonal skills to build trust and deliver exceptional customer service. Ability to interact effectively with clients at all levels.
* Analytical mindset to identify inefficiencies in IT processes and implement systematic improvements. Experience in streamlining operations or developing best practices is advantageous.
* Quick and accurate diagnosis of technical issues, ensuring solutions are implemented efficiently and effectively.
* Clear and concise communication abilities for internal team coordination and external client interactions.



  





**Bonus:** 




 Experience with managing customer success programs (e.g., CRM systems like Salesforce) to track client satisfaction and retention.
 



 Expertise in incident management frameworks, such as NIST's Cybersecurity Framework (CSF) or ISO 27001.
 



 Knowledge of advanced technologies like AI-driven threat detection, machine learning for anomaly detection, and cloud-native security solutions.

title: Solution Architect
description:
****Om Hypergene****
 Hypergene är ett svenskt SaaS‑företag med över 20 års erfarenhet och mer än 600 kunder runt om i Norden. Vi är ungefär 250 medarbetare med kontor i Sverige, Finland och Norge. Våra molnbaserade lösningar stöttar organisationer inom både privat och offentlig sektor i planering, uppföljning och analys — och gör det möjligt att fatta smartare beslut och arbeta mer effektivt. Sedan 2023 är Hypergene en del av Thoma Bravo, en av världens ledande investerare inom mjukvara.
   

  

****Om rollen****
 Som Solution Architect hos Hypergene får du en central roll i att skapa, utveckla och kvalitetssäkra lösningar för våra kunder. Du arbetar nära både kund och kollegor inom vår Customer Organization, samtidigt som du, över tid, också får möjlighet att bidra till produktutvecklingen och ta en aktiv roll i tidiga kunddialoger.
   

  

 När du börjar hos oss får du en dedikerad mentor som stöttar dig i att snabbt komma in i rollen och känna dig trygg i vårt arbetssätt.
   

  

****Dina arbetsuppgifter och ansvar****
* Kundutveckling: Utforma, guida och vidareutveckla kundlösningar inom datamodellering och integration. Ta ett helhetsansvar för kundens lösning och arbeta långsiktigt med kunder i kontinuerliga dialoger.
* Workshops: Leda och delta i kundworkshops och dialogmöten där du är rådgivande, utmanar och guidar kunden för att säkerställa hög kvalitet och bästa möjliga resultat.
* Presale: Medverka i säljdialoger genom din expertis. Hålla demos, ta fram lösningsförslag och bidra i tidiga diskussioner om kundens behov och möjliga vägval.
* Samarbete med Produktavdelningen: Bidra i produktorganisationens arbete, till exempel genom att driva utvecklingen av specifika branschlösningar. Dela insikter från kundprojekt och bidra till produktens fortsatta utveckling.


****Vem du är****
 Vi söker dig som har:
   

  

* Minst 5 års erfarenhet i en liknande roll.
* Gedigen erfarenhet av konsultrollen och ett arbetssätt som bygger på kundfokus och värdeskapande.
* Förmåga att förstå verksamhetsprocesser och arbeta med kundens rådata från ekonomi-, HR‑ och verksamhetssystem för att översätta detta till fungerande lösningar. Meriterande med verksamhetskunskaper inom offentlig sektor.
* Stark bakgrund inom BI, gärna med verktyg som Qlik och Power BI.
* Goda kunskaper i SQL, inklusive best practice och optimering (t.ex. indexering).
* Erfarenhet av datamodellering, dokumentation och förmåga att guida både kunder och kollegor.
* Mycket god samarbetsförmåga och trivs i teammiljöer där man gemensamt löser kunders utmaningar.
* Förmåga att prioritera och strukturera flera parallella arbetsuppgifter på ett effektivt sätt.


****Vårt erbjudande****
 Det här är en möjlighet för dig som vill vidareutvecklas i en miljö där du varje dag kan göra verklig skillnad. Hos oss får du:
   

  

* En arbetsplats med hjälpsamma, prestigelösa och engagerade kollegor.
* Spännande och utvecklande uppdrag i en snabbväxande och dynamisk verksamhet.
* Möjlighet att bidra till både kundnytta och produktutveckling – inklusive hur AI‑funktionalitet och dataanalys kan stärka vår lösning.
* Konkurrenskraftig lön och förmåner.
* En kultur där vi vet att våra medarbetare är nyckeln till Hypergenes framgång.


****Placeringsort: Stockholm eller Malmö - vi har behov på båda orterna!****
****Skicka in din ansökan redan idag!****
 Vi ser fram emot att lära känna dig och utforska hur vi tillsammans kan fortsätta utveckla Hypergenes framgång.

title: Scrum Master / Service Manager
description:
Scania is undergoing a transformation from being a leading supplier of trucks, buses, and engines to providing complete and sustainable transport solutions. Together with TRATON and our sister brands MAN, Volkswagen Truck & Bus, and International, we are working to shape the future of mobility with innovative and environmentally conscious solutions. Our values – customer first, respect, team spirit, responsibility, and elimination of waste – are at the heart of everything we do. Together, we are at the forefront of creating a sustainable future.
   

  

**Role Summary**
 Join our dynamic global team and make an impact!
   

  

 We’re looking for an experienced
 **Scrum Master / Service Manager** 
 who is passionate about driving Agile delivery and ensuring world-class service for HR IT applications.
   

  

 In this dual role, you will:
   

  

  

* Lead Agile practices by facilitating ceremonies, removing impediments, and fostering a culture of continuous improvement.
* Ensure operational excellence by managing technical incidents, optimizing service delivery, and maintaining compliance with organizational standards.


 This is a unique opportunity for a proactive leader who thrives in a fast-paced environment, enjoys collaboration across global teams, and is committed to delivering seamless, high-quality solutions.
   

  

**Job Responsibilities**
**Scrum Master for Global Inhouse applications**
* Facilitate Agile ceremonies including Daily Stand-ups, Sprint Planning, Refinement, and Retrospectives.
* Support continuous delivery by identifying and removing impediments faced by the development team.
* Coordinate release planning and ensure alignment of sprint deliverables with business objectives.
* Promote Agile best practices and empower the team to achieve high performance.
* Support the Product Owner in maintaining a clear and prioritized backlog.
* Ensure clear communication of progress, risks, and dependencies across teams and stakeholders.


**Service Manager**
* Oversee incident management processes and ensure timely resolution of technical issues.
* Coordinate and communicate effectively across application, infrastructure, and business teams.
* Conduct compliance activities, including penetration tests and IRAM assessments.
* Manage operational workflows such as Alto, PRI, and other service management processes.
* Create and maintain release notes for the product.
* Troubleshooting incidents using SQL.


**Who You Are**
**Qualifications & Skills**
**Must-Have**
* Profound knowledge of Agile and Scrum methodologies.
* Hands-on experience in technical incident management.
* Strong working knowledge of JIRA for project tracking and Zephyr for test management.
* Experience with POSTMAN for API testing and validation.
* Basic understanding of databases (SQL queries, data validation, troubleshooting).
* Familiarity with AWS portal and cloud-based environments.
* Awareness of GDPR and data privacy principles.


**Soft Skills**
* Strong problem-solving, analytical, and stakeholder management skills.
* Excellent communication and collaboration abilities across technical and business teams.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
* Certifications such as Certified Scrum Master (CSM/PSM),or Agile Practitioner are highly desirable.


**Key Attributes**
* Proactive and detail-oriented mindset.
* Strong ownership and accountability for service performance.
* Ability to balance Agile delivery with operational excellence.
* Collaborative approach to problem-solving and continuous improvement.


**This Is Us**
 The group People & Culture IT Solutions supports Scania with People & Culture (P&C) IT-solutions, covering the whole lifecycle, from requirement analysis to implementation and production. Scania’s business is changing over time, and we are on a journey phasing out older applications and implementing modern technologies. We are replacing local solutions with a global way of working and a more consistent application landscape.
   

  

 Globalization, digitalization, and mobility are examples of trends that are affecting our business environment. We are moving towards SAP SuccessFactors, SaaS (Software as a service), and AWS (Amazon Web Services) in our IT landscape.
   

  

**Scania Offers**
 We offer a dynamic, flexible workplace with hybrid work options, including Scania Sergel and Midway hubs. With a structured development plan and courses, Scania supports your career growth both locally and internationally.
   

  

 Benefits include training at our health center Gröndal or wellness allowance, result bonus, flexible hours, and company car leasing. Scania also hosts events for employees and their families, and Stockholm residents enjoy direct access to Södertälje via Scania Job express buses.
   

  

**Application**
 Your application should include a CV and any relevant certificates. We welcome all applicants and strive for diversity in our recruitment processes.
   

  

 Apply as soon as possible, no later than 2026-04-19. Screening will take place on an ongoing basis during the application period. Logical and personality tests may be used as part of the selection process, and a background check may be required for this role.
   

  

**We look forward for your application!**

title: System Administrator (Network)
description:
The IT team is now looking for a highly motivated and skilled System Administrator to join them. This role involves maintaining and optimizing our existing network and server infrastructure, as well as contributing to the design and configuration of new systems.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Design and implement network infrastructure for our Data Center and offices, utilizing technologies such as Linux Firewalls, Ubiquiti UniFi hardware, and Dell Switches.
* Perform comprehensive network administration, including:


 Configuring and managing Nftables, Dell Datacenter switches and UNIFI.
   

  

 Implementing OSPF and WAN Optimization.
   

  

 Conducting packet inspection using Wireshark or similar tools.
   

  

* Maintain and optimize the performance and stability of our current network and servers.
* Install and configure new network and server hardware.
* Execute general systems administrator duties and support.
* Collaborate with the rest of the IT team with things such as: play test setup, town hall meetings, streaming setup, hardware troubleshooting, support tasks, configuration changes, and procurement if needed


**Who You Are**
* Curious & Fast Learner: You possess a natural desire to understand how systems function and you quickly absorb new information.
* Self-Driven: You take full ownership of your tasks, proactively identify problems, and are dedicated to finding effective solutions.
* A Doer: You enjoy achieving results and are comfortable switching between high-level architectural planning and hands-on installation and configuration work.


**It's Nice If You Also Have**
* Familiarity with web servers, load balancers, and proxy servers.
* Experience with cloud technologies: Kubernetes, Google Compute Engine, and general cloud computing.
* Administration of Perforce Servers.
* Windows Server expertise, specifically DFS, MDT, WDS, and Intune.
* Programming or scripting proficiency in Python or Powershell.


 Note: Research shows under-represented groups in the industry might not apply to a job if they don’t check off every requirement. At Avalanche, we’re more about your drive to learn and interest in tackling challenges than what’s on your resume! So don’t stress if you don’t tick every box— shoot us your application anyway! Diverse opinions and different experiences are what make our teams so great, not itemized lists of qualifications.
   

  

**The Stockholm location**
 Our Stockholm office is situated in Södermalm, the beating heart of the city’s game industry. It’s a physical representation of our games – the lush vegetation of Just Cause and theHunter: Call of the Wild meets corroded metal straight out of Mad Max. Our hybrid model requires you to be in the office on Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays to foster collaboration and creativity.
   

  

**Our values**
 At Avalanche Studios Group, we create worlds beyond limits. But that’s not exclusive to our games, so we’re committed to developing a diverse and inclusive workplace. All Avalanchers have a shared responsibility to create an open work environment where everyone is treated equally and respectfully. Being part of our world is not contingent on your heritage, your gender, or sexual orientation. It’s all about your passion and creativity.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 To apply for this position, please register below and provide your CV in English. We review applications continuously. All further studio-related information is provided under a non-disclosure agreement.
   

  

 At Avalanche Studios Group we're always on the lookout for talented individuals to join our passionate team, but please note that relocation assistance is not available for this role.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Senior teknisk arkitekt
description:
Advania Knowledge Factory söker erfarna specialister som Technical Architects, rollen är baserad i Sverige och du rapporterar direkt till en av våra Captains.
 



  





 Hos oss blir du en del av ett av Sveriges starkaste tech-team med experter inom Azure Cloud, M365 Cloud, Device management (iOS, android, MAC) och mer.
 



 Vill du arbeta nära kunder, driva tekniska lösningar och vara en nyckelperson i våra mest strategiska uppdrag? Som Technical Architect på Advania-Knowledge Factory blir du en del av ett team med några av branschens främsta experter – ödmjuka, samverkande och alltid snabba på att anpassa oss till förändring.
 



  





 Du bygger relationer, leder dialoger med beslutsfattare och designar smarta, hållbara och effektiva lösningar som skapar verkligt värde för våra kunder.
 



 I rollen förväntas du:
 


* ta ansvar för hela eller delar av leveransen i både små och stora projekt
* vägleda organisationer med de bästa tekniska strategierna
* hålla workshops och utbildningar inom ditt specialistområde

title: AI product management specialist
description:
**Drive AI-powered product transformation across leading Nordic software companies** 




 Hi, we’re Monterro, the Nordics’ largest software growth investor. Our mission is to turn Nordic B2B software companies into market leaders, by contributing our time, experience, know-how and networks. And yes, we provide capital too.
 



  





 We are previous founders, entrepreneurs, and executives of software companies who now support our portfolio companies in all aspects of growth.
 



  





**Our team is expanding and we’re now looking for an AI - Product Management Specialist who will help our portfolio companies unlock the real value of AI in their products.** 




  





**In this role, you will work closely with CEOs, CPOs, CTOs and product teams across our portfolio, helping them identify AI opportunities, shape product strategies, and integrate AI into both new and existing products.** 




  





 Few roles offer the opportunity to influence AI strategy across 30+ B2B software companies simultaneously.
 



  





**This is an opportunity like no other** 




 Why? Well, here are a few of our favourite reasons:
 


* You’ll help shape AI-driven product strategies across a portfolio of leading Nordic software companies
* You’ll work closely with CEOs, CPOs and leadership teams, influencing strategic product decisions
* You’ll evaluate products through an AI lens, identifying opportunities to create real competitive advantage
* You’ll coach product leaders on how AI can transform their specific domain and product offering
* You’ll develop frameworks and playbooks for AI-driven product transformation across the portfolio
* You’ll contribute to AI perspectives in due diligence and investment decisions
* You’ll join a small, senior team with high autonomy and direct access to leadership



  





**About you** 




 If you’re the right candidate for us, we believe you have:
 


* 10-15+ years of experience in product management or product leadership
* Experience as CPO, VP Product, Head of Product, or founder
* Strong background in B2B SaaS products
* Hands-on experience applying AI or machine learning in software products
* Ability to distinguish AI hype from real product value and feasibility
* Experience working with senior leadership teams or boards



 We also think you are:
 


* Analytical and structured
* Entrepreneurial and collaborative
* A strong communicator who can influence product and business strategy
* Curious and genuinely interested in AI and emerging technologies



 You are fluent in
 **Swedish and English** 
 , both written and spoken.
 



  





**What we offer you** 



* Become part of shaping the AI future of Nordic B2B software companies
* Work closely with experienced software founders, investors, and operators
* A unique position at the intersection of AI, product strategy, and value creation
* A collaborative and low-hierarchy work environment
* Competitive compensation and the opportunity to invest alongside Monterro
* High autonomy and the chance to influence strategy across multiple companies



 This position is based in
 **Stockholm** 
 and includes travel within the Nordics.
 



  





**A little about us** 




 Founded in 2012, Monterro is the Nordic’s largest hands-on software growth investor.
 



 We turn Nordic B2B software companies into market leaders by contributing our time, experience, know-how, and networks. And yes, we provide capital too. In fact, we invest our own capital, meaning we have real skin in the game alongside the companies we support.
 



 Today Monterro has €3.1bn under management, more than 30 portfolio companies, and offices in Stockholm, Oslo, Copenhagen, Helsinki, and Hanoi.
 



  





**Are you ready to shape the future of AI-driven software companies?** 




 Apply now and join us on the journey.
