title: Platform Engineers
description:
Arbetsplatsbeskrivning
   

  

 Är du redo för en större uppgift?
   

  

 Polismyndigheten är Sveriges största myndighet med ca 40 000 medarbetare över hela landet. Hos oss får du möjlighet att bidra till Polisens uppdrag – att öka tryggheten och minska brottsligheten i samhället.
   

  

 IT-avdelningens främsta uppgift är att tillhandahålla IT-tjänster till hela Polismyndigheten. IT-avdelningen är en viktig del av det brottsförebyggande och brottsbekämpande arbetet och IT är ett av de viktigaste verktygen för att effektivisera polisen och öka kvaliteten i polisarbetet. IT-avdelningen utvecklar och moderniserar polisens IT och myndigheten satsar mycket på att stärka avdelningen med ny specialistkompetens och den senaste teknologin till nytta för medborgarna och medarbetarna i den polisiära verksamheten.
   

  

 Som statligt anställd på Polismyndigheten erbjuds du attraktiva villkor kring pension, föräldralön, friskvård m.m. Läs mer om våra förmåner här.
   

  

 Arbetsbeskrivning
   

  

 Som Platform engineer på Polismyndigheten är du med och bygger helt nya miljöer, men även underhåller och automatiserar befintliga (on-prem). I dina arbetsuppgifter ingår design och implementering av nya lösningar, konfiguration och felsökning. Samarbete med utvecklingsteam, modern plattformsutveckling, omvärldsbevakning och automatisering är centrala delar i rollen som Platform engineer.
   

  

 Möt Niklas och få en inblick i vardagen som Platform Engineer.
   

  

 Kvalifikationer
   

  

 Detta är en möjlighet för dig som har:
   

  

* Minst två års aktuell arbetslivserfarenhet inom området som arbetsgivaren bedömer relevant för tjänsten
* Relevant eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT-området, alternativt motsvarande förvärvad erfarenhet som Polismyndigheten bedömer som likvärdig
* Mycket god erfarenhet och kompetens av Kubernetes & containerhantering i närtid
* God erfarenhet av Linux-systemadministration
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, tal och skrift


 Denna tjänst kräver svenskt medborgarskap
   

  

**Det är meriterande om du även har:**
* God erfarenhet och kompetens av Ansible, ArgoCD, Bicep, FluxCD, Helm, Kustomize, Terraform eller liknande verktyg.
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD flöden
* Grundläggande förståelse för säkerhet i container- och nätverksmiljöer
* Praktisk erfarenhet av skriptning i bash, python eller golang
* Praktisk erfarenhet av versionshanteringssystem, tex. Git


**Personliga egenskaper**
 Vi söker dig som är nyfiken på nya teknologier och vill förbättra utvecklings- och driftprocesser. Du har ett plattforms- och produktperspektiv och tänker på användarupplevelsen. Du delar med dig av dina kunskaper och som enkelt kommunicerar med andra för att nå gemensamma mål. Du är också lösningsfokuserad, ansvarstagande, noggrann, ambitiös och tar egna initiativ. Vi är ett distribuerat och prestigelöst team som arbetar tillsammans mycket och pratar med varandra ofta för att nå bästa lösningar, så du ska tycka om att arbeta i grupp och ha lätt för att samarbeta och vara kommunikativ.
   

  

 Är du sugen på att arbeta i en spännande och modern miljö och är redo att ta stort ansvar, vill arbeta med ständigt lärande och utvecklas kontinuerligt så tycker vi att du ska söka! Vi kommer att lägga mycket stor vikt vid personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 Har du erfarenheten? Vi söker också senior Platform Engineers.
   

  

 Kontaktpersoner
   

  

 Har du frågor om uppdraget är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef på
   

  

 telefon 010-563 68 71.
   

  

 Har du frågor gällande rekryteringsprocessen kontakta ansvarig HR-konsult: Maria Moberg, maria.moberg1@polisen.se.
   

  

 Fackliga företrädare
   

  

 Polisförbundet, Sofia Ask, tfn: 010-563 87 10
   

  

 SACO, saco-s.avdelningarna@polisen.se
   

  

 SEKO Polisen, Karna Tillheden, tfn: 010-561 66 27
   

  

 ST, Jessica Stålenkrans 010-563 32 66
   

  

 Övrig information
   

  

 Anställningsform: Tillsvidareanställning, 6 månaders provanställning
   

  

 Anställningsbenämning: Handläggare
   

  

 Arbetsort: Stockholm eller Göteborg
   

  

 Funktion: Platform Engineer
   

  

 Arbetstid: Flexibel arbetstid, beredskap
   

  

 Tillträde: Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

**Ansökan**
 Ansök genom att bifoga ditt CV (vi vill inte ha något personligt brev) och besvara urvalsfrågorna. Frågorna utgår från kravprofilen för den här rekryteringen och dina svar ligger till grund för det urval som sker i processen. Att besvara frågorna är en förutsättning för att din ansökan ska anses komplett.
   

  

 Urval/intervjuer kan komma att ske löpande. Är du redo för en större uppgift – sök jobbet redan idag!
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan i form av CV och besvarande av urvalsfrågorna via e-post till jobb.na@polisen.se senast den 15e april 2026.**
 Ansökningar till denna befattning kommer endast tas emot via den mailadress som anges i annonsen.
 **Märk din ansökan med referensnummer A150.273/2026 i mailets ärendemening.**
**Besvara följande urvalsfrågor som en del av din ansökan:**
* Har du minst två års aktuell arbetslivserfarenhet inom området som du bedömer relevant för tjänsten? Om ja, beskriv din erfarenhet.
* Har du relevant eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT-området, alternativt motsvarande förvärvad erfarenhet som du bedömer som likvärdig? Om ja, beskriv din erfarenhet.
* Har du mycket god erfarenhet och kompetens av Kubernetes & containerhantering? Om ja, beskriv din erfarenhet och när i tid.
* Har du god erfarenhet av Linux-systemadministration? Om ja, beskriv din erfarenhet.
* Har du mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, tal och skrift? Ja/Nej
* Har du svenskt medborgarskap? Ja/Nej
* Har du god erfarenhet och kompetens av Ansible, ArgoCD, Bicep, FluxCD, Helm, Kustomize, Terraform eller liknande verktyg? Om ja, beskriv din erfarenhet och kompetens.
* Har du erfarenhet av CI/CD flöden? Om ja, beskriv din erfarenhet.
* Har du grundläggande förståelse för säkerhet i container- och nätverksmiljöer? Om ja, beskriv din erfarenhet.
* Har du praktisk erfarenhet av skriptning i bash, python eller golang? Om ja, beskriv vilken erfarenhet.
* Har du praktisk erfarenhet av versionshanteringssystem, tex. Git? Om ja, beskriv din erfarenhet.


 Vänligen notera att krav och eventuella meriter ska vara uppfyllda vid ansökningstillfället.
   

  

 De uppgifter du lämnar i samband med din ansökan kan användas för att kontakta dig, få information och kallelser samt eventuella anställningshandlingar.
   

  

 Urvalstest kan förekomma inom ramen för rekryteringen.
   

  

 Har du skyddade personuppgifter, referenser eller liknande information som du själv bedömer som skyddsvärd rekommenderar vi att du kontaktar ansvarig HR-konsult innan du går vidare med din ansökan. Om du vill komplettera din ansökan vänder du dig till ansvarig HR-konsult.
   

  

 Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) genomförs innan beslut om anställning fattas. Med anställning följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. Läs mer om krigsplacering och säkerhetsprövning under https://polisen.se/krigsplacering och https://polisen.se/sakerhetsprovning
   

  

 Polismyndigheten kommer att behandla dina personuppgifter i enlighet med reglerna i EU:s dataskyddsförordning (2016/679) och annan tillämplig dataskyddsreglering. Läs mer om vår hantering av personuppgifter på https://polisen.se/personuppgifter/rekrytering
   

  

 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

 Vi undanber oss samtal och mail från dig som vill sälja annons- och rekryteringstjänster.

title: Strategic Finance
description:
**TL;DR:** 
 You'll be the analytical engine behind Lovable's fastest-moving finance decisions. Working directly with the team that built our financial infrastructure from scratch, you'll model vendor economics, build scenario analyses, reconcile messy data into clean insights, and give our leadership the numbers they need to move fast and move right. This is not a back-office role. You'll be in the room where the decisions happen.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, automate work, and bring their ideas to life. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
* In one sentence: Build the models, pull the data, and surface the insights that drive Lovable's most consequential financial decisions.
* Own the analytical heavy lifting: Build and maintain financial models across vendor economics, unit cost attribution, scenario planning, and investment tradeoffs. You'll be the person who turns ambiguous data into something our team can act on.
* Drive vendor and cost intelligence: We spend a significant portion of our operating expenses annually across LLM providers, cloud infrastructure, and SaaS tools. You'll model the commercial economics, track spend against commitments, and flag opportunities before they become problems.
* Support strategic finance across the business: From headcount planning to revenue modeling to partnership economics, you'll provide analytical leverage wherever the highest-priority question is. One week it's an LLM cost attribution model. The next it's a pricing scenario for a new revenue stream. Context-switching is the job.
* Reconcile the chaos: Lovable moves fast and the data doesn't always keep up. You'll dig into billing data, accounting records, and operational metrics to find the truth in the noise. Investigative rigor is non-negotiable.
* Build for an AI-native function: We don't do things the old way. You'll use AI tools aggressively to accelerate your own work and help us design the finance function of the future.


**About You**
* 1-3 years of experience: In investment banking, management consulting, private equity, or operational finance at a high-growth company. You’ve built strong analytical foundations and you’re ready to apply them to building something real.
* Exceptional modeler: You can build a financial model from a blank sheet and a messy data set. Excel and Google Sheets are second nature. SQL or BI tools (Hex, Looker, etc.) are a strong plus.
* Comfortable in chaos: You don't freeze when the data is incomplete, the timeline is tight, and the question keeps changing. You've worked in environments where "figure it out" is the brief.
* AI-native mindset: You use AI tools daily, not as a novelty but as core workflow. You're the person who finds a way to automate the tedious part before anyone asks you to.
* Hungry, not entitled: You understand that in-house finance is not high finance. You're not the product here — the product is. You bring the rigor from your training but you're energized by getting your hands dirty, not by the prestige of where you sit.
* Bonus points for: experience with SaaS or usage-based business models, exposure to cloud/LLM cost structures, or having built something yourself (side project, startup, Lovable app — anything that shows builder instinct).


**About Your Application**
 Please submit your application in English. It’s our company language, so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join.
   

  

 We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested, please apply through our careers portal.

title: Senior Data Scientist
description:
At Tele2, we challenge the telecom industry to create more valuable solutions for our customers. Guided by our challenger mindset, we deliver high-quality connectivity and digital services, ranging from mobile and fixed networks to TV, streaming and global IoT.
   

  

 Sustainability is an integral part of how we work. Tele2 has been recognized as a climate leader in Europe by the Financial Times and named Sweden’s most sustainable company, reflecting our long-term commitment to reducing our environmental impact and advancing circular solutions together with our customers.
   

  

 Our values – Be Brave, Take Action, Make it Simple and Act Cost-efficiently – guide our culture, how we collaborate and how we turn ideas into action.
   

  

*You'd rather ship a model that disrupts a market than polish a Jupyter notebook nobody reads. Join Tele2's Data & AI team where your work goes live, serves millions of customers, and drives real decisions. We pair machine learning craft with agentic AI to multiply what a single data scientist can deliver. If you want outcomes over outputs and agentic AI tools that let you focus on engaging complex problems, let's talk.*
**About The Job**
 What does "data scientist" mean in 2026? Not a data analyst - we have AI for that. Not a software engineer - your delivery isn't an application; it's an outcome. Think of it as someone who translates all kinds of numbers into business value, using every tool available.
   

  

 As a Senior Data Scientist in Tele2's Data & AI (DELTA) unit, you own the path from messy business problems to measurable impact. You will work closely with product owners, engineers, and business stakeholders - using machine learning as your foundation and agentic AI to move faster and reach further.
   

  

* Drive measurable business outcomes through machine learning - churn prediction, customer lifetime value, recommendation systems, network optimization, and beyond
* Lead end-to-end data science projects from problem framing through to production deployment, owning the result, not just the model
* Harness agentic AI and LLM-based tools to accelerate analysis, automate repetitive workflows, and scale your ability to generate insights
* Evaluate and adopt emerging AI tools and techniques - staying on the cutting edge to continuously improve how the team works
* Build and maintain robust data pipelines and feature engineering frameworks to support model development
* Translate business challenges into well-defined problems and communicate results clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders
* Mentor junior data scientists and contribute to best practices, code quality, and knowledge sharing within the team
* Collaborate with data engineers and MLOps to ensure models are production-ready, scalable, and monitored


**Who are you?**
*To thrive and succeed in this role we believe that you:*
* Hold a Master's or PhD in a quantitative field such as Statistics, Computer Science, Mathematics, Physics, or a related discipline
* Have 5+ years of hands-on experience in data science or machine learning roles
* Are proficient in Python and its data science ecosystem (pandas, scikit-learn, XGBoost, PyTorch/TensorFlow)
* Have strong experience with SQL and working with large-scale data warehouses
* Demonstrate solid understanding of statistical modeling, experimental design (A/B testing), and causal inference
* Have experience deploying models into production environments
* Are genuinely excited about leveraging agentic AI and LLMs as tools to amplify your data science impact


*Preferred qualifications:*
* Experience using agentic AI coding tools (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor), LLM-based workflows, or AI-assisted development to accelerate data science work (e.g., LangChain, LangGraph, RAG pipelines, vector databases)
* Familiarity with prompt engineering and leveraging LLMs for analytical workflows
* Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and MLOps tools (MLflow, Kubeflow, or similar)
* Familiarity with the telecom domain — network data, customer journey analytics, or pricing optimization
* Experience with NLP, time-series forecasting, or graph-based methods
* Contributions to open-source projects or published research


**Benefits**
 Pension and health care
   

  

 Hybrid and flexible work life balance
   

  

 Career opportunities
   

  

 Parental benefit
   

  

 Employee benefits and Tele2 discounts
   

  

 Inclusive workplace

title: Mechanical Design Engineer
description:
**Build the Future of Technology with Professional Galaxy AB**
 Join a network of talented engineers, developers, cloud specialists, and AI innovators working on impactful projects across Sweden and Europe. At Professional Galaxy AB, we connect top tech talent with companies driving digital transformation in areas like cloud computing, software engineering, data, cybersecurity, and artificial intelligence.
   

  

 Explore exciting opportunities and grow your career while working with cutting-edge technologies and forward-thinking teams.
   

  

 We are looking for a
 **Mechanical Design Engineer**
**About the Role:**
 The team is responsible for product improvements and changes of power solution engines in production. Work mainly occurs after decision point CR6 in projects, but sometimes also before.
   

  

**Scope of Work:**
 Design assignments may concern any part of the engine within the organization. The work contributes to improving quality, reducing cost, and solving production-related issues for engines in production after SOP.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Independently manage and solve PCR (Product Change Request) assignments from pre-study to development and follow up until closure
* Act as design resource and sometimes assignment manager for FQ (Field Quality) cases
* Support production by assisting Q-team with design work and assignment management
* Support or create cost calculations and KPIs for various tasks
* Conduct technical investigations within EFR (Exemption From Requirement)
* Actively participate in improvement work within the group
* Be responsible for introduced product changes, including warranty costs and production quality after SOP
* Communicate and collaborate with line groups
* Ensure decisions are made by authorized personnel in EFR cases
* Follow strategic R&D and improvement plans


**Required Qualifications:**
* 10+ years of design experience in automotive or related areas
* Tools/Software: 3D Experience, OAS, Catia v5
* Chassis, engine, or electrical design experience
* Knowledge of design processes (EFR, PCR, PR)
* Drawing reviewer
* Autonomous and organized
* Fluent in English


**Preferred / Meriting:**
* Experience with power solutions
* Experience with Field Quality processes
* Project management skills
* Swedish language skills


**Personal Profile:**
* Self-driven design engineer with a strong interest in the automotive industry
* Creative, engaged, and curious about product development
* Values communication and enjoys working in a fast-paced, cross-functional environment


**Additional Information:**
* Full-time, hybrid with at least 3 days/week on-site
* Candidate selection is continuous; early applications are recommended
* Good opportunity for assignment extension
* Background check will be conducted prior to assignment start


**Assignment Period:**
* Start: 2026-04-27
* End: 2026-05-31


**Application Deadline:** 
 2026-04-13
   

  

**How to Apply:**
 Are you the right person for this assignment, or do you want to recommend a strong candidate? Please apply directly via the
 **Professional Galaxy AB portal** 
 with:
   

  

* Your updated CV
* Your availability to start
* A motivation statement describing why you are suitable for this role, referencing previous consulting assignments, education, and personal qualities


 Please note: Applications via email will not be accepted. All applications must be submitted through the portal to be valid.

title: Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer
description:
**Do you want to be at the forefront of protecting our society against cyber threats? We are looking for a Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer to team up with the most dedicated team of cyber specialists in our Secure Infrastructure domain.**
**About Truesec – A Leading Cybersecurity Company**
 Since 2005, Truesec has been a native cybersecurity company, driven by one single purpose: Creating safety and sustainability in a digital world by preventing cyber breach and minimizing impact.
   

  

 Over the years, we’ve earned the trust of organizations worldwide and gained a strong reputation internationally. Our team consists of dedicated specialists covering the entire spectrum of cybersecurity – with capabilities in Predict, Prevent, Protect, Respond, and Recover.
   

  

 Today, we employ around 350 employees – and as cybercrime grows, we need to grow. To support that goal, we are now looking for a Senior Security Infrastructure Engineer who wants to create advanced security solutions in our Secure Infrastructure Domain.
   

  

**Secure Infrastructure**
 Looking at the actual threat landscape today, it’s more important than ever to design and build infrastructure solutions that incorporate correct and relevant security features. The team works closely together using their combined knowledge and experience gathered from different projects and Incident Response cases to help our customers stay ahead of the threat actors. We continuously help customers improve their security posture within cloud, data center, endpoint management, identity, M365, and networking.
   

  

**The Role**
 The Security engineer interfaces regularly with team members and customers, determine technical requirements, feasibility of projects and expectations. You are responsible for maintaining, implementing, and designing client-facing solutions primarily in Active Directory, Entra ID, Azure and Microsoft 365 Security Solutions. This role is for someone who wants to be hands-on in a Microsoft infrastructure role leaning towards cloud but with the experience and knowledge of On-premises/hybrid environments. You must be able to think on your feet and you’ve got to want to learn and be part of a highly skilled and innovative team.
   

  

 Other responsibilities you might have can be:
   

  

* Run health and security checks on Active Directory, Microsoft 365 including Entra ID.
* Assisting our Customers with Tiering Projects.
* Provide customers with design and also assist with the actual implementation.
* Implement solutions based on Statement of Work with customers.


**Your Potential Background**
 We believe that your background probably entails 7+ years of experience and expertise within Microsoft solutions for both Cloud and On-premise/hybrid environments. You feel comfortable with guiding stakeholders towards a more secure and robust environment by giving technical recommendations that can persist the current threats present today.
   

  

 You are comfortable with guiding customers within areas such as: AD-Security, Entra ID-security, Windows Server Hardening, Azure security.
   

  

**Required Skills:**
* Active Directory Security
* Windows server Security
* Azure Security
* Microsoft 365 Security
* Overall a strong Cybersecurity competence within Microsoft Infrastructure.


**Bonus Skills:**
* Knowledge of scripting languages such as PowerShell and/or Python
* Cloud migration journeys from On-prem to Azure.
* Experience with Azure networking: Express Route, Virtual Network & Load Balancers
* Hypervisor knowledge of Hyper-V, VMware.
* Experience working with monitoring and logging tools (e.g.: Log Analytics, Azure Monitor, Azure Sentinel, ELK/ElasticSearch/Kibana)
* Experience with other cloud providers such as AWS and GCP.


*Due to the sensitivity in our assignments, we require Swedish citizenship, citizenship in an EU country, or a Swedish work permit.*
**Join Our Mission Toward a Safe Digital Future**
 If you truly want to make a difference and make our world a little bit safer, this is the place for you. At Truesec, you'll get to be at the forefront of fighting cybercrime instead of reading about it in the news. This is your chance to be part of an exciting journey in a leading cybersecurity company - and learn from some of the best in their field.
   

  

 So, are you ready to team up with the most dedicated team of experts and be part of a meaningful mission? Then we are excited to get to know you!

title: Data Analyst II – Performance Optimization Squad
description:
The Performance Optimization Squad is a newly formed team in the Core Infrastructure Studio with a mission to establish a core competency in performance engineering and address systemic inefficiencies across Spotify's platform. With 3,200+ microservices, 40,000 VMs at peak, and 500,000 K8s pods, even minor fleet-wide efficiency improvements result in substantial cost savings. We've already identified
 **$8M+ in annual savings** 
 from our first initiative alone, and we're just getting started.
   

  

 This squad works horizontally across the entire stack — but none of that optimization happens without the data to see it. We're looking for a Data Analyst who will build the measurement foundation that drives every decision we make.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

 Optimization at this scale is only possible when someone can see the problem clearly. You'll build the data foundation from scratch; designing and owning the datasets, pipelines, and metrics that make performance inefficiencies visible across the platform.
   

  

* Design, build, and maintain datasets and data pipelines that surface resource utilization, cost, and performance signals across Spotify's infrastructure
* Define and own metrics for efficiency, latency, and resource utilization; turning raw infrastructure signals into insights that drive prioritization
* Proactively investigate performance data to surface optimization opportunities, not just respond to engineering requests
* Build dashboards and analyses that support decision-making across the squad and partnering platform teams
* Work with engineers and platform teams to define guardrail metrics, validate findings, and measure the real-world impact of optimization efforts
* Translate complex infrastructure data into clear stories for both technical and non-technical audiences
* Own the data foundation: There is no inherited data infrastructure here; you'll design and build it from scratch. What gets measured, and how, is yours to define
* See your impact directly: Every insight you surface translates into cost savings. We measure success in dollars saved and efficiency gained; your work shows up in production
* Breadth at scale: Work across the entire Spotify platform; 3,200+ microservices, 40,000 VMs, 500,000 K8s pods. Few companies offer data problems at this scale
* Greenfield from day one: Help shape the culture, tooling, and data strategy of a brand new squad with strong executive support


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have experience working with infrastructure, platform, or cloud cost data; Kubernetes metrics, cost attribution, utilization signals, or observability data feel familiar
* Or you're a strong technical analyst with enough grounding in distributed systems and cloud infrastructure to navigate GKE cost data, JVM metrics, and resource utilization signals
* You write clean, efficient SQL and Python; comfortable enough to model data and build lightweight pipelines, not just query existing tables
* You're self-directed: at your best when hunting for problems in the data, not waiting to be handed them
* Comfortable with ambiguity and able to carve your own path in an early-stage, unstructured environment
* Experienced with data visualization tools (Looker or similar) and know how to make a dashboard tell a story, not just display numbers
* You communicate clearly and confidently with engineers and non-technical stakeholders alike


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in Stockholm or London.
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 Spotify transformed music listening forever when we launched in 2008. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators. Everything we do is driven by our love for music and podcasting. Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Analytics Engineer
description:
**Craft:**
 Data, Analytics & Strategy
   

  

**Job Description:**
**Analytics Engineer – Core Data Models & Reporting**
 King is a worldwide leader in mobile gaming, home to some of the most iconic casual games in history, including Candy Crush Saga, Farm Heroes Saga and Bubble Witch Saga. You will work alongside talented people from many crafts, in offices designed for creativity, collaboration and fun in a team-first hybrid mode.
   

  

 With petabytes of data and billions of events generated every day, data sits at the heart of everything we do. Our team turns this data into trusted models and reporting products that help teams across King make better decisions about games played by millions of people.
   

  

 You will join a small collaborative team currently spread across Barcelona, London and Stockholm, working with engineers and analysts across Shared Tech and beyond.
   

  

 You might come from analytics engineering, data engineering or product analytics. What matters is that you are comfortable building with code and equally interested in understanding the business problems behind the work. You will be part of a small team where everyone contributes across the full range of work, from investigation and modelling to routine data maintenance.
   

  

**Your Role Within the Kingdom**
* Engage with stakeholders across the business to understand their challenges and needs. Dig into the data to test assumptions and figure out what needs to be built
* Help define what should be measured and translate that into clean, scalable data models
* Turn raw event and product data into clean, trusted models that serve as the foundation for analytics and self-service reporting
* Design and develop BI products that are intuitive and built for self-service: Looker models, dashboards, custom visualisations and reporting tools
* Communicate your ideas and findings clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences
* Shape the architecture of our data products together with engineers and analysts. Care about data quality, documentation and modelling standards
* Take ownership of your work from design to deployment. We use AI-assisted tools as part of how we work and expect you to be open to doing the same


**Skills To Create Thrills**
* An analytical mindset. You naturally connect what you hear from the business with what you see in the data and think about how to close the gap
* Strong SQL skills, able to write complex and performant queries with ease
* Solid Python skills for data transformation, scripting and workflow automation
* Good understanding of data modelling principles and the ability to translate business questions into well-structured data products
* Experience working with cloud data warehouses such as BigQuery
* Strong collaboration and communication skills, with a problem-solving attitude and ability to talk to both business and technical people
* A curious and proactive mindset and a willingness to learn and broaden your skills
* Hands-on experience building dashboards and visualisations in Looker or a similar BI platform


**Bonus Points**
* Experience with data pipeline orchestration tools such as Airflow
* Familiarity with CI/CD tools such as Drone or GitHub Actions
* Experience with AI coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot or similar) as part of your development workflow
* Contributions to open source projects or public analytics work


 Not sure you meet all qualifications? Let us decide!
   

  

**About King**
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.

title: Agentic AI Solution Specialist (Cloud & Custom Applications)
description:
Att välja Capgemini innebär att välja en arbetsplats där du ges möjlighet att forma din karriär på det sätt du själv önskar, där du ingår i en stödjande och inspirerande gemenskap med engagerade kollegor världen över, och där du får chansen att omdefiniera vad som är möjligt. Våra Cloud & Custom applications-team fokuserar på att utveckla skräddarsydda cloudapplikationer, integrera IT-system och driva affärstransformation, med leverans av affärskritiska cloudlösningar i hög kvalitet och hastighet, möjliggjort av Generative AI. Bli en del av oss och hjälp världsledande organisationer att frigöra teknikens värde och bygga en mer hållbar och inkluderande framtid!
 



  





**Din roll** 




  





 Som Agentic AI Solution Specialist blir du en drivande kraft i att forma framtidens intelligenta automation. Du kommer att arbeta nära våra kunder för att identifiera affärsmöjligheter och omsätta dem till robusta, agentbaserade AI-lösningar. Rollen är konsultativ och kombinerar tekniskt djup med affärsmässighet – du är både rådgivare och inspiratör. Utöver arbetet med kunder blir också en viktig del av vårt interna kompetensnätverk genom kunskapsdelning, pre-sales och strategiska initiativ. Eftersom rollen är ny får du stor frihet att påverka dess utveckling och forma vägarna framåt för att skapa verkligt värde för Capgemini och våra kunder.
 



  





*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:* 




  




* Driva kundprojekt inom Agentic AI och intelligent automation från idé till leverans.
* Agera senior advisor i strategiska initiativ och projekt som rör Agentic AI, och bidra med expertstöd i komplexa frågor.
* Utveckla och presentera go-to-market-förslag samt delta i pre-salesaktiviteter.
* Bygga och dela kunskap internt genom Capgeminis Guilds och Centers of Excellences, samt kombinera teknisk expertis med affärsdrivande och kommunikativa insatser för att inspirera och sälja in lösningar.



  





**Din profil** 




  




* Dokumenterad kompetens inom Agentic AI och erfarenhet av att omsätta komplex teknik till affärsvärde.
* Djup teknisk expertis kombinerad med affärsmässighet och en konsultativ, kommunikativ och pedagogisk approach – du kan förklara teknik på ett sätt som skapar förståelse och engagemang.
* Förståelse för att förändringsinitiativ handlar om människor lika mycket som teknik – du skapar engagemang och säkerställer adoption av nya lösningar.
* Flytande kunskaper i engelska och svenska i tal och skrift



  





**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas** 




  




* Möjligheten att forma en pionjärroll med stor frihet och påverkan på dess utformning – du blir en nyckelperson i att driva intelligent automation och Agentic AI hos våra kunder och internt.
* Tillgång till den senaste tekniken och plattformar som Microsoft Copilot, Azure AI foundry, UiPath Agentic och Google Cloud, samt ett globalt nätverk av experter.
* En kultur som uppmuntrar innovation, kompetensutveckling och kunskapsdelning, där du får utrymme att leda förändring och skapa verklig impact.



  





**Ansökan** 




  





*Efter att du skickat in din ansökan gör vi en första urvalsbedömning. Därefter följer en telefonintervju med ansvarig Talent Acquisition Partner, en intervju med rekryterande chef på kontoret och en teknisk intervju där vi går djupare in på din kompetens. Som avslutning genomför vi relevanta tester och referenstagning innan vi går vidare till ett eventuellt erbjudande.* 




  





*Vi värdesätter din tid och ser till att du får tydlig kommunikation och snabb återkoppling genom hela processen. Du kommer löpande kunna ställa frågor och få uppdateringar från ansvarig Talent Acquisition Partner – vårt mål är att skapa en positiv upplevelse där du får en rättvis bild av både rollen och oss som arbetsgivare.* 




  





*Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov.* 




  





**Om Capgemini** 




  





 Capgemini är en AI-driven global partner för affärs- och tekniktransformation som levererar konkret verksamhetsnytta. Vi formar framtiden för organisationer och förverkligar den med hjälp av AI, teknik och människor. Med vår starka historia på nästan 60 år är vi en ansvarsfull och mångsidig koncern med över 420 000 medarbetare i över 50 länder. Genom vår expertis inom strategi, teknik, design, ingenjörstjänster och affärsverksamhet levererar vi heltäckande tjänster och lösningar, baserade på vår djupa branschkunskap och vårt omfattande partnernätverk. Koncernen rapporterade globala intäkter på 22,5 miljarder euro för 2025.
 



  





**Make it real** 
 | www.capgemini.com

title: Senior Systemförvaltare EBO
description:
***Vill du ha en nyckelroll i förvaltningen av ett affärskritiskt, globalt installerat EBO-system? Vi söker nu en mycket senior systemförvaltare med djup teknisk kompetens och stark förmåga att leda och samordna arbete i komplexa, internationella IT-miljöer.***
**Om rollen**
 I rollen som
 **Senior Systemförvaltare EBO** 
 ansvarar du för den tekniska och applikatoriska förvaltningen av vår beställares EBO-system, som är installerat och används globalt. Rollen omfattar såväl strategiskt som operativt ansvar och kräver ett helhetsperspektiv på systemförvaltning i enterprise-miljö.
   

  

 En central del av uppdraget är att
 **leda och utveckla samarbetet med vår organisation i Makedonien** 
 , som utgör en integrerad del av leveransen inom systemförvaltning och support.
   

  

 Du fungerar som huvudkontakt, säkerställer tydliga arbetssätt, kvalitetsnivåer och ett effektivt samspel mellan lokala och globala funktioner.
   

  

**Om dig**
 Vi söker dig som är trygg, självgående och strategisk, med ett starkt ägarskap för dina ansvarsområden. Du har förmåga att driva och leda samarbeten även utan formellt personalansvar och skapar engagemang genom förtroende och tydlighet.
   

  

 Du arbetar analytiskt och lösningsorienterat, med ett tydligt fokus på kvalitet och leverans. Med din mycket goda kommunikationsförmåga är du van att samverka i internationella sammanhang och kan anpassa ditt budskap till olika målgrupper och kulturer.
   

  

**Ansvarsområden**
* Systemförvaltning och vidareutveckling av EBO-plattformen i global drift
* Applikatorisk förvaltning, inklusive konfiguration, versionshantering och uppgraderingar
* Ledning och koordinering av samarbetet med organisationen i Makedonien inom systemförvaltning och support
* Säkerställande av IT-säkerhet, accesshantering och efterlevnad av interna och externa krav
* Drift och förvaltning i Windows-miljö
* Databashantering, felsökning och prestandaoptimering i SQL
* Samarbete med globala intressenter, leverantörer och lokala IT-team
* Incident-, problem- och förändringshantering enligt etablerade processer
* Dokumentation och vidareutveckling av förvaltningsmodeller, SLA:er och arbetssätt


**Kvalifikationer (krav)**
* Mycket hög senioritet inom systemförvaltning av EBO (flerårig dokumenterad erfarenhet)
* Djup teknisk kompetens inom:
+ EBO-plattformen
+ Windows Server-miljöer
+ SQL (administration, felsökning, prestanda)
+ IT-säkerhet i komplexa systemlandskap

* Erfarenhet av globalt installerade system och arbete i internationella organisationer
* Erfarenhet av att leda eller koordinera leverans- och supportfunktioner, gärna i offshore- eller nearshore-upplägg
* Flytande engelska i tal och skrift (obligatoriskt)


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av regulatoriska eller säkerhetskritiska miljöer
* Kunskap om integrationslösningar och systemkopplingar
* Erfarenhet av ITIL, SIAM eller liknande ramverk


**Vi erbjuder**
 Init Sweden är en av Nordens ledare inom industriell IT och automation. Idag består Init av ca 15 nordiska företag med en total omsättning på 1,5 Miljard SEK och 950 anställda i Danmark, Sverige, Norge och Spanien, som är specialister inom industriell IT, automation, IOT och OT cybersäkerhet. Init har en tydlig ambition om att vara den bästa partnern för kunder som fokuserar på optimering, digitalisering, säkerhet och grön omställning av sina anläggningar.
   

  

* En nyckelroll med reellt inflytande över global systemförvaltning och supportleverans
* Möjlighet att arbeta både strategiskt och tekniskt nära verksamheten
* En professionell organisation med hög teknisk och processmässig mognad
* Ett företag med en tydlig och kontrollerad tillväxtstrategi
* Goda karriärmöjligheter med professionella, inspirerande och innovativa miljöer med plats för nörderi och professionell utveckling.
* Ett företag som stöttar ditt specialområde i ett samhälle med hög ambitionsnivå.


**Placeringsort:** 
 Stockholm, Malmö, Göteborg (valfri ort)
   

  

**Närmaste ledare:** 
 Viktor Wangrosso, Division Manager
   

  

 Vi läser ansökningar och träffar kandidater löpande så skicka in din ansökan redan idag! Vid frågor, kontakta mig, Rekryterare Sara Rensfeldt Romin, på sara.rensfeldt@initgroup.com
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan! #Init2winit
   

  

 Init hjälper verksamheter att göra styrning, övervakning och systemintegration smartare. Vi kombinerar affär, organisation och teknik så att allt hänger ihop i praktiken.
   

  

 Vi är vana vid miljöer med höga krav på effektivitet, tillgänglighet och säkerhet. Därför tar vi ansvar hela vägen: från idé och design till programmering, driftsättning och löpande underhåll. Då kan kunden fokusera på sin kärnverksamhet.
   

  

 Vi har gjort det här i mer än 30 år, i fastigheter, industri och infrastruktur – alltid med samma mål: att göra komplexa system enklare att använda.

title: Sr. Account Executive - Large Enterprise Business - Sweden
description:
**Description**
 We’re
 **Salesforce,** 
 the Customer Company, inspiring the future of business with AI+ Data +CRM. Leading with our core values, we help companies across every industry blaze new trails and connect with customers in a whole new way. And, we empower you to be a Trailblazer, too — driving your performance and career growth, charting new paths, and improving the state of the world. If you believe in business as the greatest platform for change and in companies doing well and doing good – you’ve come to the right place.
   

  

 Our Enterprise Business team focuses on working with our most strategic customers and organizations of 1,500+ employees. You will have the opportunity to work in a fast-paced team with various customers and receive personalized training and career opportunities.
   

  

**About The Role**
 This is a unique opportunity to join a highly successful team of seasoned Enterprise Account Executives working with the company’s both existing and prospect accounts. Salesforce is looking for hardworking, high EQ and passionate individuals who can effectively articulate how & why our solutions can help transform Customers’ business and exceed their goals.
   

  

 Salesforce aspires to deliver business transformation enabled by technology to its customers and therefore requires individuals able to develop deep insight into the business dynamics of large sophisticated enterprises and help shape customers’ change agenda.
   

  

**Your Day-to-Day**
 Our Enterprise Account Executives engage with existing customers and new leads to sell the entire Salesforce Customer 360 platform. They build positive, trusted relationships with both key team members and c-suite decision makers within their patch, and become naturals at helping customers realize value from their Salesforce investments.
   

  

 You will use your skills to develop opportunities, through existing customers, warm leads and whitespace prospecting.
   

  

* Develop key customer stakeholder relationships and drive customer satisfaction at assigned accounts
* Develop and drive the overall long-term strategy for the account, aligned to customer business objectives
* Coordinate internal Salesforce resources to meet customer business needs
* Perform account planning at assigned accounts, coordinating with Specialist Cloud sales and Solution engineer resources to ensure strategic alignment
* Share Salesforce value proposition for existing and/or new customers
* Drive growth within an existing assigned account


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Approx. 5-10+ years of full-cycle SaaS/SW sales experience
* Ability to strategize and coordinate with a large extended team as an Account Executive


**What We Look For In You**
* Effective communicator & quick learner: Ability to articulate how & why our solutions can help transform Customers’ business and exceed their goals.
* Successfully run complex SaaS sales deals: Ability to develop sophisticated deal structures and commercial proposals for large deals.
* Strong interpersonal skills and ability to lead internal stakeholders in a client team
* Strong analytical & problem-solving skills are essential
* Strong influencing capabilities; must be a self-starter, high-energy
* Strong appetite to work in a strategic selling environment.
* Fluent in English and Swedish + Right to work in Sweden
* Ability to work with a hybrid agreement being at the office 3 days a week

title: Nätverkstekniker med kunskap inom Forcepoint
description:
Vi på Iver brinner för innovationer och god laganda, vi är särskilt intresserad av dig som gillar att tänka nytt och dela med dig av dina tankar. Vi söker en
 **Senior Nätverkstekniker** 
 som vill bidra till bättre IT-lösningar för våra kunder. Är du vår nya kollega?
   

  

**We empower our Nordic society**
 Iver är en ledande nordisk helhetsleverantör av molnbaserade IT-tjänster med spetskompetens inom drift, cybersäkerhet, cloud och innovation. Våra tjänster är kritiska inte bara för våra kunder utan för digitaliseringen av samhället i stort. Med huvudkontor i Stockholm verkar Iver främst i Norden med en agenda att fortsätta expandera. Iver omsätter drygt 3 miljarder SEK och har cirka 1 300 anställda som arbetar på ett av våra 23 kontor i Norden.
   

  

**Din roll på Iver**
 I rollen som senior nätverkstekniker blir du en del av vårt specialistteam inom nätverk och säkerhet. Här arbetar engagerade kollegor tillsammans med drift, utveckling och leverans av våra nätverks- och säkerhetstjänster.
   

  

 Vi arbetar nära våra kunder och erbjuder möjlighet att arbeta i konsultuppdrag. Inledningsvis kommer du att vara dedikerad mot en specifik kund, med placering på Ivers kontor i Solna. Över tid kan uppdraget variera beroende på behov och önskemål.
   

  

 Du får möjlighet att vidareutveckla dina tekniska kunskaper inom bland annat routing, switching, brandväggar, 802.1x, VPN-lösningar, trådlösa nätverk och WAN – i ett team som präglas av kunskapsdelning och samarbete.
   

  

**Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:**
* Felsökning och incidenthantering i kundmiljöer
* Genomföra förändringar och förbättringar i nätverksinfrastruktur
* Implementation av nätverks- och säkerhetslösningar
* Arbeta med routing, switching och brandväggar
* Hantera VPN-lösningar och trådlösa nätverk
* Samarbeta med kundansvariga team och fungera som tekniskt stöd till kunder


**Vad erbjuder vi dig?**
 På Iver får du möjlighet att arbeta med den senaste tekniken och vara med på en spännande tillväxtresa. Vi är inkluderande och strävar efter ett genuint samarbete mot gemensamma mål. Inom Iver finns stora möjligheter till utveckling och vi finns här för att inspirera dig till att nå dina yrkesmässiga mål. Vi står bakom dig när du vill lära dig mer inom ditt specialområde, ledarskap eller nya områden. Hos Iver är du också en del av ett ambitiöst och innovativt företag, vilket innebär att förbättra, testa, utvärdera och våga ändra hur vi gör saker är viktiga ingredienser för att vi ska utvecklas.
   

  

 Vi på Iver ger samma löfte till våra kollegor som till våra kunder. Löftet är att alltid vara ”
 **Beside you** 
 ”, ”
 **Behind you** 
 ” och ”
 **Before you** 
 ”. Vi kallar det för "
 **The Iver way"** 
 .
   

  

**Förmåner hos oss:**
 📄 Kollektivavtal & trygga villkor
   

  

 🏠 Hybridarbete
   

  

 💪 Friskvårdsbidrag
   

  

 👓 Terminalglasögon
   

  

 ⏳ Tidsbank – 24 h extra ledighet/år
   

  

 🩺 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension (ITP) & flexpension
   

  

**Vem söker vi?**
 Vi söker dig som har en högskoleutbildning inom nätverk eller motsvarande, samt minst tre års erfarenhet som nätverkstekniker. Du är trygg i din kompetens och redo att ta nästa steg i din utveckling.
   

  

 Du har goda kunskaper Forcepoint, Cisco och Fortinet. Du har ett stort tekniskt intresse och en god förståelse för routing, switching, nätverkssäkerhet och brandväggar. Du har även erfarenhet av flera protokoll och standarder, exempelvis:
   

  

* TCP/IP
* IPv6
* IPSec, DMVPN och ADVPN
* 802.1x
* BGP


 Som person är du nyfiken, lösningsorienterad och har en vilja att kontinuerligt utvecklas. Du trivs i en roll där du kombinerar tekniskt arbete med kundkontakt och har ett strukturerat arbetssätt. Vi lägger stor vikt vid personliga egenskaper såsom ansvarstagande, noggrannhet och god samarbetsförmåga.
   

  

**Meriterande:**
* Erfarenhet av Forcepoint- och FortiGate-brandväggar
* Erfarenhet av switchar från Cisco och Aruba
* Erfarenhet av eller kunskap inom HPE IMC
* Relevanta certifieringar inom nätverk och säkerhet


**Placeringsort:** 
 Iver finns på 23 orter i Norden. För denna roll ser vi att du utgår från vårt huvudkontor i Solna.
   

  

**Övrig information:** 
 Vi har kunder inom alla branscher och sektorer inklusive säkerhetsklassad verksamhet, därför genomför vi bakgrundskontroller i samtliga av våra rekryteringsprocesser.
   

  

**Sök till oss!** 
 Urval sker löpande, tjänsten kan tillsättas före sista ansökningsdag. Iver eftersträvar en jämn könsfördelning och värdesätter etnisk och kulturell mångfald.
   

  

**Sista ansökningsdag:** 
 2026-05-08
   

  

**Start:** 
 Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

 Välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef Jonas Rydergren (jonas.rydergren@iver.se) eller TA-Partner Linnea Blomgren (linnea.blomgren@iver.se) vid frågor eller funderingar kring tjänsten.
   

  

**Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!**
**We empower our Nordic society** 
 . Iver är en ledande nordisk helhetsleverantör av molnbaserade IT-tjänster med spetskompetens inom drift, cybersäkerhet, cloud och innovation.
   

  

**Våra tjänster är kritiska inte bara för våra kunder – utan för digitaliseringen av samhället i stort.** 
 Vi säkerställer att sjukvården har tillgång till rätt patientdata, att samhällskritiska system aldrig ligger nere och att flygplanen landar säkert. Som en lyhörd och affärsnära helhetspartner möjliggör vi våra kunders innovation – idag och imorgon.

title: Senior Data Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 As a Senior Data Engineer within Visa’s Open Banking AI & Data Platform domain, based in Stockholm, Sweden, you will play a key role in designing, building, and evolving our next‑generation data platform. You will work hands‑on with complex data systems that support a wide range of use cases, including data warehousing, real‑time and batch data processing, analytical event systems, advanced data modelling, and infrastructure management.
   

  

 You will collaborate closely with engineers, product managers, and partners across engineering, compliance, and AI to deliver secure, compliant, and scalable data solutions that meet the needs of the Open Banking landscape. You will contribute to architectural design discussions, apply established patterns and standards, and help ensure that solutions meet performance, reliability, security, and regulatory requirements.
   

  

 As a senior individual contributor, you are expected to take ownership of complex technical problems, deliver high‑quality and maintainable solutions, and support less‑experienced engineers through technical guidance and knowledge sharing. You will actively contribute to improving engineering practices, platform capabilities, and operational excellence, while aligning your work with Visa’s broader technical strategy.
   

  

 The Senior Data Engineer contributes to the technical design and implementation of the Open Banking AI & Data Platform, working within established architectural frameworks and enterprise standards. The role supports architectural reviews, helps ensure solutions meet requirements for security, scalability, resilience, and operational readiness, and identifies opportunities to improve platform quality and reduce technical debt. Acting as an experienced engineer within the domain, the role partners closely with Engineering, Product, Risk, Legal, Compliance, and Operations to deliver well‑designed and auditable data solutions. The Senior Data Engineer provides technical input, supports best‑practice adoption, mentors engineers through code reviews and design discussions, and represents the team in cross‑functional initiatives when needed.
   

  

 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Strong experience in data engineering and data architecture, including data warehousing, ETL/ELT pipelines, and data lakes in enterprise environments. Solid understanding of building secure, compliant, and resilient data systems, with exposure to privacy and regulatory requirements such as GDPR and PSD2. Hands on experience with data processing frameworks and languages (e.g. Spark, Hadoop, SQL, Python/Scala/Java) and event driven or streaming platforms (e.g. Kafka, Kinesis). Good knowledge of data modelling, schema design, master data concepts, and metadata management. Practical experience working with cloud platforms (e.g. AWS, Azure, GCP), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and Infrastructure as Code tools (e.g. Terraform, CloudFormation). Familiarity with AI/ML data pipelines and supporting machine learning workloads in production environments. Proven ability to work independently on complex technical tasks, contribute to design decisions, and deliver solutions end to end. Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts to both technical and non technical stakeholders. Relevant degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, or a related field. Professional certifications are a plus.
   

  

**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Senior Backend Engineer with cloud experience (Stockholm, EU only)
description:
Anyfin is building the next generation of consumer finance. We’re profitable, scaling quickly, and now operating with a banking license which opens up a lot of technical complexity.
   

  

 We’re looking for a senior backend engineer with cloud experience who enjoys moving fast, taking real ownership, and building things that actually have an impact. We work from the office because we think it makes us better, especially at this stage.
   

  

 If that sounds like your kind of environment, keep reading. Because honestly, it’s not a role for everyone.
   

  

**Small team, high responsibility**
 We hire carefully. We’re not a company that grows by adding headcount everywhere, we grow by keeping the bar high and building a team where every person matters.
   

  

 This isn’t a place where you disappear into a big org. If you join, you’ll have real influence on what we build and how we build it.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Building, optimizing and scaling robust financial backend systems using Node.js and SQL (Postgres)
* Working primarily in the backend while contributing to our cloud infrastructure, helping design and operate systems across networking, servers and database architectures to support scalable and reliable services.
* Contributing to system architecture to ensure scalability, reliability, and long-term maintainability of financial systems.
* Collaborating closely with cross-functional teams to shape both product direction and business strategy.
* Sharing backend expertise with the team while promoting best practices, along with strong cloud and infrastructure competence.


 Our main stack is TypeScript, Node.js, React, React Native running on Google Cloud Platform.
   

  

**How We Think About Building**
 We’re pragmatic. We like speed, but we also care about building things that last.
   

  

 AI isn’t a side tool here. It’s embedded in how we work helping engineers move faster, reduce friction and focus on solving meaningful problems.
   

  

 We’re looking for engineers who are curious about that shift and want to be part of it, rather than people who feel like good engineering means doing everything the hard way.
   

  

 No ego. Just good judgment and high output.
   

  

**You’ll thrive here if you…**
* Have solid experience building backend systems with Node.js and working with cloud platforms such as GCP.
* Care about craftsmanship, performance, and reliability in the systems you build.
* Take responsibility naturally and don’t wait to be told what to do.
* Enjoy messy problems and figuring things out as you go.
* Like being in an ambitious, collaborative team in the office.
* Want to build and improve products, not just maintain.


**You’re Comfortable With Things Like**
* Strong background in backend development with Node.js and SQL databases (preferably Postgres).
* Experience in designing, deploying and monitoring solutions on major cloud platforms such as GCP, AWS or Azure.
* At least 5 years of professional experience, ideally in high-stakes environments like finance.
* Passionate about solving complex backend problems with clean, pragmatic solutions.
* Solid understanding of system design and architecture.
* Bonus if you’ve worked with React, Python, Go, GraphQL, Kubernetes or DevOps with Github Actions.


**A few practical notes**
* Stockholm and office-based, because we believe that great products and culture are better built when you meet in person.
* EU work authorization required.


**Why Anyfin?**
 Because this is one of those moments where a company is about to level up: Banking license secured, expansion ahead and a lot to build.
   

  

 If you want to be part of a small, high-trust team doing meaningful work, we’d love to hear from you. Apply only if you want the responsibility that comes with real impact.
   

  

 Anyfin is a fintech on a mission to simplify loan repayments and improve the financial well-being of millions. We help consumers reduce the costs of high-interest loans, and take control of their repayment plan.

title: Sales Associate Team Leader
description:
Insight is a Fortune 500-ranked global provider of hardware, software, cloud, and service solutions, providing clients the guidance and expertise needed to define, architect, implement and manage technology today while transforming for tomorrow.
   

  

 Operations is the heartbeat of Insight. Our passion is to deliver excellence to our teammates, partners and clients with exceptional results, every time. The Operations function is responsible for the effective planning, organising, coordinating, and controlling of resources needed to deliver Insight’s solutions by proactively managing people, products, technology, information, and time.
   

  

 The Client Operations team manages the full client experience from purchase to pay which includes but is not limited to order processing, back-order management, and proactive communication with internal and external clients to assist with inquiries, problem solve matters, and resolve any outstanding issues. As the client-facing day to day contact for the customer, speed and professionalism from teammates is vital to ensuring good impressions are made, the reputation of the organisation is enhanced, and repeat business is successfully secured.
   

  

 The Sales Associate Team Leader, in conjunction with the Sales Manager, assists with some elements of the core management responsibilities for the Sales team. In addition, the Sales Associate Team Leader directly manages a team of Inside Sales Associates including setting specific sales goals and targets, and ensuring teammates meet and exceed their induvial sales quotas.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Supervise and motivate the team, to promote teammate satisfaction through mentoring, development, and career planning; creating a high performing team with a strong succession benchmark, enabling career progression.
* Mentor, motivate, and coach a team of Inside Sales Associates through all aspects of the sales cycle, and delegate the workload effectively to teammates.
* Conduct regular team meetings to set, review and track performance against objectives, provide feedback, and drive continuous improvement initiatives.
* Understand and drive go-to-market strategies within the team, to ensure teammates have a deep understanding of Insight offerings.
* Accountable for ensuring client satisfaction; act as ‘point of escalation’ for more complex queries, ensure SLAs and KPIs are clearly communicated and adhered to, and that clients are responded to in a prompt and professional manner.
* Ensure online catalogue information is updated in a timely manner and with the utmost accuracy.
* Run regular back log reports and provide feedback to the Inside Sales Associates in order to help them prioritise and work more efficiently.
* Act as the primary escalation point for Inside Sales Associates and build business relationships to provide the best possible service to clients.


**Qualifications:**
* Experience of working within a high performing team within a fast-paced, target driven environment
* Educated to degree level or can demonstrate equivalent work experience
* Understanding and ability to utilise Sales Methodology, from defining client needs to delivering outcomes
* High level of written and spoken Swedish and English
* Proven team leader experience – driving passion, motivation, and energy throughout team

title: Senior Sales Development Representative
description:
⭐
 **Ready for your next challenge? Let’s talk.**
 At Bannerflow, we’re always interested in connecting with curious, driven people who want to grow with us. While our needs evolve over time, one thing stays constant: we value great talent and strong team players who want to make an impact.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 A strong team spirit built on trust & ownership
   

  

 We believe in giving people responsibility and the freedom to succeed. We trust each other, collaborate closely, and assume the best intentions. Together, we decide how to win.
   

  

**Continuous growth and new challenges**
 Our entrepreneurial mindset encourages initiative, experimentation, and learning. If you have ideas on how we can improve, scale, or work smarter — we want to hear them.
   

  

**A passionate and fun culture**
 We take our work seriously, but not ourselves. Expect a diverse and inclusive environment with activities like Health Month, inspirational talks, team events, company trips, board game nights, and more.
   

  

**A stable, global Ad Tech company with strong growth ambitions**
 Based in Stockholm and working with customers worldwide, Bannerflow continues to expand into new markets. With the support of our new owners, we’re well-positioned for continued growth in 2025 and beyond.
   

  

 🦋
 **You + Bannerflow?**
 From time to time, we look for talented Sales Development Representatives (SDRs) who want to grow within B2B SaaS and Ad Tech. In an SDR role at Bannerflow, you’d play a key part in building relationships with future customers, generating qualified leads, and supporting our commercial growth by working closely with Account Executives and the wider go-to-market team.
   

  

**What You Might Work On**
* Generating and nurturing qualified leads using modern tools and data-driven methods
* Engaging prospects and helping them understand the value of Bannerflow
* Managing and improving pipeline data in our CRM
* Staying curious about market trends and sharing insights with the team


**What We Typically Look For**
* 1.5+ years of experience in sales development or a similar commercial role
* A strong sense of ownership and motivation to grow
* Comfort using prospecting tools like LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Salesloft, or Cognism
* Strong communication skills in English (additional languages are always a plus)
* A commercial mindset and interest in SaaS, Ad Tech, and B2B sales


**Why Bannerflow?**
 We’re a values-driven company built on passion, collaboration, and challenge. Here, you’ll have the chance to grow alongside experienced colleagues, influence how we work, and be part of a team shaping the future of creative automation in Ad Tech.
   

  

 We offer a hybrid work setup, competitive compensation, ITP1 pension, health allowance, parental leave top-up, and health insurance, plus a culture filled with padel tournaments, hackathons, webinars, and Friday beers 🍻

title: Principal AI Solution Engineer
description:
**Craft:**
 Data, Analytics & Strategy
   

  

**Job Description:**
****Principal AI Solutions Engineer****
 The ACE team (AI Center of Excellence at King) accelerates King’s AI transformation by enabling teams to safely and productively adopt AI in daily work. We do this through shared practices, education, enablement, and by partnering with game studios, Shared Tech, and support functions to integrate AI tools into King’s workflows.
   

  

 As third‑party AI tools (LLMs, generative models, agentic tooling) have rapidly evolved, we expanded AI/ML with the AI Discovery & Enablement team. This team helps King evaluate and apply new technologies and commercial tools (COTS) that improve productivity and speed up routes to better player experiences, primarily by making AI normal across engineering workflows.
   

  

 We are now looking for a
 **Principal AI Solutions Engineer** 
 to support the AI Discovery & Enablement team by delivering high‑leverage, production‑ready integrations and adoption mechanisms across King.
   

  

****Your role within the Kingdom****
 We’re looking for someone who is excited by the scale of King and brings ambitious, creative thinking to unlock step-change improvements; not just incremental optimizations.
   

  

 As Principal AI Solutions Engineer, you are a hands-on technical expert and strategic integrator focused on adoption-first AI enablement. You will work with engineering leaders, across business units, and tool owners to translate AI opportunities into concrete integration points across the SDLC and King’s “Royal Roads” (standards, patterns, and preferred paths).
   

  

 This role requires strong engineering credibility: you can participate in architecture discussions, design integrations that are reliable and supportable, and ship the small number of solutions that compound adoption across many teams.
   

  

 You will also contribute to a limited number of partnership-led, time‑boxed PoCs to demonstrate value and potential of opportunities and ensure learnings are captured and handed off appropriately.
   

  

****Key responsibilities:****
****AI adoption & workflow integration (Primary focus)****
* Design, build, and ship production‑ready AI integrations that improve productivity (e.g., in developer workflows, PR/code review assistance, testing support, documentation workflows, developer enablement experiences) aligned with King’s standards and “Royal Roads.”
* Participate in architecture discussions and design reviews. Translate AI possibilities into concrete integration points, reference implementations, and clear trade‑offs.
* Partake in team efforts - Collaborate with the AI Discovery Engineer, the AI User Experience Researcher and the rest of the team to align development and integration efforts with King's AI productivity and enablement strategy.
* Critical Thinking & Contextual Awareness - Understand not just the “what” and “how” of AI integration, but also the “why.” Connect day-to-day implementation details with the larger organizational strategy, ensuring that the work you do meaningfully advances King’s AI-first transformation.


**Partnership PoCs**
* Contribute to a small number of partnership-led PoCs to validate what’s possible, capture learnings, and inform next steps for the owning teams. When a PoC transitions toward productization, support a clear handoff rather than becoming the long‑term owner.


**Ways of working**
* Proactive Collaboration & Partner Alignment - Maintain close alignment with internal teams; game studios, Shared Tech, and support functions - by identifying needs, gathering feedback, and fostering consensus. Communicate clearly and proactively to ensure efforts align with the company’s AI strategy and productivity goals.
* Documentation and Handover - Create clear and comprehensive documentation for solutions, ensuring smooth handovers of proofs-of-concept (POC) to other teams for long-term maintenance and promoting knowledge-sharing across the organization


**Experience**
**Skills to Create Thrills**
* Proven experience in a development-focused role, preferably within a Game development and AI-specific context.
* Proven experience in a senior/principal development role delivering developer productivity tooling, platform integrations, or workflow automation in a complex organization.
* Proven experience integrating LLM-based tools (e.g., GPT‑class models) and/or agentic workflows into real production environments with appropriate evaluation, monitoring, and guardrails.
* Experience building and operating integrations on cloud infrastructure (GCP preferred), including CI/CD and modern deployment practices (containers/Kubernetes).
* Experience working cross‑functionally with engineering leaders, platform teams, and product stakeholders to ship solutions that are adopted (not just delivered).


**Knowledge And Skills**
* Deep knowledge of game development processes, challenges, and support functions, particularly how AI can fit into production lifecycles, from prototyping to live operations, is highly valuable.
* Strong software engineering fundamentals and coding proficiency; ability to architect and implement end‑to‑end integrations that solve real workflow problems. (Python and/or similar languages common in AI workflows are highly desirable.)
* Strong understanding of modern software delivery workflows (code review, CI/CD, testing, release practices) and where AI can be embedded to improve cycle time and quality.
* Practical understanding of reliability, observability, security/privacy considerations, and cost controls for AI-enabled systems and vendor tooling.
* Strong communication skills: able to explain technical trade‑offs to technical and non‑technical audiences, and drive alignment across multiple partner teams.


**Key Attributes**
* Independently prioritize, handle ambiguity, and drive work forward through partner alignment and clear trade‑offs.
* Strong sense of ownership and accountability, with an ability to define “done” and establish operational handoffs.
* Collaborative and proactive; builds relationships with studios, Shared Tech, and champions to scale adoption.
* Curious and pragmatic: comfortable learning new tools quickly, but focused on what compounds adoption and creates durable value.
* Bold and opportunity-driven: energized by working at King scale, you think beyond obvious solutions and proactively propose ambitious, high-leverage ideas while grounding them in practical delivery and measurable impact.


**Nice to Have**
* Familiarity with GCP-native AI services (e.g., Vertex AI) or enterprise integration patterns for vendor tooling (auth/audit/data boundaries).
* Experience with modern ML frameworks (PyTorch/TensorFlow) when useful for evaluation or prototyping, but not required for the core role.
* Deep familiarity with game development pipelines and production constraints.
* Familiarity with ethical AI considerations or regulatory requirements.


**About King**
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.

title: Test Automation Engineer
description:

You are an experienced software engineer with a curious approach to new challenges and a customer-oriented mindset. You can switch focus between the big picture and technical details when required.
